english: And thus, death descended upon Tarkov
chinese: 于是，死亡降临塔科夫。
start_summary: Quest[target=675e4307c26e93866ad36d9c; status=4] || Quest[target=675e44ef86f0af6fce9195a4; status=4] || Quest[target=675e458cdb219e98dda39bc9; status=4]

english: I see you've begun your training of the physical, practical, and the mental skills... Good! I'm glad to see you taking care of yourself so well. I bet you were starting to wonder if we were ever going to focus on combat, weren't you? Besides, I'm an angel, I'm supposed to be pure and holy, right? Oh believe me, we are. That's why we need this. Let's be honest, this region has gone the way of Sodom and Gomorrah. Everyone's either killing each other, or profiting off everyone else killing each other. It's become a wasteland. Worst off all, the cult's presence has grow way out of hand. I don't know how many times we have to remind people who the only God is, but we're going to do it again. You're going to rain fire and brimstone down on this place, mercenary. You will become the must destructive force in Tarkov, and will remain here until He is finished with this place. Expect no easy tasks here, friend. War is hell, and you're riding on the red horse. Let the slaughter commence.
chinese: 我看得出，你已经开始训练身体、实用和精神技能了……很好！见你把自己照顾得这么周全，我很高兴。你是不是已经开始琢磨，我们什么时候才会把重点放回战斗上了？再说了，我可是天使，理应纯洁而圣洁，不是吗？你尽可以相信，我们确实如此。正因如此，这件事才非做不可。说句实话，这片地区早就成了所多玛和蛾摩拉。所有人不是在彼此残杀，就是靠别人的残杀牟利。这里已经成了一片废土。更糟的是，邪教的势力已经膨胀到失控。我不知道我们还得提醒世人多少次，谁才是唯一的神，但这次我们会再提醒他们一遍。你要把烈火与硫磺倾泻到这片土地上，佣兵。你会成为塔科夫最具毁灭性的力量，并留在这里，直到祂处理完这地方。别指望这里会有轻松的任务，朋友。战争即地狱，而你正骑在那匹红马上。让杀戮开始吧。
start_summary: Quest[target=675e4307c26e93866ad36d9c; status=4] || Quest[target=675e44ef86f0af6fce9195a4; status=4] || Quest[target=675e458cdb219e98dda39bc9; status=4]

english: Let the slaughter commence
chinese: 让杀戮开始吧
start_summary: Quest[target=675e4307c26e93866ad36d9c; status=4] || Quest[target=675e44ef86f0af6fce9195a4; status=4] || Quest[target=675e458cdb219e98dda39bc9; status=4]

english: The great tribulation of Tarkov has begun. I want you to know that we aren't exactly 'happy' when it comes to these sorts of things. We don't get some religious high when we destroy evil cities like this. It's just what it is. You, however... you may enjoy it as much as you like.
chinese: 塔科夫的大灾厄已经开始了。我要让你明白，做这种事时，我们并不会感到什么“喜悦”。摧毁这样的邪恶之城，不会让我们获得什么宗教式的亢奋。事情本就如此。至于你……你想享受多少都随你。
start_summary: Quest[target=675e4307c26e93866ad36d9c; status=4] || Quest[target=675e44ef86f0af6fce9195a4; status=4] || Quest[target=675e458cdb219e98dda39bc9; status=4]

english: In one raid, complete all tasks: Kill 10 enemies
chinese: 在单场战局内完成以下全部目标：击杀 10 名敌人

english: Kill 1 enemy further than 40 meters
chinese: 在 40 米外击杀 1 名敌人

english: Kill 1 enemy within 15 meters
chinese: 在 15 米内击杀 1 名敌人

english: Kill 1 enemy with an AR/DMR
chinese: 用突击步枪/精确射手步枪击杀 1 名敌人

english: Kill 1 enemy with an SMG/SG
chinese: 用冲锋枪/霰弹枪击杀 1 名敌人

english: Kill 1 enemy with a pistol
chinese: 用手枪击杀 1 名敌人

english: Kill 3 enemies with headshots.
chinese: 爆头击杀 3 名敌人

english: (All 'accept' inbox messages from this trader will be comments your character is making.) No one's left behind? Yeah, right.
chinese: （这位商人的“接受任务”信件，都是你角色自己的吐槽。）谁都不掉队？哈，放屁。

english: Command abandoned you. Your squad has fallen in battle. Tarkov has collapsed into complete disarray, and now you are caught in the middle of it. Screw the mission, screw whatever TerraGroup is or isn't doing. Your focus now is simply getting out of this hellhole.
chinese: 指挥部抛弃了你。你的小队已在战斗中覆灭。塔科夫彻底陷入失序，而你现在被困在这场乱局中央。去他妈的任务，去他妈的 TerraGroup 在干什么。你现在唯一的目标，就是从这片地狱里活着出去。

english: Abandoned
chinese: 被抛弃

english: You haven't died yet. Have a bonus.
chinese: 你还没死。给你点额外奖励。

english: How am I still here...?
chinese: 我为什么还在这里……？

english: There's no way you could have survived those wounds. You know you died, you felt the pain, you lost consciousness, and yet... somehow you're still here, without the injuries. In fact, everything is still here. The locations remain unchanged, your safehouse is still here... it seems only the gear you had on you is lost. Either your dreams are too realistic... or something is terribly, terribly wrong here. You decide to investigate, though you have no clue where to begin, or even how. Perhaps just looking around?
chinese: 你不可能扛过那样的伤势。你知道自己死了，你感受过疼痛，也失去了意识，可是……不知为何，你现在还在这里，身上连伤都没有。事实上，一切都还在。地点没有变化，你的安全屋也还在……看起来只有你当时带在身上的装备消失了。要么是你的梦过于真实……要么就是这里出了极其严重的问题。你决定去调查一下，尽管你根本不知道该从哪查起，甚至不知道该怎么查。也许，先到处看看？

english: What...?
chinese: 什么……？

english: Your search reveals nothing. You don't even know what you're looking for; how do you expect to find anything? You suddenly hear a voice, '...must be the one. They clearly know abo-' the voice cuts off. You feel watched.
chinese: 你的搜索没有发现任何结果。你甚至都不知道自己在找什么，又怎么可能找到东西？突然，你听见一道声音：'……一定就是他。他显然知道关——' 声音戛然而止。你感觉自己正在被注视。

english: Do I trust this voice?
chinese: 我该相信这道声音吗？

english: First you die and come back, now you're hearing voices... and here you thought this might be a simple deployment. Now you're wrapped up in something, and it seems that not even death can save you. Perhaps all you can do is keep looking... or perhaps you should attempt to call out to the voice. You heard it; maybe it will hear you.
chinese: 先是死了又回来，现在又开始听见声音……而你本来还以为这会是一场普通的部署任务。现在你已经被卷进了某种东西里，而且看起来连死亡都救不了你。也许你唯一能做的就是继续查下去……又或者，你该试着向那道声音喊回去。你能听见它，它说不定也能听见你。

english: ***Confusion***
***Your choice is made***
chinese: ***你已做出选择***

english: Gotta play the game, I guess
chinese: 看来还是得老老实实玩游戏。

english: Escape from this place
chinese: 逃离这里

english: Complete the first quest in 20 skill categories:
chinese: 完成 20 个技能类别中的首个任务：
quest_name: The original purpose of this mod

english: Who's calculating this 'level' crap? I'm just trying not to die
chinese: 到底是谁在算这种“等级”？我只是想活下来而已。

english: So, you wish to work on the mental skills? What good is knowledge if it cannot be applied? Show me that you're going to be sticking around a while.
chinese: 所以，你想练精神技能？知识若不能派上用场，又有什么意义？先让我看看，你是不是真打算在这地方待上一阵子。

english: One with Tarkov
chinese: 融入塔科夫

english: I don't really know why you're staying. You're supposed to be escaping, right? Must be harder than it sounds...
chinese: 我还真不知道你为什么还留在这儿。你不是应该想办法逃出去吗？看来这事比说起来难多了……

english: Time to hit the gym!
chinese: 该去健身房了！

english: So, you wish to train your body? This only makes sense: Your mind may plan all it wants, it's not the thing physically being shot at. You need to be able to withstand merciless punishment if you want to survive in Tarkov. Well, you 'survive' regardless, but you know what I mean. If you want a healthy body, you need a place away from gunfire to train it. Construct yourself a nice gym, and use it.
chinese: 所以，你想锻炼身体？这倒说得通：你的脑子再会盘算，真正挨枪子的也不是它。想在塔科夫活下去，你的身体就得扛得住毫不留情的折磨。好吧，反正你总能“活下来”，但你懂我的意思。想练出一副好身板，就得有个不挨枪子的地方。给自己建个像样的健身房，然后用起来。

english: Workout
chinese: 锻炼

english: How was it? Feel the burn in your muscles? Good. Let us begin our physical training, then. Be warned, your body will be pushed to the absolute limits. Not that it will matter, if gunshot wounds don't stop you, I doubt anything will. Oh, also, I do NOT approve of the posters you put up...
chinese: 感觉怎么样？肌肉是不是烧起来了？很好。那么，我们的体能训练就正式开始了。先提醒你一句，你的身体会被逼到极限。不过这大概也无所谓，连枪伤都拦不住你，我怀疑也没什么能拦住。哦，对了，我可不认可你挂上的那些海报……

english: Enjoy your workout! (Use the Gym once)
chinese: 好好练一练！（使用健身房一次）

english: Can I call room service?
chinese: 我能叫客房服务吗？

english: Since it looks like you're going to be staying here for a while, you'll need a place to live, as well as a place to keep all that stuff you have. You found someplace already, no? You should put some effort into it. A home you love will love you back.
chinese: 既然看起来你还要在这里待上一阵子，就需要个住处，也需要地方放你那些东西。你不是已经找到地方了吗？该往里面多花点心思了。一个你真心喜欢的家，也会反过来照顾你。

english: Settling in
chinese: 安顿下来

english: Yeah, that little bunker is starting to look inhabitable! Keep working on it, you'll need it later.
chinese: 不错，那间小地堡开始像个能住人的地方了！继续收拾吧，你以后用得上。

english: Reach hideout management 4
chinese: 将藏身处管理提升到 4 级

english: Steel sights, steel bullets. ...they're lead? Darn.
chinese: 钢制瞄具，钢制子弹。……等等，是铅的？该死。

english: Being able to aim properly is probably the most important skill you can have here in Tarkov. Let's first get some practice with iron sights, since they're always going to be avalible.
chinese: 能否正确瞄准，大概是你在塔科夫最重要的本事。先拿机械瞄具练练手吧，毕竟这东西永远都用得上。

english: Iron vision
chinese: 铁瞄之眼

english: Good shooting! Let's get you something fancier now
chinese: 枪法不错！现在给你整点更高级的。

english: Kill 10 enemies with only iron sights
chinese: 仅使用机械瞄具击杀10名敌人

english: If the sight is a 1x sight, why does my vision scope in? Tarkov is a weird place
chinese: 如果这是1倍瞄具，为什么我视野还是会拉近？塔科夫真是个怪地方。

english: 1x sights may not give you better range, but you'll get a much clearer picture of your target, allowing for much easier aim and recoil control. Find one you like and use it as much as you can!
chinese: 1倍瞄具未必能让你打得更远，但能让你更清楚地看见目标，瞄准和控后坐也会轻松不少。找个你顺手的，尽量多用。

english: Reflexive aim
chinese: 反射瞄准

english: Do you prefer reflex or holographic sights? Personally, I'm more of a reflex sight guy, I like the little dots over the bigger designs of holographics. Both have their perks though, don't let me sway you either way.
chinese: 你更喜欢反射式还是全息瞄具？我个人更偏反射式，喜欢那个小点，不太喜欢全息那么大的图形。不过两种都有各自的优势，别因为我一句话就站队。

english: Kill 30 enemies with 1x sights
chinese: 使用1倍瞄具击杀30名敌人

english: Twice the range, twice the killing
chinese: 双倍距离，双倍杀伤。

english: 2x sights are a great choice for those quasi-close quarters engagememts. It's a shame only two of them made their way to Tarkov. Oh well. Let's make this one a bit more interesting, try putting a bit of distance between you and your opponent.
chinese: 2倍瞄具很适合那种半近不近的交火。可惜塔科夫里总共也就那么两款。算了，这次来点更有意思的，尽量和对手拉开距离。

english: Double trouble
chinese: 双重麻烦

english: Did you end up liking either of the two? If you didn't, you never have to use them again.
chinese: 最后你喜欢上那两款里的哪一个了吗？要是都不喜欢，以后也不用再碰。

english: Kill 30 enemies over 20 meters away with 2x sights
chinese: 在20米外使用2倍瞄具击杀30名敌人
quest_name: BONUS QUEST: Too much challenge (Combat tier 3)

english: I mean, it's kind of aiming.
chinese: 其实，这也算一种瞄准。

english: All this time holding the gun steady in front of your face... it's not the only way to shoot. In fact, it's not always the best way to shoot. Sometimes it's better if you know where your bullets are gonna go without looking through a sight. Let's see if your point fire is as good as your aimed fire.
chinese: 你一直把枪稳稳举到眼前……但射击可不只有这一种方式。事实上，它也不总是最好的方式。有时候，不看瞄具也知道子弹会飞到哪，反而更有效。让我看看你的腰射是不是和瞄准射击一样可靠。

english: Doing the opposite
chinese: 反其道而行

english: Ah, so you are actually pointing your gun in the right spot. Very good.
chinese: 啊，原来你真的知道枪口该指哪。很好。

english: Kill 40 enemies while hip / point firing
chinese: 以腰射击杀 40 名敌人

english: looooooooooooooooooooooooooooong range
Tarkov is quite a big place, don't you think? Plenty of areas have vast landscapes as far as the eye can see. There's plenty of land for a large scope to look over.
chinese: 塔科夫挺大，对吧？很多地方一眼望去都是开阔地形。这样的地盘，正适合让高倍率瞄具发挥作用。

english: All-seeing
chinese: 洞悉一切

english: Did you find some good spots for LDS?
chinese: 找到几个适合远射的位置了吗？

english: Kill 50 enemies over 70 away with 6x+ sights
chinese: 在70米外使用6倍及以上瞄具击杀50名敌人

english: Anything full auto is good with me
chinese: 只要能全自动，我都喜欢。

english: Assault rifles are the most plentiful catagory of weapons in Tarkov, and more seem to be getting shipped in. They're also the most balanced, being usable in any distance. That means, if you have to pick one type of weapon to use, assault rifles makes the most sense. Let's get you started.
chinese: 突击步枪是塔科夫里数量最多的一类武器，而且看起来还在不断有新货运进来。它们也是最均衡的一类，什么距离都能用。也就是说，如果你只能选一种武器来打，突击步枪最合适。先从这个开始吧。

english: Commence the Assault
chinese: 发起突击

english: They're good, right? It's a shame they're usually on the expensive side.
chinese: 不错吧？可惜这类枪通常都不便宜。

english: Kill 20 enemies with an Assault Rifle
chinese: 使用突击步枪击杀20名敌人

english: Biggest target, best chance to hit
chinese: 目标越大，越容易命中。

english: You seem pretty interested in assault rifles, eh? Let's make sure you know where to shoot. Center mass is going to be your best bet with AR's, unless you're confident in your headshots. Don't bother with the limbs, and try to avoid flesh ammo for this.
chinese: 你看起来挺喜欢突击步枪啊？那就先确认你知道该打哪。除非你对自己的爆头很有把握，否则瞄准身体中心永远是最稳的选择。别去管四肢，这种任务也尽量别用肉伤弹。

english: Cutting through the middle
chinese: 直取中路

english: Was armor giving you a lot of trouble? Ammo matters more than guns here. Make sure what you're loading up can pierce medium armors!
chinese: 护甲让你很头疼？在这里，子弹比枪更重要。记得装上去的弹药至少得能穿中甲！

english: Kill Knight with a SCAR-H, MDR 7.62, MK47, OR MCX-SPEAR 6.8
chinese: 使用 SCAR-H、MDR 7.62、MK47 或 MCX-SPEAR 6.8 击杀 Knight

english: I know some good places to do this.
chinese: 我知道几个适合做这个的地方。

english: The best thing about assault rifles is that they are useful in almost every situation. Excluding the extreme ranges, you will find your rifle able to stand its ground anywhere. You're probably used to medium range, so let's see how you do in close and long range.
chinese: 突击步枪最强的一点，就是几乎任何场合都能派上用场。只要不是极端距离，你的步枪在哪都站得住脚。中距离你大概已经习惯了，那就让我看看你在近距离和远距离打得怎么样。

english: The most versatile weapon class
chinese: 最全能的武器类别

english: Did you end up using full-auto for close, and semi-auto for long? Or maybe your favorite rifle is only semi auto!
chinese: 近距离你最后是用全自动，远距离改半自动了吗？又或者，你最爱的那把本来就只能半自动！

english: Land 30 headshots with an Assault Rifle
chinese: 使用突击步枪爆头 30 次

english: Kill 15 enemies within 15 meters with an Assault rifle.
chinese: 在15米内使用突击步枪击杀15名敌人

english: I'm taking his mask, as well...
chinese: 他的面具我也要拿走……

english: Surely you've run into the goons by now, right? That Knight guy is quite a boss, rushing without fear. Why don't you show him who's the real boss around here? Take him out, and use one of his own guns to do it.
chinese: 你肯定已经碰上那帮 Goons 了吧？那个叫 Knight 的家伙可真够像个头目，冲起来一点都不怕死。去让他见识一下，这地方真正的老大是谁吧。狠狠干掉他，而且得用他自己的那几把枪之一。

english: The Pawn takes the Knight
chinese: 兵吃掉 Knight

english: And the pawn moves D2 to take the knight!
chinese: 然后兵走到 D2，吃掉 Knight！

english: Well, that's a lot of work.
chinese: 这工作量可真不小。
quest_name: Master of firearms: Assault Rifles / Carbines

english: You won't believe how many of these things there are in Tarkov. They keep shipping new ones in too! I have to keep up with that if I can... why are there so many Kalashnikovs, anyways? Oh well. Since there's so many, let's group them up by caliber and fire modes. So, weapons that can ONLY do single fire will be separated from those that can do full auto. Ah, as a bonus, I want to see a couple extreme range kills as well as a few extremely close range kills.
chinese: 你绝对想不到塔科夫里这类东西有多少。而且新货还在不停往里送！我要是能跟上就好了……话说，为什么卡拉什尼科夫会有这么多种？算了。既然数量这么夸张，我们就按口径和射击模式来分。只能单发的，跟能全自动的分开算。哦，对了，顺便我还想看看几次极远距离击杀和几次贴脸击杀。
quest_name: Master of firearms: Assault Rifles / Carbines

english: Master of firearms: Assault rifles / Carbines
chinese: 枪械精通：突击步枪 / 卡宾枪
quest_name: Master of firearms: Assault Rifles / Carbines

english: You should be able to pick up any assault rifle you come across and use it like a master! Very good job.
chinese: 现在你应该能捡起任何一把突击步枪，像老手一样把它打明白了。干得漂亮。
quest_name: Master of firearms: Assault Rifles / Carbines

english: Kill 5 PMCs with semi-auto 5.45x39mm
chinese: 使用半自动 5.45x39mm 武器击杀5名PMC
quest_name: Master of firearms: Assault Rifles / Carbines

english: Powerful, accurate, can fire quickly... these are good.
chinese: 有威力，有精度，射速也够快……这东西不错。

english: Designated Marksman Rifles are a great hybrid weapon. You get most of the power of a bolt-action sniper rifle, and most of the versatility of an assault rifle. Let's get familiar with them, shall we?
chinese: 精确射手步枪是很优秀的混合型武器。你能拿到栓动狙击步枪的大部分威力，也能拿到突击步枪的大部分灵活性。来熟悉熟悉它们，怎么样？

english: Designating targets
chinese: 标定目标

english: Nice shots! The semi auto makes them a bit less desirable at close quarters, but the high damage and slow ammo consumption also makes it beneficial.
chinese: 枪打得不错！半自动让它们在近距离不算占优，但高伤害和低弹耗也确实有好处。

english: Kill 15 enemies with a DMR
chinese: 使用精确射手步枪击杀15名敌人

english: Gotta aim high...
chinese: 得往高处瞄……
quest_name: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.

english: Since DMRs fire high caliber rounds, you should only be shooting vitals. 2 to the thorax, or 1 to the head will put down most targets that aren't heavily armored. Show me you know where to aim!
chinese: 既然精确射手步枪打的是大口径弹，那你就该只瞄致命部位。打两发胸腔，或者一发头部，就足够放倒大多数没穿重甲的目标。让我看看你知不知道该瞄哪！
quest_name: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.

english: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.
chinese: 一枪穿心，怪你自己
quest_name: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.

english: Yeah, just like that. Keep doing that, you're gonna have an easy time.
chinese: 对，就是这样。继续这么打，你会轻松很多。
quest_name: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.

english: Kill Shturman with an SVDS or a G28
chinese: 使用 SVDS 或 G28 击杀 Shturman

english: Now how do I want to go about this...
chinese: 该怎么做比较好呢……

english: Marksman rifles assume there's a marksman in you... not only does this mean that you defeat your targets properly, but that you know when it is time to disengage. I have a special challenge for you: Kill a certain number of people in one raid, while staying below a damage threshold. You might want a secondary weapon to protect you on your way to extract once its done.
chinese: 既然叫精确射手步枪，那你就得有个射手的样子……这不光意味着你要把目标干净利落地解决，也意味着你得知道什么时候该脱离战斗。我给你个特别挑战：在单场战局内击杀指定人数，同时把伤害控制在阈值以下。等这事做完、往撤离点走的时候，你最好带把副武器防身。

english: Quality over Quantity
chinese: 重质不重量

english: Pretty good shooting there, friend. It's good for your bank account too, y'know. Less bullets used = less money spent.
chinese: 打得相当不错，朋友。对你的钱包也有好处，知道吧。子弹打得少，花的钱就少。

english: Land 75 shots on the thorax with a DMR
chinese: 使用精确射手步枪命中胸腔75次
quest_name: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.

english: Land 20 headshots with a DMR
chinese: 使用精确射手步枪爆头 20 次
quest_name: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.

english: Hate that guy...
chinese: 真讨厌那家伙……

english: If you want to be a good marksman, it might be worth taking a few notes from that guy watching over the sawmill in Woods. Why don't you go show him that you're better at spotting than he is?
chinese: 如果你想当个好射手，不妨从森林锯木厂那位看场子的家伙身上学几手。去让他见识一下，你在发现目标这件事上比他更强。

english: New park ranger
chinese: 新任护林员

english: Nice shots! The semi auto makes them a bit less desirable at close quarters, but the high damage and slow ammo consumption also makes it beneficial.
chinese: 枪打得不错！半自动让它们在近距离不算占优，但高伤害和低弹耗也确实有好处。

english: Where am I gonna get that MK-18?
chinese: 我上哪去弄那把 MK-18？
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Don't you wish there were more DMRs in Tarkov? Such a nice weapon type... oh well. Since there's so few, you gotta use each of them.
chinese: 你不觉得塔科夫里的精确射手步枪太少了吗？这么好的武器类型……算了。正因为数量少，你得把每一把都用一遍。
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)
chinese: 枪械精通：精确射手步枪（上）
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Nowhere is safe from your eye. Beautiful shooting, mate.
chinese: 在你的视野下，已经没有安全地带了。枪法真漂亮，伙计。
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Kill 15 PMCs with the HK G28
chinese: 使用 HK G28 击杀15名PMC
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Kill 15 PMCs with the M1A
chinese: 使用 M1A 击杀15名PMC

english: Kill 15 PMCs with the MK-18
chinese: 使用 MK-18 击杀15名PMC
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Kill 15 PMCs with the RSASS
chinese: 使用 RSASS 击杀15名PMC
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Kill 15 PMCs with the SR-25
chinese: 使用 SR-25 击杀15名PMC
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Kill 15 PMCs with the SVDS
chinese: 使用 SVDS 击杀15名PMC
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Kill 15 PMCs with the VSS
chinese: 使用 VSS 击杀15名PMC
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Lock and load.
chinese: 上膛，开火。

english: Some new LMGS around here recently, you noticed? High caliber as well, rather deadly... Why not learn how to use them?
chinese: 最近这附近多了几挺新轻机枪，你注意到了吗？还都是大口径，杀伤力不小……不如学学怎么用它们？

english: Suppressive fire
chinese: 压制火力

english: How's the weight? They really aren't being very truthful when they call it 'light', are they?
chinese: 重量感觉如何？它们自称“轻机枪”，可一点也不轻，对吧？

english: Kill 20 enemies with LMGs
chinese: 使用轻机枪击杀20名敌人

english: Das a lotta boolets
chinese: 这子弹可真不少。

english: You know what's great about an LMG? You can just keep firing that sucker. That means any place is good for shooting, cause they're gonna fall eventually. Go shoot a bunch of people. Cause it's fun. Or something. Who caused this, again? The fall of humanity has really led to some interesting places.
chinese: 你知道轻机枪最大的好处是什么吗？就是这玩意能一直喷。那就意味着，哪都能打，反正最后总会倒下。去狠狠干一票吧。因为很爽。或者别的什么。到底是谁把事情搞成这样的来着？人类的堕落还真把一切带到了有意思的地方。

english: Spray and pray
chinese: 扫射祈祷

english: 300 new holes were created. Do what you will with this information. Just know that He is watching.
chinese: 又多了300个新窟窿。随你怎么理解这个信息吧。只要记住，祂在看着。

english: Back when he was cool...
chinese: 那会儿他还挺酷的……

english: Have you ever tried mounting those things? They're so heavy, having something to rest is on should be quite useful to you... go give it a try.
chinese: 你试过把那些家伙架起来打吗？它们太重了，找个东西垫着对你肯定有用……去试试。

english: Tachanka style
chinese: Tachanka 风格

english: Much less recoil, less stamina usage... it does leave you stationary, but that's ok sometimes! Just hope they don't have a grenade and you're fine.
chinese: 后坐力小多了，体力消耗也更低……确实会把你钉在原地，但有时候这完全没问题！只要他们手里没雷，你就安全。

english: Kill 30 enemies while mounted with an LMG
chinese: 使用轻机枪在架枪状态下击杀30名敌人

english: I should bring proper ammo for this...
chinese: 这次得带点像样的弹药……

english: You know who else uses an LMG around here? Killa. That name is feared everywhere, so I've heard. You should have nothing to fear, being unable to die. Go knock him out, with his own weapon.
chinese: 你知道这附近还有谁在用轻机枪吗？Killa。听说这个名字到哪都让人害怕。可你没什么好怕的，反正你也死不透。去狠狠干掉他，用他自己的武器。

english: Shopping for stripes
chinese: 去拿条纹

english: The shops of the Interchange mall are much safer now. He'll be back though, just like you. Isn't it weird how they seem to 'respawn' as well? Quite a cursed game someone is playing here in Tarkov.
chinese: 立交桥商场里的店铺现在安全多了。不过他还会回来，就像你一样。说来也怪，他们看起来也会“重生”，不是吗？在塔科夫，好像有人在玩一场被诅咒的游戏。

english: Kill 20 PMCs with the M60(E4 or E6)
chinese: 使用 M60（E4 或 E6）击杀20名PMC
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Gonna need a lot of big bullets for this
chinese: 这任务得耗掉一堆大口径子弹。
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Can you believe how few LMGs there are in Tarkov? I thought more would have arrived by now... I suppose there's 6, now. You know what that means, though... gonna be using each one quite a lot. Also, you should utilize mounting some more. See if you can find some good spots for it!
chinese: 你能信塔科夫里的轻机枪居然这么少吗？我本来以为现在应该更多了……不过眼下也有6挺了。你知道这意味着什么吧……每一挺你都得用上不少次。另外，你也该多利用一下架枪。看看能不能找到几个合适的点位！
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns
chinese: 枪械精通：轻机枪
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: You really know how to lock it down, well done! Defense is yours
chinese: 你已经很懂怎么把阵地锁死了，干得漂亮！防线归你了。
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Kill 20 PMCs with the PKM
chinese: 使用 PKM 击杀20名PMC
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Kill 20 PMCs with the PKP
chinese: 使用 PKP 击杀20名PMC
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Kill 20 PMCs with the RPD
chinese: 使用 RPD 击杀20名PMC
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Kill 20 PMCs with the RPDN
chinese: 使用 RPDN 击杀20名PMC
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Kill 20 PMCs with the RPK-16
chinese: 使用 RPK-16 击杀20名PMC
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: hehehehehehehe
chinese: 嘿嘿嘿嘿嘿嘿嘿嘿

english: I don't care for melee weapons. They don't do you much good here, for some reason. Apparently stabbing someone in the face is only a minor inconvinence to them, and they're not much payoff. However, you're also choosing to do this, so whatever. Go stab three people, you psychopath.
chinese: 我对近战武器没什么兴趣。也不知道为什么，在这里它们对你帮助不大。照理说一刀捅脸上也只是让对方稍微不舒服一下，而且回报也不高。不过这也是你自己选的，那就随你。去捅死三个人吧，你这疯子。

english: Stab stab stab
chinese: 捅捅捅

english: You've been chopped.
chinese: 你把人剁了。

english: Kill 3 enemies with a melee weapon
chinese: 使用近战武器击杀3名敌人

english: Poor guys
chinese: 那些家伙要倒霉了。

english: Actually getting a melee is extremely tricky, unless you have the armour of a battleship, or you can disable your enemy. Luckily, you can disable your enemy.
chinese: 想真用近战砍到人其实难得很，除非你穿着跟战列舰一样厚的护甲，或者你能让敌人失能。好消息是，这一点你做得到。

english: Taking advantage
chinese: 趁势而上

english: That's the best strategy if you're going to melee. Keep doing that.
chinese: 想玩近战，这就是最稳的法子。继续保持。

english: Melee 4 enemies that are stunned by a flash grenade.
chinese: 近战击杀 4 名被闪光弹震晕的敌人

english: Sounds good to me
chinese: 听起来没问题。

english: The only place that's going to be any use to melee someone is the head. Go bonk someone on the head a few times.
chinese: 近战想打出效果，最有用的部位就是头部。去照着脑袋狠狠干几下。

english: Right in the noggin
chinese: 正中脑门

english: That's how you do it. Good bonking
chinese: 这就对了。敲得漂亮。

english: Hit an enemy in the head with a melee weapon 10 times
chinese: 使用近战武器命中敌人头部 10 次

english: Might be a bit more difficult. I'll bring plenty of stun grenades
chinese: 这次可能会难一点。我得多带几颗闪光弹。

english: Time to have some fun with it, eh? Make sure you get a couple real guys as well.
chinese: 该认真玩玩近战了，嗯？别忘了顺手收拾几个真正的对手。

english: Slice and dice
chinese: 砍瓜切菜

english: Alright, Jack, that's enough. Only one last thing to do.
chinese: 行了，Jack，差不多了。只剩最后一件事。

english: Kill 10 enemies with melee
chinese: 使用近战武器击杀 10 名敌人

english: Kill 3 PMCs with melee
chinese: 使用近战武器击杀 3 名 PMC

english: A dance with the devil, eh?
chinese: 与恶魔共舞，是吧？

english: You're still working on your melee weapons, are ya? Well then, allow me to give you the biggest challenge I can give. There is a boss here in Tarkov that also uses a melee weapon. I'm sure you know who it is. I learned something, if you can kill him with a melee weapon, you'll be able to take his hammer. How's that sound?
chinese: 你还在练近战，是吧？那我就给你来个最难的。塔科夫有个也用近战武器的首领，你肯定知道是谁。我打听到一件事，如果你用近战武器干掉他，就能把他的锤子带走。听着怎么样？

english: Dance with the devil
chinese: 与恶魔共舞

english: Very impressive! Enjoy the new hammer, Jack. Though something that rips would be more your style, eh? Ah well. (WARNING: You normally do not have access to this hammer, so while it *technically* works, your character model will freak out and the 'stab' attack does not work. It's really fun though, and holding it actually gives you a speed boost for some reason. Use at your own risk!)
chinese: 真够惊人的！好好享受你的新锤子吧，Jack。虽说按你的风格，能撕碎人的家伙可能更适合你，嗯？算了。（警告：正常情况下你是拿不到这把锤子的，所以虽然它*严格来说*能用，但角色模型会抽风，而且“突刺”攻击无效。不过它确实很好玩，而且拿在手里还会莫名其妙给你加移速。风险自负！）

english: Kill Tagilla with a melee weapon
chinese: 使用近战武器击杀 Tagilla

english: Short kings represent
chinese: 小家伙也有小家伙的牌面。

english: Pistols aren't the best choice for most situations, especially if you seperate pistols and revolvers. However, their small size means you can bring one in addition to a main weapon without any issue. They are also quite cheap, and are found frequently. Let's make sure that you'll be able to switch to an effective weapon.
chinese: 手枪在大多数情况下都不是最佳选择，尤其是把手枪和左轮分开算的时候更是如此。不过它体积小，带主武器的同时再塞一把也没压力。它们也便宜，还经常能捡到。得确保你切出来的时候，它能真正派上用场。

english: Small guns are still lethal
chinese: 小枪一样致命

english: Always remember: Switching to your sidearm is faster than reloading
chinese: 记住：切换到副武器永远比换弹快。

english: Kill 5 enemies with pistols
chinese: 使用手枪击杀 5 名敌人

english: Hmmm... HP, or AP?
chinese: 嗯……带 HP 还是 AP？

english: Pistols aren't that great for killing, but they're great for softening up targets, crippling them, leaving then vulenrable for you to finish off later. That being said, any bullet to a head will do just fine. Let's try shooting head, thorax, and legs with these.
chinese: 手枪拿来收人头不算强，但很适合先把目标打残、打瘸，给后续补刀做准备。当然，子弹打进头里照样好使。先拿它练练头、胸和腿吧。

english: Softening
chinese: 先打残

english: As you can see, no pistol is effective against medium-high armor, except maybe the 5-7 with the best ammo... but legs can't be armored, making them a great target. The exception to this rule is the Glock18C, which spits out bullets so ungodly fast that it just kinda works anyways. Watch the recoil!
chinese: 看到了吧，面对中高等级护甲，几乎没有哪把手枪真能打得动，也许顶级弹的 5-7 勉强算一个……不过腿可穿不了护甲，所以那儿永远是好目标。这条规矩的例外是 Glock 18C，那东西泼子弹快得离谱，硬是也能打出效果。小心后坐力！

english: I own a musket for home defense, actually...
chinese: 说起来，我还真有把火枪专门留着看家……

english: You really shouldn't be using a pistol beyond close range. Pistols aren't designed for that. Really, they are a self defense weapon in CQB situations. Let's see if you can use it as intended.
chinese: 手枪真不该拿去打远距离，它本来就不是干这个的。说到底，这就是 CQB 环境下的自卫武器。看看你会不会按它的本意来用。

english: Self-defense
chinese: 自卫

english: Works pretty well up close, right? To be fair, almost anything does... Oh well.
chinese: 贴脸挺好用吧？说实话，这距离下几乎什么都好用……算了。

english: Land 10 headshots with pistols
chinese: 使用手枪爆头 10 次

english: Land 40W thorax shots with pistols
chinese: 使用手枪命中胸腔 40 次

english: Land 50 leg shots with pistols
chinese: 使用手枪命中腿部 50 次

english: Good thing he doesn't wear armor.
chinese: 好在他不穿护甲。

english: There's no boss in Tarkov that 'uses' a pistol, but there is a boss that has one. A golden one, in fact. Show him that the pistol is better without the greed infused into it, will you?
chinese: 塔科夫没有哪个首领是靠手枪吃饭的，但确实有个首领身上带着一把。还是金的。让他见识见识，没有贪欲加持的手枪反而更好使，怎么样？

english: Vanity
chinese: 虚荣心

english: Well done! I think Jaeger will want that golden pistol, if you grabbed it.
chinese: 干得漂亮！要是你把那把金手枪带出来了，我看 Jaeger 会想要的。

english: Kill Reshala with the TT (cannot be the Gold varient)
chinese: 使用 TT 击杀 Reshala（不能是金色版本）

english: I sure hope I find PMCs without helmets, because some of these pistols are gonna suck to use...
chinese: 我只希望碰上的 PMC 都别戴头盔，这里面有些手枪用起来可太折磨了……

english: Ooooo, so you still want to improve your pistol skill??? Sounds good to me. How about 5 with each one? Little less than the others, being a sidearm and all that. ...Eh, group all those semi-auto 9x19s together. Use them at point-blank instead.
chinese: 哦？你还想继续精进手枪技术？？？正合我意。那就每把来 5 个，毕竟只是副武器，要求比别的少一点。……算了，那些半自动 9x19 手枪就并成一组吧，贴脸用。

english: Master of firearms: Pistols
chinese: 枪械精通：手枪

english: Very well done!! Your ability with pistols is unlike any other. And you even got one with the toy gun? How on earth did you manage that?
chinese: 干得非常漂亮！！你用手枪的本事已经无人能比了。你居然连那把玩具枪都杀到一个？你到底怎么做到的？

english: Kill 5 PMCs with the APB or APS
chinese: 使用 APB 或 APS 击杀 5 名 PMC

english: Kill 5 PMCs with the 5-7
chinese: 使用 5-7 击杀 5 名 PMC

english: Kill 15 PMCs with semi-auto 9x19 pistols
chinese: 使用半自动 9x19 手枪击杀 15 名 PMC

english: Kill 5 PMCs with the Glock 18C
chinese: 使用 Glock 18C 击杀 5 名 PMC

english: Kill 5 PMCs with the M1911A1
chinese: 使用 M1911A1 击杀 5 名 PMC

english: Kill 5 PMCs with the M45A1
chinese: 使用 M45A1 击杀 5 名 PMC

english: Kill 5 PMCs with the PB
chinese: 使用 PB 击杀 5 名 PMC

english: Kill 5 PMCs with the PM or PM (t)
chinese: 使用 PM 或 PM (t) 击杀 5 名 PMC

english: Kill 5 PMCs with the SR-1MP
chinese: 使用 SR-1MP 击杀 5 名 PMC

english: Kill 5 PMCs with the TT (either one)
chinese: 使用任意 TT 击杀 5 名 PMC

english: Kill 5 PMCs with the USP.45
chinese: 使用 USP.45 击杀 5 名 PMC

english: Kill an enemy with the Blicky (Might wanna hurt them first...)
chinese: 使用 Blicky 击杀 1 名敌人（最好先把他打残……）

english: Kill 5 PMCs with the .357 Desert Eagle
chinese: 使用 .357 Desert Eagle 击杀 5 名 PMC

english: Kill 5 PMCs with a .50 AE Desert Eagle
chinese: 使用 .50 AE Desert Eagle 击杀 5 名 PMC

english: on his hip
chinese: 就挂在腰间。

english: Revolvers are an interesting weapon for sure. They're the size of a pistol, but most pack the punch of a sniper rifle. The cost is, well, literal monetary cost, as well as recoil and ammo capacity. Every shot counts here!
chinese: 左轮手枪确实是种有意思的武器。体积和手枪差不多，但大多数都有接近狙击步枪的威力。代价嘛，不只是价签上的价格，还有后坐力和弹容量。这里每一发都得算数！

english: Big iron
chinese: 大铁炮

english: Nice aim! Make sure you're hitting important places, not much worth in shooting the arms here or legs here.
chinese: 枪法不错！记得瞄准要害，打手打腿在这活儿上可没多大意义。

english: Kill 10 enemies with a revolver
chinese: 使用左轮手枪击杀 10 名敌人

english: Happy to take him out, actually
chinese: 说真的，我还挺乐意收拾掉他的。

english: Due to low ammo capacity, you really have to hit important stuff with revolvers. You should only be aiming for the head and thorax, you don't have enough ammo to kill quickly through the flesh, even with specialized ammo.
chinese: 左轮手枪装弹量低，所以你真得打中要害。目标只该是头部和胸腔。就算用了专门的弹药，你也没有足够的子弹靠打肉慢慢磨死目标。

english: Between the eyes (and the lungs)
chinese: 眉心之间（还有肺）

english: Yep, that's about it. See ya.
chinese: 对，大概就是这样。回见。

english: Kill Gluhar with the Rsh-12
chinese: 使用 RSh-12 击杀 Gluhar

english: Hurray, a somewhat fun quest!
chinese: 总算来了个还算有点意思的任务。

english: You know those old western movies where they just take the revolver right out of the holster and fire without hardly aiming. Yeah, it's kinda cool, kinda silly. But 'point firing' is actually a very useful thing. Revolvers seem like a good thing to practice with! ...Hey, speaking of cowboy movies...
chinese: 你知道那些老西部片吧，左轮刚从枪套里拔出来，几乎不瞄就直接开火。挺帅，也挺傻。不过“腰射”这东西其实很有用。左轮看起来正适合拿来练手！……嘿，说到牛仔电影……

english: Aiming? What for?
chinese: 瞄准？何必呢？

english: It's highhhhh noon. Actually, it's probably midnight. You're playing Tarkov, admit it.
chinese: 正午时分到了啊啊啊。其实多半是半夜。你在玩塔科夫，承认吧。

english: Land 15 headshots with revolvers
chinese: 使用左轮手枪命中头部 15 次

english: Land 30 thorax shots with revolvers
chinese: 使用左轮手枪命中胸腔 30 次

english: Happy to take him out, actually
chinese: 说真的，我还挺乐意收拾掉他的。

english: You know the military reserve base, correct? There's this squad of guys that acts like they own the place, it's kind of annoying. Put a round through him, make sure he remembers it when he respawns.
chinese: 你知道储备站吧？那儿有支小队，真把那地方当自己家了，挺烦人的。给他们老大来上一枪，让他下次重生的时候还记得你。

english: Reserved for him
chinese: 给他留的一发

english: Well done! He'll be keeping an eye out for you from now on, that's for sure.
chinese: 干得好！他以后肯定会盯着你不放，这点没跑了。

english: Kill 10 enemies with revolvers while wearing the Kinda Cowboy hat
chinese: 佩戴 Kinda Cowboy 帽时，使用左轮手枪击杀 10 名敌人

english: This makes the third quest in Tarkov that requires cowboy hats. Interesting.
chinese: 这已经是塔科夫里第三个要戴牛仔帽的任务了。有点意思。

english: This likely isn't your first T5 weapon challenge, so I'll spare you the details. I'm gonna let you off easy on the 200ds here, but to make up for it, I expect very high kill counts for the RSh-12, got it?
chinese: 这大概不是你第一次做 T5 武器挑战了，细节我就不赘述了。CR 200DS 这次我放你一马，但作为补偿，RSh-12 的击杀数我可要得很高，明白吗？

english: Master of firearms: Revolvers
chinese: 枪械精通：左轮手枪

english: Master of the sidearms! Great job.
chinese: 副武器大师！干得漂亮。

english: Kill 5 PMCs with the CR 200DS
chinese: 使用 CR 200DS 击杀 5 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the CR 50DS
chinese: 使用 CR 50DS 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 30 PMCs with the RSh-12
chinese: 使用 RSh-12 击杀 30 名 PMC

english: One of the more satisfying weapon catagories
chinese: 这是最解压的武器类别之一。

english: Despite how big Tarkov is, there's still plenty of buildings and other small areas. If you want to dominate CQC, shotguns are the way to go. Slugs, buckshots, flechettes, plenty of ammo choices, all extremely deadly. Don't forget that you're locked in single fire!
chinese: 塔科夫虽然很大，但建筑和狭小区域还是很多。想统治近距离战斗，霰弹枪就是正解。独头弹、霰弹、箭镞弹，弹药选择多，而且都很致命。别忘了，这东西通常只能一发一发地打！

english: Pump it up
chinese: 拉泵开打

english: Do you prefer pump actions or semi-autos? Pump action is more satisfying, but semi-auto is more effective.
chinese: 你更喜欢泵动式还是半自动？泵动更带劲，但半自动更有效。

english: Kill 15 enemies with shotguns
chinese: 使用霰弹枪击杀 15 名敌人

english: Gonna shred some folks
chinese: 准备把人打成筛子。

english: Shotguns are great because just about everywhere you can shoot will be effective one way or another. Legs will chew through quickly, but plenty of ammo will also get through any armor just by breaking it down. The only real 'bad' place to shoot is the arms, it just doens't do enough damage. Practice shooting everywhere but the arms (you'll probably hit the arms anyways, going for thorax)
chinese: 霰弹枪的好处在于，基本打哪儿都有效。打腿能很快啃掉血量，大量弹丸也能靠持续削甲穿过任何护甲。唯一真正不该打的地方就是手臂，伤害实在不够。练练除了手臂以外的部位吧（不过你瞄胸的时候多半还是会打到手臂）。

english: Shoot 'em everywhere (but the arms)
chinese: 哪儿都能打（除了手臂）

english: Shotguns are deadly, aren't they? They're vicious, even at medium ranges. Keep aiming in that middle third, and you'll be all good.
chinese: 霰弹枪够狠吧？中距离都照样凶。继续瞄着中间那一带打，你就没问题。

english: Kill Tagilla with the Saiga-12
chinese: 使用 Saiga-12 击杀 Tagilla

english: Those poor plates.
chinese: 那些可怜的护甲板。

english: Shotguns are great because just about everywhere you can shoot will be effective one way or another. Legs will chew through quickly, but plenty of ammo will also get through any armor just by breaking it down. The only real 'bad' place to shoot is the arms, it just doens't do enough damage. Practice shooting everywhere but the arms (you'll probably hit the arms anyways, going for thorax)
chinese: 霰弹枪的好处在于，基本打哪儿都有效。打腿能很快啃掉血量，大量弹丸也能靠持续削甲穿过任何护甲。唯一真正不该打的地方就是手臂，伤害实在不够。练练除了手臂以外的部位吧（不过你瞄胸的时候多半还是会打到手臂）。

english: The grinder
chinese: 绞肉机

english: Nicely done! Most slugs aren't too effective against armour, but some buckshot and especially the flechette rounds just disentegrate it.
chinese: 干得漂亮！大多数独头弹对护甲不算高效，但有些霰弹，尤其是箭镞弹，拆甲速度快得离谱。

english: Land 15 headshots with shotguns
chinese: 使用霰弹枪命中头部 15 次

english: Land 150 thorax or stomach shots with shotguns (each pellet counts!)
chinese: 使用霰弹枪命中胸腔或胃部 150 次（每颗弹丸单独计算！）

english: Land 300 leg shots with shotguns (each pellet counts!)
chinese: 使用霰弹枪命中腿部 300 次（每颗弹丸单独计算！）

english: That's a lot of health to chew through with a shotgun...
chinese: 拿霰弹枪去啃那一大条血量啊……

english: That factory is quite the death trap, isn't it? Nowhere to hide, all close quarters, and the boss there is an absolute menace with his Saiga-12.    ...hmm... what if you became the boss of factory?
chinese: 那座工厂简直是个绞肉机，不是吗？没地方躲，全是近距离战斗，而且那里的老大拿着 Saiga-12 简直凶得离谱。……嗯……要不你来当工厂的老大？

english: Bringing the facility back online
chinese: 让工厂重新运转

english: You da real boss now! Good stuff, man. Own that factory
chinese: 现在你才是真老大！干得漂亮，把那座工厂拿下。

english: 155 with the 155... oh, I have to use all of them? Oh well.
chinese: 153 和 155 算一起……等等，我得把所有的都用一遍？行吧。

english: Alright, you know what to do. Every shotgun. Paint the world red. Let's get 15 with each, alright? Hmm... You can combine the 153 and 155, I don't mind. And just get 5 on the toz. Shred some armour for me in the meantime! Watching numbers go up is fun, for some reason.
chinese: 好，你知道该干什么。每一把霰弹枪都得上。把世界染红。每把给我打 15 个，行吧？嗯……153 和 155 可以合并算，我不介意。TOZ 打 5 个就行。顺手再帮我拆点甲！看着数字往上涨，不知怎么就挺开心的。

english: Master of firearms: Shotguns
chinese: 枪械精通：霰弹枪

english: Truly an artist, you are! You are the master of shotguns
chinese: 你真是个艺术家！你就是霰弹枪大师。

chinese: 使用 KS-23M 击杀 15 名 PMC

chinese: 使用 M590A1 击杀 15 名 PMC

chinese: 使用 MP-133 击杀 15 名 PMC

chinese: 使用 IMI UZI（非 PRO）击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Sarah Michelle Gellar? Oh, Sub Machine Gun, ok.
chinese: SMG？我还以为你在说什么人名。哦，原来是冲锋枪。

english: Submachine guns are an excellect choice for Tarkov. They are perfect for close quarters, yet can perform decently at medium range. They aren't great for armor penetration, but their high fire rate makes up for it. Depending on the SMG, the recoil can range from rough to non-existent. Good luck!
chinese: 冲锋枪是塔科夫里很优秀的选择。它们近距离表现完美，中距离也还能打。穿甲不算强，但高射速足以弥补。不同 SMG 的后坐力从有点难压到几乎没有不等。祝你好运！

english: Sub machine guns aren't sub-par
chinese: 冲锋枪一点都不差

english: How's it feel? Small, hopefully controllable, easy to handle, it's a great to shoot. It's a shame it doesn't do as much damage, though.
chinese: 感觉怎么样？枪小、好压、好操控，打起来确实舒服。可惜伤害还是差了点。

english: Kill 15 enemies with submachine guns
chinese: 使用冲锋枪击杀 15 名敌人

english: Fast fire rate, fast completion
chinese: 射速快，做起来也快。
quest_name: Sweep the legs, or drill the chest

english: Sub machine guns, with maaybe the exception of the P90, are pretty weak against any high level armour. That means leg shots are going to be the main source of killing when it comes to these things. However, not everyone has good armour, and even those with good armour still have holes in that protection, so thorax shots are perfectly fine as well. And of course, a few headshots never hurt. Get on it.
chinese: 冲锋枪嘛，P90 也许勉强算例外，但对高等级护甲普遍都偏弱。所以用这类武器杀人，主打还是打腿。不过也不是人人都穿好甲，就算穿了，防护也总有空子可钻，所以打胸也完全可以。当然，再来点爆头就更好了。动手吧。
quest_name: Sweep the legs, or drill the chest

english: Sweep the legs, or drill the chest
chinese: 扫腿，或者打胸
quest_name: Sweep the legs, or drill the chest

english: Good recoil control. Legs are pretty easy to munch through with the right stuff, eh?
chinese: 后坐力控制不错。只要子弹对路，腿还是很好啃的，对吧？
quest_name: Sweep the legs, or drill the chest

english: Kill Sanitar with SPECIFICALLY the Kedr-B (others will not count!)
chinese: 必须使用 Kedr-B 击杀 Sanitar（其他武器不计数！）

english: Fast fire rate, fast completion
chinese: 射速快，做起来也快。

english: So, truly... if you're using an SMG, you're most likely going for the legs. Yes, there are a few exceptions that can deal with mid-level armour, but you're going for the squishy bits most of the time. You know a place that can't be armoured (for some reason)? Yep, same as last time. Knock 'em over!
chinese: 说真的……你要是用冲锋枪，多半就是冲着腿去的。是，有少数例外能对付中等级护甲，但大多数时候你瞄的还是那些软组织。你知道哪个地方永远穿不了甲吗？对，还是老地方。狠狠干翻他们。

english: I said sweep those legs!
chinese: 我说了，扫腿！

english: Good recoil control. Legs are pretty easy to munch through with the right stuff, eh?
chinese: 后坐力控制不错。只要子弹对路，腿还是很好啃的，对吧？

english: Land 10 headshots with SMGs
chinese: 使用冲锋枪命中头部 10 次
quest_name: Sweep the legs, or drill the chest

english: Land 80 thorax shots with SMGs
chinese: 使用冲锋枪命中胸腔 80 次
quest_name: Sweep the legs, or drill the chest

english: Land 150 leg shots with SMGs
chinese: 使用冲锋枪命中腿部 150 次
quest_name: Sweep the legs, or drill the chest

english: I don't think I want to know.
chinese: 我觉得我还是别知道得太多为好。

english: That Sanitar guy... man. You have not seen what he has done, let me tell you. Normally, these boss hunting missions are just a fun challenge, but this... I need you to put this guy down. I know he'll revive, he always does, but put him down anyways. His... 'work' on God's creations are unholy. Kill him with his own gun, I want him to remember this.
chinese: 那个叫 Sanitar 的家伙……唉。你是没见过他都干了些什么，我跟你说。平时这些猎杀首领的任务也就是图个挑战，可这次不一样……我要你狠狠干掉他。我知道他之后还会活过来，他总会的，但你还是得狠狠干掉他。他对上帝造物做的那些……“研究”，简直亵渎。用他自己的枪杀了他，我要让他记住这次。

english: Machine to the medic
chinese: 给医生来一梭子

english: Thank you. I know he'll be back, but, I'm glad we could at least do that.
chinese: 谢谢你。我知道他还会回来，但至少这次我们做到了。

english: 9x19=190, no prob- Oh wait, nevermind.
chinese: 9x19=190，轻轻松松……啊等等，算了。

english: Haven't had enough yet? Alright, let's see you use a lot of those SMGs on the real guys then! I won't be too picky on similar smgs, but I want you to obliterate every leg that isn't your own.
chinese: 还没杀够？行，那就让我看看你拿这些冲锋枪去对付真人吧！同系列冲锋枪我不会卡得太死，但我要你把除了你自己以外的每一条腿都打烂。

english: Master of firearms: SMGs
chinese: 枪械精通：冲锋枪

english: Master of the SMGs! That was quite a lot of PMC kills, well done. Take a break.
chinese: 冲锋枪大师！这可是相当多的 PMC 击杀，干得漂亮。休息一下吧。

english: Kill 10 PMCs with any MP5
chinese: 使用任意 MP5 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the MP7 (A1 OR A2)
chinese: 使用 MP7（A1 或 A2）击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with either MP9
chinese: 使用任意 MP9 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the MPX
chinese: 使用 MPX 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the P90
chinese: 使用 P90 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the PP-19-01
chinese: 使用 PP-19-01 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the PP-9 Klin
chinese: 使用 PP-9 Klin 击杀 10 名 PMC

chinese: 使用 PP-91 Kedr 或 Kedr-B（91-01）击杀 10 名 PMC

chinese: 使用 PPSh-41 击杀 10 名 PMC

chinese: 使用 Saiga-9 击杀 10 名 PMC

chinese: 使用 SR-2M 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the STM-9
chinese: 使用 STM-9 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the UMP-45
chinese: 使用 UMP-45 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the Vector .45
chinese: 使用 Vector .45 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the Vector 9x19
chinese: 使用 Vector 9x19 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Slow and steady
chinese: 稳着来。

english: Bolt action Sniper rifles are the most deadly single-shot weapons in existance when it comes to small-arms. Their downside, obviously, is a heavy, very slow-firing, low-capacity weapon, where one shot makes or breaks it. Let's do a fun challenge this time: You have to hit headshots for this task. Aim high!
chinese: 栓动式狙击步枪是轻武器里最致命的单发武器。缺点也很明显：又重、射速又慢、弹容量还低，一枪打不好就全完。这次来点有意思的：这个任务里，你得打头。瞄高点！

english: Click-Clack
chinese: 咔嗒咔嗒

english: How are bolt-actions feeling for ya? It's pretty hit or miss with people... no pun intended.
chinese: 栓狙用着感觉如何？很多人对它都是又爱又恨……没别的意思。

english: Kill 8 enemies with headshots with sniper rifles
chinese: 使用狙击步枪爆头击杀 8 名敌人

english: They are long range, to be fair.
chinese: 毕竟这本来就是远射武器。

english: One to the head, two to the thorax. Which will it be? Headshots are more important... but thorax will hurt them badly.
chinese: 一枪头，两枪胸。你选哪种？爆头当然更关键……但胸口来一下也够他们受的。

english: One or two?
chinese: 一枪还是两枪？

english: Clean shots, man! Good job.
chinese: 枪法真干净，伙计！干得不错。

english: Snipe Birdeye with an M700 or Sako TRG
chinese: 使用 M700 或 Sako TRG 狙杀 Birdeye

english: I prefer one, but sometimes two is all you can do.
chinese: 我更喜欢一枪，但有时候也只能补第二枪。

english: Sniper rifles are entirely built for extreme distances. While it's still a large bullet that will hurt like heck at close range, they are meant to be accurate and deadly at ranges that no other weapon can compete in. I'll calculate some shots for you, let's build up a distance. (Explanation of this task: The distance between you and the enemy you shoot will be added to the counter. The further you are from your enemy, the faster you will complete this challenge!)
chinese: 狙击步枪就是为极远距离打造的。子弹在近距离照样疼得要命，但它真正的价值，是在其他武器根本够不到的距离上依旧精准致命。我来替你算算这些射击距离，把总数堆起来。（任务说明：你与被击中敌人之间的距离会累加到计数中。离敌人越远，这个挑战完成得就越快！）

english: The distance between us
chinese: 你我之间的距离

english: Clean shots, man! Good job.
chinese: 枪法真干净，伙计！干得不错。

english: Land 20 headshots with sniper rifles
chinese: 使用狙击步枪命中头部 20 次

english: Land 15 thorax shots with sniper rifles
chinese: 使用狙击步枪命中胸腔 15 次

english: What a cheater...
chinese: 这家伙也太像开挂了……

english: You're run into the Goons already, correct? That one guy, who makes no noise when he runs... he confuses me. You're a better sniper than him, show him that no audio won't save him.
chinese: 你已经碰上那帮 Goons 了，对吧？那个跑起来一点声音都没有的家伙……我真搞不懂他。你比他更像个狙击手，去让他明白，没脚步声也救不了他。

english: Hawk-eye
chinese: 鹰眼

english: Very well done! That's not easy to do. Another death for that goon
chinese: 干得非常漂亮！这可不容易。那个 Goon 又死了一次。

english: 80 kills... I only need 80 shots. Eh, maybe 85.
chinese: 80 个击杀……我只需要 80 发子弹。嗯，也许 85 发。

english: Alright, sniper. Here's your final challenge: 10 PMC kills with every sniper you can find in Tarkov. Headshots aren't required, but I recommend them. Also, I want to see how much distance you can gather doing this... steady your aim, friend.
chinese: 好吧，狙击手。最后的挑战来了：用塔科夫里你能找到的每一把狙击步枪，各杀 10 名 PMC。不是非得爆头，但我建议你这么干。还有，我想看看你在这过程中能攒出多少射击距离……稳住准星，朋友。

english: Master of firearms: Sniper rifles
chinese: 枪械精通：狙击步枪

english: Very well done! You are now the master of the sniper rifles. Go on, marksman!
chinese: 干得非常漂亮！你现在已经是狙击步枪大师了。去吧，神射手！

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the AXMC or Sako TRG
chinese: 使用 AXMC 或 Sako TRG 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the DVL-10
chinese: 使用 DVL-10 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the M700
chinese: 使用 M700 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the Mosin (Infantry OR Sniper varient)
chinese: 使用莫辛步枪（步兵型或狙击型）击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the MP-18
chinese: 使用 MP-18 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the SV-98
chinese: 使用 SV-98 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the T-5000
chinese: 使用 T-5000 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Kill 10 PMCs with the VPO-215
chinese: 使用 VPO-215 击杀 10 名 PMC

english: Hit 'em with the layup
chinese: 给他们来个抛投。

english: Grenades can be a complete game changes, if you use them correctly. Lethal grenades, unsuprisingly, are great for blowing up your enemies. Let's try that, shall we?
chinese: 手雷用得对，能直接改写战局。杀伤手雷嘛，不出意外，就是拿来把敌人炸上天的。来试试吧，如何？

english: Hot potatoes
chinese: 烫手山芋

english: Nice throw! Let's keep working on that.
chinese: 这一下扔得不错！继续练。

english: Kill 3 enemies with grenades
chinese: 使用手雷击杀 3 名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with impact grenades
chinese: 使用碰炸手雷击杀 5 名敌人

english: Quite a rude way to kill someone, tbh
chinese: 说实话，这死法挺缺德的。

english: You know what's even better than a grenade? An impact grenade. They detonate the moment they land, meaning that there's absolutely nothing your enemy can do to escape it, assuming you throw it correctly. Go give it a try.
chinese: 你知道比普通手雷更狠的是什么吗？碰炸手雷。它一落地就爆，只要你扔得准，敌人根本没机会躲。去试试。

english: No escape
chinese: 无处可逃

english: Good throwing, man! Now let's swap to tacticals
chinese: 扔得不错，伙计！接下来换战术手雷。

english: Nevermind, that's more rude.
chinese: 算了，这更缺德。

english: Tactical grenades might not be able to kill an enemy outright, but it can leave them as good as dead. A good flash grenade on an enemy completely ruins them. Kill 5 enemies that can't see you.
chinese: 战术手雷未必能当场炸死敌人，但也能让他们跟死人没区别。一个好闪足够把人彻底废掉。去杀 5 个什么都看不见的家伙。

english: Dazed and Destroyed
chinese: 晕头转向

english: On the bright side (heh), you probably took them out with a headshot, so they didn't feel much pain. I hope you took them out with a headshot, anyways...
chinese: 往好处想（呵），你多半是一枪爆头带走的，所以他们应该没怎么受苦。我希望你确实是一枪爆头带走的……

english: Kill 5 stunned enemies
chinese: 击杀 5 名被震晕的敌人

english: Time for a little testing. With explosives.
chinese: 该做点测试了。带爆炸的那种。

english: Lethal grenades have various fuses. Some are shorter, some are longer. Short fuses are great for suprising an enemy with a quick grenade, leaving little room for them to leave. Longer fuses are great for throwing further and bouncing around things. The M67 in partiuclar is great for baiting, as the long fuse time makes it more difficult to kill outright but will still force the enemy out. Try out the different fuse times and see what works best for you.
chinese: 杀伤手雷的引信长短各不相同。有的短，有的长。短引信适合快速出手，打敌人一个措手不及，让他们几乎没时间跑；长引信则更适合远投和反弹。尤其是 M67，很适合拿来钓人，长引信虽然不容易直接炸死人，但照样能把人逼出来。试试不同的引信时间，看看哪种最适合你。

english: Fusing together
chinese: 引信学

english: Did you end up preferring the shorter or longer fuses? Both have their strengths and weaknesses, and are highly contextual.
chinese: 最后你更喜欢短引信还是长引信？两种都有各自的长处和短板，得看场合。

english: Kill 3 enemies with grenades that have a fuse shorter than 3 seconds
chinese: 使用引信短于 3 秒的手雷击杀 3 名敌人

english: Kill 3 enemies with grenades that have a fuse longer than 3 seconds
chinese: 使用引信长于 3 秒的手雷击杀 3 名敌人

english: Kill an enemy with the M67
chinese: 使用 M67 击杀 1 名敌人

english: Something about lamb sauce...
chinese: 总觉得该来一句羊排酱在哪……

english: You know what time it is! Time to kill PMC with every thing in it's catagory! But you can't really kill people with flash grenades... hmm, oh well. Just kill some stunned PMCs.
chinese: 你知道现在是什么时间了！是时候把这一类里的每样东西都拿来杀 PMC 了！不过闪光弹确实不太好直接拿来杀人……嗯，算了。那就去杀几个被震晕的 PMC 吧。

english: Hell's kitchen
chinese: 地狱厨房

english: Gordon Ramsey is pleased... ahem. You're clearly quite good with grenades. Keep using them effectively now that your training is done!
chinese: 戈登·拉姆齐会满意的……咳。你显然很会用手雷。训练结束了，之后也继续好好发挥吧！

english: Kill 3 PMCs with the F-1
chinese: 使用 F-1 击杀 3 名 PMC

english: Kill 3 PMCs with the M67
chinese: 使用 M67 击杀 3 名 PMC

english: Kill 3 PMCs with the RDG-5
chinese: 使用 RDG-5 击杀 3 名 PMC

english: Kill 3 PMCs with the RGN
chinese: 使用 RGN 击杀 3 名 PMC

english: Kill 3 PMCs with the RGO
chinese: 使用 RGO 击杀 3 名 PMC

english: Kill 3 PMCs with the VOG-17
chinese: 使用 VOG-17 击杀 3 名 PMC

english: Kill 3 PMCs with the VOG-25
chinese: 使用 VOG-25 击杀 3 名 PMC

english: Kill 7 stunned PMCs
chinese: 击杀 7 名被震晕的 PMC

english: I think there are going to be some casualties in the weapons department by the end of this.
chinese: 到最后，武器库里估计得报废几把枪。

english: Troubleshooting is a lifesaving skill when you're in trouble. The quicker you can identify what's wrong and fix it, the higher chance you can survive a malfunction. You can just run guns that are max durability... but that can get expensive. Besides, if you ever have to pick up a gun, that's likely not going to be at full durability. This is also why it's important to play smart no matter what, as you never know when something can go wrong. Though, if something is to go wrong, you need to know what to do about it. Prove to me you can clear a malfunction.
chinese: 武器排障是关键时刻能救命的本事。你越快判断出问题、越快把故障排除，卡壳时活下来的机会就越大。你当然也可以只用满耐久的枪……但那可不便宜。再说了，真要临时捡别人一把枪来用，那把枪多半也不是满耐久。这也是为什么不管什么时候都得打得聪明点，因为你永远不知道枪会在什么时候出岔子。不过真出了问题，你得知道该怎么处理。证明给我看，你能排除一次故障。

english: Your gun has an issue
chinese: 你的枪出故障了

english: Did that malfunction happen before or after you got the kill? See, it can happen any time, and it's extremely problematic. Working on this skill is a very good idea.
chinese: 那次故障是在你拿到击杀前还是后？看吧，这种事随时都可能发生，而且特别要命。练这个本事很有必要。

english: Clear any malfunction once
chinese: 排除任意武器故障 1 次

english: My poor firearms
chinese: 我可怜的枪。

english: Now that you've experienced a malfunction, let's talk about how it actually happens. There's a few different sources, but the worst offender is supressors. Some play nice with a gun, others really increase the wear and tear of a firearm. Go use the latter ones, and see what I mean.
chinese: 既然你已经体验过故障了，那我们就来说说它到底是怎么来的。原因有不少，但最容易惹事的就是消音器。有些和枪配得不错，有些却会大幅增加武器磨损。去用后者，你就明白我的意思了。

english: Understanding the common cause
chinese: 了解常见诱因

english: See? Even after just a couple hours, your firearm needs some repairing now.
chinese: 看吧？才过几个小时，你的枪就得修了。

english: This seems tedious
chinese: 这也太磨人了。

english: You can clear a malfunction from your favorite gun, sure. What about others? You can't use the same firearm the whole time, at least, with those traders forcing you to do a bunch of different stuff. Can you clear jams from other weapon types?
chinese: 你当然能排掉自己最喜欢那把枪的故障。那别的呢？你不可能一直只用同一把武器，至少那些商人整天逼你干各种活时做不到。别的武器类型卡壳了，你也能处理吗？

english: Should've gotten the extended warrenty
chinese: 早该买延保了

english: How about that, you can! Good, you should be surviving just fine now.
chinese: 看吧，你能做到。很好，这下你应该能活得更久了。

english: This thing is going to explode in my hands, I can just feel it...
chinese: 这玩意儿感觉随时会在我手里炸开……

english: Dust covers, suppressors, magazines... there's plenty of things that affect the durability burn and chance of malfunction. What if we combined all three of them at once? I want to show you how much these can affect the performance of a rifle..
chinese: 机匣盖、消音器、弹匣……能影响耐久燃烧和故障率的东西可不少。那如果三样一起上呢？我要让你亲眼看看，它们能把一把步枪的性能糟蹋成什么样。

english: That poor AKM
chinese: 可怜的 AKM

english: See how bad that is for the gun? You gotta be careful what you're putting on, or taking off, your firearms.
chinese: 看到了吧？这对枪有多伤。往枪上装什么、拆什么，你都得小心。

english: Kill 10 enemies in one raid using an AKM that has no dust cover, a suppressor with >+70 durability burn, and a magazine with high or very high malfunction chance.
chinese: 在单场战局内使用无机匣盖、装备耐久燃烧 >+70 的消音器，且弹匣故障概率为高或极高的 AKM 击杀 10 名敌人

english: Even at 0 durability??? Noted...
chinese: 0 耐久也不会？？？记下了……

english: You know what's kinda funny? There are actually a few weapons in Tarkov that can't malfunction under any circumstance. The PPSH-41 is a shining example, but some other guns exist that will never break in this place. Go run around with them for a while as your final task.
chinese: 说来挺有意思，塔科夫里还真有几把武器，在任何情况下都不会出故障。PPSh-41 就是最典型的例子，另外还有几把枪，在这地方永远不会罢工。最后一个任务，拿着它们出去跑一阵子。

english: Those that never fail
chinese: 那些永不故障的

english: See? The accuracy decreases, sure, but they make great choices when you can't afford weapon repairs or just want to be sure that you can go for a long time with no issues.
chinese: 看吧？精度是会掉没错，但在你修不起枪，或者就是想稳稳打很久的时候，它们还是很好的选择。

english: Kill 100 enemies with weapons that cannot suffer jams (PPSH, MP18, MP43, revolvers, and LMGs [except the RPK-16!])
chinese: 使用不会卡壳的武器击杀 100 名敌人（PPSH、MP-18、MP-43、左轮，以及轻机枪〔RPK-16 除外！〕）

english: Playing on easy mode today.
chinese: 今天开简单模式。

english: Underbarrel Grenade launchers are a fantastic, albiet it very expensive, way of getting a pretty free kill on an enemy. The impact explosion and propelled nature means no one is safe from an instant death. Have fun with this one!
chinese: 下挂榴弹发射器是种非常好用，虽然也很烧钱的轻松击杀手段。碰炸加推进发射的特性意味着，没人能真正躲过这一下秒杀。好好享受吧！

english: Noob tube!
chinese: 小白炮！

english: Boom! Those things are nasty, aren't they? Let's keep using them.
chinese: 砰！那玩意儿够恶心吧？继续用。

english: Kill 5 enemies with underbarrel grenade launchers.
chinese: 使用下挂榴弹发射器击杀 5 名敌人

english: Someone's getting blown up today. I really hope it's not me. I guess I'll just try again if it's me... weird how that works
chinese: 今天总有人要被炸上天。希望不是我。要真是我，大不了再来一遍……这机制还真怪。

english: I know the M32A1 isn't an UNDERBARREL grenade launcher, but it's a grenade launcher, ok? And it's what Mr. Big Pipe uses. You know how these go by now, you gotta do it with his own weapon. Go explode that guy straight to the next life, literally
chinese: 我知道 M32A1 不是下挂榴弹发射器，但它也是榴弹发射器，好吗？而且那正是 Big Pipe 用的家伙。规矩你现在也懂了，得用他的武器送他上路。去把那家伙直接炸去下辈子吧，字面意义上的。

english: The bigger pipe
chinese: 更大的管子

english: He's gonna take a while to respawn, that's for sure. Nice shot.
chinese: 这次他肯定得多等一阵子才会复活。打得漂亮。

english: Kill Big pipe with the M32A1 MSGL grenade launcher
chinese: 使用 M32A1 MSGL 榴弹发射器击杀 Big Pipe

english: Seems a bit excessive, but I agree, they are annoying
chinese: 是有点夸张，但我同意，他们确实烦。

english: The sniper scavs are quite annoying, right? They're just always there, no matter how many times you've cleared that sniper nest, they're back every raid. I don't know what's up with death not affecting Tarkov like it should. On the bright side, killing is now quite morally ambiguous! Anyways, see if we can send somewhat of a message to them. Take out 10 of them with your grenade launcher.
chinese: 狙击Scav 很烦，对吧？不管你把那几个狙击点清掉多少次，他们每局都会回来。我也搞不懂，为什么死亡在塔科夫里就跟没后果一样。往好处想，现在杀人这件事在道德上就有点模糊了！总之，看看能不能给他们留个教训。用你的榴弹发射器狠狠干掉 5 个。

english: Questionable countermeasures
chinese: 可疑的反制手段

english: You're getting pretty good at aiming with these things. Let's try even further out, alright?
chinese: 你用这东西瞄得越来越好了。来，试试更远的。

english: Kill 5 sniper scavs with UBGLs
chinese: 使用下挂榴弹发射器击杀 5 名狙击 Scav

english: Gonna need a ruler or something for this one.
chinese: 这次得拿把尺子了。

english: So, you've seem how the grenades are propelled, yes? You know what that means... they can go quite a long distance. I want 10 kills over 100 meters away. Aim very high.
chinese: 你已经见识过榴弹是怎么被发射出去的了，对吧？那你该明白这意味着什么……它能飞得很远。我要你在 60 米外完成 10 次击杀。把抛物线抬高点。

english: Artillery strike
chinese: 炮击

english: Quite impressive! Those were really difficult shots, great aim.
chinese: 相当厉害！这些都是真难打的射击，准头不错。

english: Kill 10 enemies over 60 meters away with UBGLs
chinese: 使用下挂榴弹发射器在 60 米外击杀 10 名敌人

english: I mean... alright.
chinese: 行吧……

english: You're gonna need a lot of grenades for this one. For your final challenge, I want you killing 8 enemies with your UBGL. ...You've already done more than that? Oh, silly! You have to do it in one raid! Enjoy!
chinese: 这次你得带上不少榴弹。最后的挑战，我要你用下挂榴弹发射器击杀 8 名敌人。……你说你早就杀过不止 8 个了？哦，傻瓜！得在同一场战局里完成！玩得开心。

english: One man army
chinese: 一人成军

english: There's gonna be a lot of little bits lying around for a while... Good stuff, soldier.
chinese: 接下来地上得散落不少碎块了……干得好，士兵。

english: Kill 8 enemies in one raid with UBGLs
chinese: 使用下挂榴弹发射器在单场战局内击杀 8 名敌人

english: This sets a bad precedent...
chinese: 这可开了个坏头……
finish_summary: HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem

english: Paying attention is quite important to one's survival. I will say, though, I don't understand why attention in tarkov seems relegated purely to looting containers... oh well, if that's what the kids want, that's what we'll give em. Let's start with some technical components. Wires, PC parts, all that jazz. Search the PC blocks for them.
chinese: 想活下去，专注确实很重要。不过我是真不明白，为什么塔科夫里的“专注”几乎就等于翻箱倒柜……算了，既然大家都爱这套，那我们就按这套来。先从一些电子零件开始吧。电线、电脑配件，诸如此类。去搜搜那些电脑主机。

english: I won't complain about more ammo. That's a lot, though.
chinese: 有更多弹药我当然不嫌多，就是这数量也太离谱了。

english: All these tools and eletronical pieces are nice, but they won't really help you in a gunfight, will they? You need something more practical. Parts won't always solve a debate... bullets will. Hmmm... perhaps some packaged rounds will do you good? Better chance they aren't tampered with.
chinese: 这些工具和电子零件是不错，但真打起来，它们可帮不了你多少。你得来点更实在的东西。零件不一定能解决争端……子弹能。嗯……去弄点盒装弹药怎么样？至少被人动过手脚的概率更小。

english: Stockpile
chinese: 囤货

english: How many different calibers can you service with all that? The nice thing about this, as well, is that it's free. No need to spend thousands of roubles on these.
chinese: 有了这些，你能伺候多少种口径了？而且最好的一点是，这些都是白捡的，不用花上成千上万卢布。

english: Collect 50 boxes of ammo (don't open them!)

chinese: 一个天界存在刚给我来了一段 Geico 广告？这玩意到底什么来头？

english: Some items in Tarkov seem so expensive, don't they? Millions of roubles for one little device? That's the law of supply and demand in action. Why spend millions when you can spend a few minutes just finding the item yourself? You know, 15 minutes could save you 15% or more on-
chinese: 塔科夫里有些东西贵得离谱，不是吗？一个小玩意就值几百万卢布。这就是供需法则。既然花几分钟自己找出来就行，何必真掏几百万去买？你知道的，15 分钟就能帮你省下 15% 甚至更多。

english: Acquire 1000000 roubles
It always wraps back around to money, doesn't it...
chinese: 说来说去，最后还是绕回钱上了……

english: Now that you've gotten to know some people, you should make sure you can actually trade with them. You have some money by now, don't you?
chinese: 现在你也认识了些人，该确保自己真能跟他们做生意了。到这一步，你手里总该有点钱了吧？

english: Acquiring capital
chinese: 积累资本

english: Oh, good! You're not broke. Money is critical to survival, even if we wish it wasn't.
chinese: 哦，很好！你还没穷到见底。哪怕我们不愿承认，钱也是活下去的关键。

english: Acquire 1000000 roubles
Acquire 6000 euros
chinese: 拥有 6000 欧元

english: Acquire 6500 dollars
chinese: 拥有 6500 美元

english: I'm telling you, I don't want to work with this Jaeger guy, he makes me do weird stuff
chinese: 我跟你说，我真不想跟那个 Jaeger 打交道，他老让我干些怪事。

english: You've got the cash, you've got some allies, and they would love to sell to you. Guns, medicine, cases, so many things. Why not take advantage of this?
chinese: 你有钱，也有几个愿意跟你做生意的熟人，他们可巴不得把东西卖给你。枪、药、箱子，好东西一大堆。干嘛不利用起来？

english: Purchasing equipment
chinese: 购置装备

english: Earning cash, spending cash, earning more cash... what a cycle. *sigh*. Makes you
chinese: 挣钱、花钱、再挣钱……真是个循环。*叹气*。真让人……

english: Spend a total of 2 million currency on trades (USD and EUR convert to roubles)
chinese: 交易总消费达到 200 万（美元和欧元按卢布折算）

english: Spend ₽1M roubles
chinese: 消费 100 万卢布

english: Spend €6K Euros
chinese: 消费 6000 欧元

english: Spend $6.5K USD
chinese: 消费 6500 美元

english: How exactly am I meant to 'understand' a celestial being?
chinese: 我到底该怎么去“理解”一个天界存在？

english: So much money... where's all this stuff coming from anyways? I guess things keep respawning, so there's infinite wealth as long as you hang around. Well, lets push it to the limit.
chinese: 这么多钱……这些东西到底都是从哪来的？不过反正物资会不断刷新，只要你一直混在这儿，财富就是无限的。那就狠狠干到极限吧。

english: Breaking the bank
chinese: 豪掷千金

english: My, my! Seems like all the traders can't stop talking about you. And to see how much you've done with me is quite impressive.
chinese: 哎呀呀！看来所有商人都在念叨你。而且你跟我走到这一步，确实相当了不起。

english: Spend a total of 30 million currency on trades (USD and EUR convert to roubles)
chinese: 交易总消费达到 3000 万（美元和欧元按卢布折算）

english: Earn a total of 15 million currency from trades (USD and EUR convert to roubles)
chinese: 交易总收入达到 1500 万（美元和欧元按卢布折算）

english: I enjoyed killing the scavs, by the way
chinese: 顺带一提，杀 Scav 那段我还挺喜欢的。

english: 'Light, how are you supposed to train my intelligence? Are you going to have me read books or something?' Hahaha... that's a good idea, actually. But no, I have something much more exciting for you. Riddles! Oh yes, I'm serious. We'll begin easily. Prapor once had a friend, a friend he wouldn't tell you about unless you wacked some scavs. Or used your intelligence center to look it up. Don't do that here, by the way. You'll ruin the fun. Anyways, where did this friend live?
chinese: “光啊，你到底打算怎么训练我的智力？总不能真让我去读书吧？” 哈哈哈……其实这主意不错。但不，这次我给你准备了更刺激的东西。谜题！对，我是认真的。先来个简单的。Prapor 曾经有位朋友，除非你狠狠干掉一批 Scav，不然他是不会告诉你的。或者你也可以靠情报中心查出来。不过这次别这么干，会扫兴。总之，这位朋友住在哪儿？

english: The test begins
chinese: 试炼开始

english: He was a good friend, so I've heard.
chinese: 听说他是位不错的朋友。

english: Locate the spot of the riddle
chinese: 找到谜题所指位置

english: Are riddles customary with this thing?
chinese: 这玩意平时就爱出谜语吗？

english: There is something all humans need to live, more frequently than food, but less frequently than air. Somewhere, there is a large stash that one of your 'traders' took interest in. Where was this?
chinese: 有样东西所有人都得靠它活着，比食物更常需要，但又没空气那么频繁。某个地方有个大储藏点，你那些“商人”里有人曾对它很感兴趣。那地方在哪？

english: Thirsting for more
chinese: 越发口渴

english: Nice! Don't forget to stay hydrated, while you're at it.
chinese: 不错！顺便记得多补水。

english: Locate the spot of the riddle
chinese: 找到谜题所指位置

english: I choose what I'll use most, probably.
chinese: 多半还是选对我最有用的那边。

english: Alright, lets make things more difficult: In war, rarely is there a 'good' side. Sometimes, fighting for either side is wrong. Sometimes, fighting for either side is right. Sometimes, you get a choice which side you'll fight for. Sometimes, mass life or death hangs in the balance of one small thing: Who you tell. Do you do what is right? Is there a 'right?' Or do you tell the one who gives you the rewards you seek?
chinese: 好吧，来点更难的：战争里很少真有哪一边是“好的”。有时候，帮哪边都不对；有时候，帮哪边都说得过去。有时候，你甚至能自己选要站哪边。有时候，无数人的生死，就取决于一件小事：你把消息告诉谁。你会去做所谓正确的事吗？真有“正确”这回事吗？还是说，你会把消息交给那个能给你想要报酬的人？

english: Raising the stakes
chinese: 加大赌注

english: I am curious, who did you end up telling?
chinese: 我很好奇，你最后把消息告诉了谁？

english: Find the spot of the riddle
chinese: 找到谜题所指位置

english: No hints for the hard ones!
chinese: 难的也不给提示是吧！

english: In a place created for creation, where the hammer falls on the unforged and unfortunate, a crash is heard in the dead of night. Black grains in blue packages are hidden, and the one who mends the biological has paid the one who mends the material. Tell me, where were the black grains laid?
chinese: 在一处为创造而建的地方，铁锤落向尚未成形也不走运的人们；寂静深夜里，有坠落声响起。蓝色包装中的黑色颗粒被藏了起来，而修补血肉之人付钱给了修补器物之人。告诉我，那些黑色颗粒被放在了哪里？

english: Nearing the end
chinese: 接近尾声

english: That was a tough one, eh? Will the last one be tougher, or easier? I suppose it depends on how well you know your stuff.
chinese: 这题挺难吧？最后一题会更难，还是更简单？我想，这就得看你对这些事有多熟了。

english: Mark the spot of the riddle with a 7mm shell
chinese: 前往谜题所指的位置

english: No hints for the hard ones!
chinese: 难的也不给提示是吧！

english: Last one... let's make it difficult: Near the open sea, where the fish swam and the birds flew freely, Contract wars were waged. The sea, once cared for, now laps silently on the beach, and the wings no longer fly undisturbed. One bird, however, was determined to fly, but the eagles consumed the bird's attempt. Where does this bird lie?
chinese: 最后一题……来点难的：在临海之地，鱼儿曾自在游动，鸟儿也曾自由飞翔，而 Contract Wars 曾在那里爆发。那片海曾有人悉心照料，如今却只会沉默地拍打沙滩；那双翼也再难无忧无虑地翱翔。不过，有一只鸟仍执意起飞，结果它的尝试被鹰吞没了。告诉我，这只鸟落在何处？

english: The final riddle
chinese: 最终谜题

english: Well done! You really know how to think. Or you happened upon it by accident, in which case, booooo. Oh well. You made it this far, good job.
chinese: 干得好！你确实很会动脑子。或者你只是误打误撞找到了，那我可要喝倒彩了。算了，能走到这一步已经很不错。

english: Find the spot of the riddle
chinese: 找到谜题所指位置

english: I suppose it's a nice change of pace.
chinese: 换换口味倒也不错。

english: Look, I know that you pmcs normally train your perception by looting things, and that's fine. But I think we're both getting tired of just picking up items. I have you doing that enough for Attention and Search. So, let's do something more exciting for this one, alright? We'll work on hearing things and spotting things. First, let's do some spotting. Take out some enemies at medium range, lets say, 50m or longer.
chinese: 听着，我知道你们 PMC 平时都是靠捡东西来练感知，这没问题。但我觉得咱俩都已经有点受够了，只是一味捡东西而已。专注和搜索那边我已经让你捡得够多了。所以这次来点更刺激的，行吗？我们练练听觉和观察。先从观察开始吧，拿下一些中距离目标，就定 50 米以上。

english: Changing the rules
chinese: 改改规矩

english: Got a pretty good pair of eyes, eh? If only they could perceive the divine... oh well.
chinese: 眼神不错啊？要是它们也能看见神圣之物就好了……算了。

english: Kill 8 enemies at 50+ meters
chinese: 在 50 米以上击杀 8 名敌人

english: This one might actually benefit me
chinese: 这个任务说不定还真对我有用。
finish_summary: CounterCreator[Equipment; kills(target=Any,value=1,distance=40)] || CounterCreator[Equipment; kills(target=Any,value=1,distance=40)] || CounterCreator[Equipment; kills(target=Any,value=1,distance=40)] || CounterCreator[Equipment; kills(target=Any,value=1,distance=40)] || CounterCreator[Equipment; kills(target=Any,value=1,distance=40)] || CounterCreator[Equipment; kills(target=Any,value=1,distance=40)] || CounterCreator[Equipment; kills(target=Any,value=1,distance=40)] || CounterCreator[Equipment; kills(target=Any,value=1,distance=40)] || CounterCreator[Equipment; kills(target=Any,value=1,distance=40)] || CounterCreator[kills(target=Any,value=1,distance=40)]

english: Killing an enemy at long range ensures they never even hear you. But, you don't get to hear them either. Sometimes, there is no choice of long-range. You need to know how to out-hear your enemies.
chinese: 远距离击杀的好处，是他们甚至听不见你。但反过来，你也听不清他们。有时候你根本没得选，打不了远距离。你得学会在听觉上压过你的敌人。

english: Tuning the audio
chinese: 调校听觉

english: So, which headset did you like best? Could you tell the difference between each one, or did some feel the same?
chinese: 所以，你最喜欢哪款耳机？每一种的区别你都听出来了吗，还是有些感觉都差不多？
