english: Kill 3 enemies with the GSSh-01 headset
chinese: 佩戴 GSSh-01有源耳机击杀 3 名敌人

english: Kill 3 enemies with the MSA Sordin headset
chinese: 佩戴 MSA Sordin Supreme PRO-X/L有源耳机击杀 3 名敌人

english: Kill 3 enemies with the FAST RAC headset
chinese: 佩戴 Ops-Core FAST RAC 耳机击杀 3 名敌人

english: Kill 3 enemies with the Earmor M32 headset
chinese: 佩戴 Opsmen Earmor M32 耳机击杀 3 名敌人

english: Kill 3 enemies with the Comtac 2 headset
chinese: 佩戴 Peltor ComTac 2 耳机（橄榄绿）击杀 3 名敌人

english: Kill 3 enemies with the Comtac 4
chinese: 佩戴 Peltor ComTac IV Hybrid 耳机（棕褐色）击杀 3 名敌人

english: Kill 3 enemies with the Tactical Sport
chinese: 佩戴 Peltor战术运动型耳机击杀 3 名敌人

english: Kill 3 enemies with the Razor Digital headset
chinese: 佩戴 Walker's Razor 数字耳机击杀 3 名敌人

english: Kill 3 enemies with the XCEL 500BT
chinese: 佩戴 Walker's XCEL 500BT 数字耳机击杀 3 名敌人

english: ALL KILLS MUST BE WITHIN 40 METERS
chinese: 所有击杀都必须在 40 米内完成

english: Is this a blessing or a curse?
chinese: 这到底算祝福还是诅咒？

english: We just went and tested all the headsets avaliable in Tarkov. Now, let's see how you fair with the opposite: Sound reduction. Heavy helmets are great for blocking a few rounds, especially from most scavs, but they also block your hearing. Will you fair just as well?
chinese: 我们刚把塔科夫里能找到的耳机都试了一遍。现在来看看反过来的情况：听觉削弱。重型头盔很适合挡几发子弹，尤其是挡住大多数 Scav 的破枪，但它们也会把你的听觉一起压下去。这样你还能发挥得一样好吗？

english: Noise cancellation
chinese: 降噪

english: What do you think? Do you prefer the protection, or the hearing? Personally, I prefer the hearing. But then again, I need no protection where I'm at. The louder I can hear Him, the better.
chinese: 你觉得呢？你更看重防护，还是更看重听觉？我个人更偏向听觉。不过话说回来，在我这里可不需要什么防护。能更清楚地听见祂，对我来说就够了。

english: Kill 20 enemies within 50 meters while wearing a helmet with high sound reduction (check wiki for list)
chinese: 佩戴高听觉削弱头盔，在 50 米内击杀 20 名敌人（具体名单请查看 wiki）

english: Well, screw me I guess
chinese: 行吧，那我可真是倒了霉。

english: I think your hearing is just fine, let's conclude with something satisfying. You got some kills a medium distance a while ago, remember? But with scopes, even long distance can look like point blank range. So here's a challenge: I want you to kill someone that's further than 150 meters away from you. With only iron sights. Yep, no scopes, no reflex sights, no cheating by having iron sights equipped and welding a dovetail on the sight, just pure iron sights. Have fun!
chinese: 我看你的听觉已经够用了，那就用点过瘾的东西收尾吧。你之前已经打过几次中距离击杀了，记得吧？但只要上了镜，再远的距离看起来都像贴脸。所以这次给你个挑战：我要你只用机械瞄具，击杀一个离你 150 米以上的人。对，不能上倍镜，不能上反射镜，也别想着靠装着机械瞄具再焊个侧轨来钻空子，只能用纯机械瞄具。玩得开心。

english: Shot of the century
chinese: 世纪一枪

english: Wow. Just wow. I don't say this often, but I seriously wasn't expecting that. That's got to be the shot of the century or something.
chinese: 哇。真是……哇。我不常这么说，但这一下我是真没想到。这绝对算得上什么世纪一枪了。

english: Headshot an enemy over 150m away with iron sights.
chinese: 使用机械瞄具，在 150 米外爆头击杀 1 名敌人

english: Oh that's nice, the angel actually wants me to live.
chinese: 哦，真好，这位天使居然真想让我活着。

english: Endurance, perserverance... hmm... well
chinese: 耐力、毅力……嗯……好吧。

english: The human will to live
chinese: 人类的求生意志

english: Look at that, you can survive for more than 20 minutes!
chinese: 瞧瞧，你居然能活过20分钟了！

english: Survive 3 raids in a row (run through does not count, but won't reset)
chinese: 连续3次成功撤离（快速撤离不计入，但不会重置进度）

english: WHY?!? WHYYYYYY
chinese: 为什么？！为什么啊啊啊啊！

english: Some people just like watching counters go up. Kinda weird, isn't it? I don't quite get it, I think work is best when you can't see the results so obviously, or track it so meticulously. Well, that's what I'm having you do this time, I suppose. The good news is this one is easy! Just run around a lot.
chinese: 有些人就是喜欢看计数器一路往上涨。挺怪的，不是吗？我不太理解。我一直觉得，工作最好别那么直观地看到成果，也别追踪得那么细。不过这次我偏偏就是要你这么干。好消息是，这个很简单！多跑跑就行。

english: Marathon
chinese: 马拉松

english: Is Tarkov not a lovely place? I mean, everyone's killing each other, that ruins the tourism a bit. Or does it? You're here, haha. Anyways, it's a shame what happened. The beaches of Shoreline and Lighthouse, the shopping mall, the streets... so much destruction. Have you ever wondered if you could stop it, or are you only concerned about escaping?
chinese: 塔科夫其实也算个挺美的地方，对吧？当然，大家都在互相残杀，这对旅游业多少有点影响。或者也未必？毕竟你不还是来了，哈哈。总之，变成这样真可惜。海岸线和灯塔的海滩、购物中心、街道……到处都是破坏。你有没有想过，也许自己能阻止这一切？还是说，你只在乎逃出去？

english: Oh.
chinese: 哦。

english: What to do with your last endurance task... hmm... I suppose just 'enduring' in general works. Sound good? Alright, go get 100 of them, without dying. They can't only be scavs, by the way.
chinese: 你最后一个耐力任务该做点什么呢……嗯……干脆就考验“撑下去”本身吧。听起来不错？好，那就去干掉100个，期间别死。对了，不能全是Scav。

english: A life well spent
chinese: 此生不虚

english: Well, well... been a while since you died. What a mess you've made, though... eh, it all seems to reset anyways.
chinese: 哎呀……你已经很久没死过了。不过你弄出来的场面可真够乱的……唉，反正看起来一切最后都会重置。

english: Kill 100 enemies without dying
chinese: 在不死亡的情况下击杀100名敌人

english: 15 of them being PMCs
chinese: 其中15名必须是PMC

english: 3 of them being bosses (Each goon counts, but other guards don't)
chinese: 其中3名必须是首领（每个Goon都单独计算，其他护卫不算）

english: I don't think this will feel good
chinese: 这听起来肯定不会舒服。

english: What does it even mean to have 'health 0'? Whatever, let's fix that. I'm sure you've noticed that certain things happen to you sometimes when you're in combat. What happens if you're under an effect for a long time? Maybe you're looping painkillers, or you've got something you can't fix. Who knows?
chinese: “生命值归零”到底是什么意思？算了，先把这个搞明白吧。你肯定也注意到了，战斗时自己有时候会挂上一些状态效果。要是某种状态在你身上待太久，会怎么样？也许你一直在磕止痛药，也许你中了个一时半会儿治不好的效果。谁知道呢？

english: Are you feeling it now?
chinese: 现在有感觉了吗？

english: So, did you survive? Either way, I can see your body preparing for that situation again. You're getting 'healthier' or something. What? I'm not a doctor, I'm an angel. The human understanding of medicine confuses me anyways. It's seen as so important and lifesaving, yet you hide it behind massive paywalls? Whatever happened to caring for the sick and needy? *sigh*... I'm getting off topic. Make sure you complete your other physical trainings.
chinese: 所以，你活下来了？不管结果怎样，我都能看出你的身体已经在为那种情况做准备了。你变得“更健康”了之类的。怎么？我又不是医生，我是天使。反正人类对医学的理解一直让我很困惑。你们一边把它看得无比重要、能救人性命，一边又用高高的门槛把它挡起来？照顾病人和弱者这种事，后来都去哪了？*叹气*……我又跑题了。别忘了把其他体能训练也做完。

english: Have any status effect for 10 minutes
chinese: 处于任意状态效果下累计10分钟

english: Wait, doesn't this require me getting hurt a lot?
chinese: 等等，这不就意味着我得经常受伤吗？

english: Having a bunch of health effects is one thing. Do you know how to treat them? What do you do when you've been shot, arms broken, insides spilling outward? I mean, sure, you just die and come back, you always do. But what if you didn't die? Show me that you know how to use medicine. I do not care what kind of medicine, use whatever you fancy. Just make sure all your bases are covered.
chinese: 身上挂一堆状态是一回事，你会不会处理它们又是另一回事。中了枪，胳膊断了，内脏都快掉出来了，你会怎么做？当然，你总是死了又回来。但要是这次死不了呢？证明给我看，你会用药。我不在乎是什么药，爱用什么用什么，只要别有短板就行。

english: Medical Master
chinese: 医疗大师

english: You clearly know how to take care of yourself and respond to crisis. Good, good!
chinese: 你显然很会照顾自己，也知道该怎么应对危机。很好，很好！

english: Use any medical item (including stims) a total of 300 times
chinese: 累计使用任意医疗物品300次（包含兴奋剂）

english: Looks like I need to become a master of all trades
chinese: 看来我得样样精通才行。
finish_summary: Skill[Endurance; >=30] || Skill[Immunity; >=15] || Skill[Metabolism; >=50] || Skill[Strength; >=30] || Skill[StressResistance; >=20] || Skill[Vitality; >=20]

english: What is health by itself? Can you even be considered healthy if you can Endure nothing, if you have not the Strength to carry on? It's Stressful to think of not taking care of such Vital skills... ironic, considering I have full Immunity. Anyways, show me that you have properly Metabolized what you have been trained so far.
chinese: 光有健康算什么？如果你一点耐力都没有，没有继续走下去的力量，你还能算健康吗？想到不去照看这些关键技能，真让人压力山大……挺讽刺的，毕竟我可是完全免疫。总之，让我看看，你有没有把目前为止受过的训练都好好代谢进去。
finish_summary: Skill[Endurance; >=30] || Skill[Immunity; >=15] || Skill[Metabolism; >=50] || Skill[Strength; >=30] || Skill[StressResistance; >=20] || Skill[Vitality; >=20]

english: Unmatched Physique
chinese: 无双体魄
finish_summary: Skill[Endurance; >=30] || Skill[Immunity; >=15] || Skill[Metabolism; >=50] || Skill[Strength; >=30] || Skill[StressResistance; >=20] || Skill[Vitality; >=20]

english: Sheeeeeesh... you're the embodiment of health now, super soldier. Feels good, doesn't it? Feels like you can do anything. Just don't forget about the One who can truly do all things. Talk about being made in His image, though.
chinese: 嚯……你现在简直就是健康本身了，超级士兵。感觉不错吧？好像什么都做得到。只不过，别忘了那位真正无所不能的存在。不过话说回来，你还真有点“照着祂的形象所造”的意思了。
finish_summary: Skill[Endurance; >=30] || Skill[Immunity; >=15] || Skill[Metabolism; >=50] || Skill[Strength; >=30] || Skill[StressResistance; >=20] || Skill[Vitality; >=20]

english: Reach Vitality level 20
chinese: 活力达到20级

english: Reach Stress Resistance level 20
chinese: 抗压达到20级

english: Reach Strength level 30
chinese: 力量达到30级

english: Reach Metabolism level 50
chinese: 代谢达到50级

english: Reach Immunity level 15
chinese: 免疫达到15级

english: Reach Endurance level 30
chinese: 耐力达到30级

english: Maybe I should get these off a buyer... I don't think I want to risk being stabbed
chinese: 也许我该找人买这两样……我可不想真冒着被捅的风险。

english: I've heard a bit about biological warfare being used down there, but I'm not sure what exactly it is. I'm sure you've heard more, being down there in the middle of it. Can you acquire whatever instrument is being used to 'deliver' this toxin? If you know anything about a cure for it, I'd like to see that as well.
chinese: 我听说下面有人在用生化武器，但具体是什么我还不清楚。你人在风暴中心，知道的应该比我多。你能不能把那个用来“投送”这种毒素的东西弄来？如果你知道有什么解药，我也想看看。

english: Researching
chinese: 研究中

english: Were you able to get a fresh one? Ah, no worries, this stuff seems dangerous. I'll do some researching and find out what this is. Oh, you can keep the knife and antidote. I can't exactly take it from you, remember?
chinese: 你拿到新鲜样本了吗？啊，算了，这东西看着就危险。我来研究研究，弄清楚这到底是什么。哦，刀和解毒剂你自己留着吧。我也没法真从你手里把东西拿走，你还记得吧？

english: Hand over a cultist knife
chinese: 上交一把邪教徒之刃

english: Hand over an antidote
chinese: 上交一支xTG-12解毒剂

english: Great, I'm sure nothing can go wrong with this...
chinese: 真好，我确信这事绝对不会出任何问题……
finish_summary: CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem]

english: I've seen quite a lot of drugs show up in Tarkov recently, seems like Terragroup was busy in their experiments. I have a favor to ask... you wouldn't mind seeing what they do, would you? Y'know, empirically? You'll be fine, I think.
chinese: 最近塔科夫里冒出来不少药物，看样子 TerraGroup 没少做实验。我想拜托你一件事……你不介意亲自试试看它们都有什么效果吧？你懂的，实测一下。你应该没事……大概。

english: Why didn't we start with this idea?
chinese: 我们怎么没早点想到这个？

english: I feel a little bad about what I asked you to do last time... maybe we should just stick to the people that know about this. You have a medical professional here, correct?
chinese: 上次让你干那事，我多少还是有点过意不去……也许我们还是该找懂行的人。你们这儿有位医疗专业人士，对吧？

english: Knowing the professionals
chinese: 去问专业人士

english: So you do! Good, I don't think we'll need to do any more experiments with your body from now on. Sorry about that!
chinese: 看来还真有！很好，接下来应该不用再拿你的身体做实验了。抱歉啊！

english: Reach LL4 Therapist
chinese: Therapist信任度达到4级

english: I don't think this is how immunity works.
chinese: 我觉得免疫力不是这么练出来的。

english: Your immune system has gotten a lot stronger through all this! However, it's not the type of thing you 'want' to put to the test. So, let's eliminate the source of the toxin, shall we? Or, more accurately, eliminate those who seek to weaponize it. Those cultists interfere with my work anyways, worshipping whatever satanic deity they do. It probably is satan himself, from what I've seen of them. Two birds with one stone, eh?
chinese: 经过这一切，你的免疫系统已经强了不少！不过这种本事可不是拿来“想办法测试”的。所以，我们干脆把毒素的源头清掉吧？更准确地说，把那些想把它武器化的人清掉。那些邪教徒本来就老在妨碍我办事，去崇拜什么撒旦邪神。照我看，他们拜的多半真就是撒旦本人。一石二鸟，不是吗？

english: Immunity through extermination
chinese: 杀出来的免疫力

english: I'd love to say something like 'good job, you really messed them up!' but that didn't even leave a mark on their prescence. They're talking about you know, and seek your painful death, but that's about it. There will always be worshippers of evil, I suppose... I fear how many we see nowadays. Makes me thing the Lord's coming back is soon. Oh well. I'll let you know what we should do next.
chinese: 我真想说句“干得漂亮，你把他们狠狠干了一顿！”可那点损失甚至没在他们的存在上留下什么痕迹。他们现在倒是在谈论你，也想让你痛苦地死去，不过也就仅此而已。我想，邪恶的崇拜者总会有的……只是如今这数量让我害怕。总让我觉得，主再来的日子已经不远了。算了。下一步该做什么，我会再告诉你。

english: Kill 25 cultists
chinese: 击杀25名邪教徒

english: Am I seriously going through with this? This is going to be the most painful thing I've ever experienced.
chinese: 我真要这么干？这大概会是我这辈子最痛的一次。

english: Hey, so... I know I've said a lot about how we're not going to run experiments on your body anymore, and I meant that. I'm sorry in advance for what I have to ask of you next. You see, when a pathogen is in your body that your body doesn't like, it creates antibodies to fight it off. It also keeps a 'record' of the pathogen to be able to fight it off more effectively. The reason people keep getting sick from the 'same' sickness is because it mutates. However, I've noticed that whatever toxin those cultists have created, there's only one strain. It's one specific poison. ...I'm going to judge by the look on your face that you've figured out where this is going. I'm sorry, friend. 5 minutes should be long enough for your body to get enough information on it. Keep yourself alive, alright?
chinese: 听着……我知道我之前一直说，不会再拿你的身体做实验了，当时我是真这么想的。先跟你道个歉，接下来我要请你做的事会有点过分。病原体进到体内后，如果你的身体不喜欢它，就会制造抗体去对抗它。同时，它还会“记住”这种病原体，好让下次应付得更有效。人们之所以会反复得“同一种”病，是因为它会变异。不过我注意到，那些邪教徒搞出来的毒素只有一种毒株，就是同一种特定毒物。……看你这表情，我猜你已经知道我要说什么了。抱歉，朋友。5分钟应该足够让你的身体记住它。想办法活下来，好吗？

english: Ultimate Innoculation
chinese: 终极接种

english: Did it work? Oh, praise the Lord! You've built up a serious resistance to the pathogen by doing that, it should never be that bad again. It looks like you had strengthed your immune system enough before this that it had a much easier time fighting that. Did I mention you're the first person to survive that? Well done, well done! Celebrate with a few more cultist deaths for me, will ya? Hahahaha!!!
chinese: 成功了吗？哦，赞美主！你这么做之后，已经对那种病原体建立起很强的抵抗力，以后应该不会再严重成那样了。看起来也因为你之前把免疫系统练得够强，所以这次扛起来轻松得多。我说过吗？你是第一个在那玩意儿下活下来的人。干得漂亮，真漂亮！顺便再替我多杀几个邪教徒庆祝一下，怎么样？哈哈哈哈！！！

english: Survive a posioning for five minutes
chinese: 在中毒状态下存活5分钟

english: Consume some quality jerky
chinese: 吃一包塔克肉干

english: Consume a college student's meal (Instant noodles)
chinese: 吃一包大学生套餐（方便面）

english: This angel is starting to seem like the ghost of Jaeger future...
chinese: 这天使越来越像“未来的Jaeger幽灵”了……

english: You know those moments where you are just so exhausted, so low on energy, but you've gotta push just a liiiiittle bit longer? Yeah, that can happen in combat too. Will you be capable of shooting straight when you've got almost nothing left?
chinese: 你知道那种时候吧，累得要死，能量见底，却还得再硬撑那么一点点？对，战斗里也会这样。等你真快被榨干了，还能把枪打准吗？

english: Running on fumes
chinese: 油尽灯枯

english: So you can! Seems like there's nothing you can't do. Although, you have unlimited attempts, haha.
chinese: 看来还真行！好像已经没什么是你做不到的了。虽然你毕竟有无限次重来的机会，哈哈。

english: Kill an enemy while suffering from either exhaustion and dehydration
chinese: 在同时受到疲劳和脱水效果的情况下击杀1名敌人

english: I might gain some weight doing this
chinese: 照这么吃下去，我怕是要长胖了。

english: What was your favorite thing to eat before you got here? Is it something you could still find? I guess you don't get much choice about it anymore. You have to eat whatever you come across, don't you. You can eat anything, right? Except the mayo. Don't eat the mayo. That's just gross.
chinese: 来这里之前，你最爱吃什么？现在还能找到吗？不过我猜你现在也没什么挑的余地了。碰到什么就得吃什么，对吧。你什么都能吃，是吧？蛋黄酱除外。别吃蛋黄酱，那玩意太恶心了。

chinese: 喝一罐热棒

chinese: 吃一罐Humpback鲑鱼罐头

english: Consume some tea
chinese: 喝一罐冰绿茶

english: Consume the maximum energy drink
chinese: 喝一罐Max Energy能量饮料

english: Consume the saury
chinese: 吃一罐太平洋秋刀鱼罐头

english: Consume the Rat
chinese: 喝一罐六可乐

english: Consume some sprats
chinese: 吃一罐西鲱鱼罐头

english: Consume some squash (ew)
chinese: 吃一罐蔬菜泥（呃）

english: Consume soda
chinese: 喝一罐塔可乐

english: Consume a whole lot of water. Seriously how do you drink that in one go
chinese: 喝一瓶纯净水（说真的，你怎么一口气喝完的？）

english: Consume Emelya
chinese: 吃一包Emelya黑麦面包块

english: Consume EWR
chinese: 饮用EWR（应急用水）

english: Consume the Russain rations
chinese: 吃一份Iskra个人配给口粮

english: Consume the American rations
chinese: 吃一份MRE个人即食口粮

english: Consume an apple juice
chinese: 喝一盒苹果汁

english: Consume some grapefruit juice
chinese: 喝一盒西柚汁

english: Consume some milk (it's probably spoiled)
chinese: 喝一盒牛奶（大概已经坏了）

english: Consume some oat flakes
chinese: 吃一盒燕麦片

english: Consume some pineapple juice
chinese: 喝一盒Russian Army菠萝汁

english: Consume some sugar
chinese: 吃一包糖

english: Consume some multivitamin juice
chinese: 喝一盒Vita果汁

english: Consume some normal croutons
chinese: 吃一些普通黑麦面包块

english: Consume the delicous sausage
chinese: 吃一根咸狗牛肉肠

english: Consume the off-brand chocolate (Slickers)
chinese: 吃一根山寨巧克力棒（士腻架）

english: Is this a fight for my life, or a game of football?
chinese: 这到底是生死搏斗，还是橄榄球比赛？

english: A major sign of strength is lifting, right? I never quite understood what's so cool about it, but I suppose it has some advantages. Being able to drag your buddies out of fire, for example. Well, anyways, let's see where you are at the moment.
chinese: 力量最直观的体现不就是举东西吗？我一直没太明白这事到底哪里酷了，不过想来总有用，比如把你的同伴从火力下拖出来。总之，先让我看看你现在到什么程度了。

english: Deadlift
chinese: 硬拉

english: Found your limit? The good news is that it can only go up from here. Keep working!
chinese: 找到你的极限了吗？好消息是，从现在开始，它只会越来越高。继续练！

english: Achieve critical overweight in raid.
chinese: 在战局中达到严重超重状态。

english: Not the strangest thing you'll ask me to do, is it?
chinese: 这还不算你让我干过最离谱的事，对吧？

english: Look at you, putting on some muscle! I have a fun idea for you, a way to jump around like a little kid again. You see, there's a couple spots that require a certain 'strength level' to reach. Do you think you're there yet? Or do you need a while longer? Oh, and don't worry. IncreasedClimbHeight won't help you here. Uhm, you probably want a lighter kit as well... (TESTED AT STRENGTH 15 WHILE NOT OVERWEIGHT)
chinese: 看看你，肌肉都练出来了！我给你想了个有点意思的玩法，让你像小孩一样到处蹦跶。你看，有些地方得达到一定“力量等级”才能上去。你觉得自己现在够了吗？还是还得再练练？哦，对了，IncreasedClimbHeight 在这儿帮不上你。嗯，你最好也带轻一点的装备……（以力量15且未超重为标准测试）

english: Parkour
chinese: 跑酷

english: How about that? You made it there in the end. Good job, Mr. Monkey. The last challenge won't be so pretty.
chinese: 如何？最后还是上去了吧。干得不错，猴子先生。最后那项挑战可没这么体面。

english: Reach the top of the yellow bus in Scav Town on Woods
chinese: 登上森林 Scav Town 的黄色巴士顶

english: Reach the ladder on the red container of the scav tower on Woods
chinese: 到达森林 Scav Tower 红色集装箱上的梯子处

english: Reach the top of container/house 44 in the storage area on Customs
chinese: 登上海关仓储区44号集装箱/小屋的顶部

english: Reach the top of the left fuel tank in the row of 4 fuel tanks near construction on Customs
chinese: 登上海关施工区附近四个油罐中最左侧油罐的顶部

english: Nothing personal, kid
chinese: 没什么私怨，小子。

english: Alright, you want a really challenge? Those bosses around Tarkov, they seem pretty tough. Most got guards or heavy armour, better accuracy, more health... how does more health even work anyways? Ah well, you're gonna knock one down big time. Pick your favorite one around tarkov, and kill him with a melee weapon. Feel free to weaken him with bullets if you must, I'd recommend a flashbang as well, but the killing blow has to come from a melee weapon. Let's see you prove your strength.
chinese: 好吧，想来点真正的挑战？塔科夫这些首领看起来都挺硬。大多带着护卫、穿着重甲、打得更准、血还更多……话说，血更多这事到底是怎么实现的？算了。你去狠狠干倒一个。挑你最喜欢的塔科夫首领，用近战武器干掉他。实在不行，可以先用子弹把他打残，我还建议你带颗闪光弹，不过最后一击必须是近战。让我看看你的力量。

english: Gladiator
chinese: 角斗士

english: That look on your face... ...you enjoyed that, didn't you?
chinese: 看你那表情……你其实挺享受的，对吧？

english: Kill a boss with a melee weapon and survive the raid.
chinese: 用近战武器击杀1名首领并成功撤离。

english: But why?
chinese: 可为什么啊？

english: Pain is a hard sensation to override. It seizes control of you, it makes you want to curl up and hold the afflicted area tightly. Unfortunately, you find yourself in a situation where that will only lead to more pain, and then death. Well, whatever death means to you. It's bad regardless, so you need to learn to fight that sensation off.
chinese: 疼痛很难压下去。它会夺走你的控制，让你想蜷起来死死捂住伤处。可你现在的处境里，真这么做只会更痛，然后死。好吧，死对你来说到底算什么还是另说。总之结果都很糟，所以你得学会把这种感觉顶回去。

english: No pain, no gain
chinese: 不痛哪有收获

english: You barely flinched, and those were some gnarly wounds! You've defintiely got your pain receptors under control. But there's more than just some subcutaneous stimulators to worry about, let us continue.
chinese: 你几乎连眉头都没皱一下，而那些伤可一点都不轻！看起来你已经把自己的痛觉受体控制得很稳了。不过要担心的可不只是皮下兴奋剂，继续吧。

english: Kill five enemies while suffering pain
chinese: 在疼痛状态下击杀5名敌人

english: BUT WHY?
chinese: 可为什么啊？！

english: You can override your pain, and that's important. But what happens when you can't override something? You can't override a stun grenade thourgh sheer willpower. Or can you? Perhaps you can fight through it? I don't know, you show me.
chinese: 你能压住疼痛，这很重要。可要是碰上压不住的东西呢？闪光弹可不是光靠意志就能硬顶过去的。还是说，你能？我不知道，你来证明给我看。

english: Dazzled, not deterred
chinese: 目眩不退

english: That was a stunning performance! .....anyways, you really suprised me there. I thought a stun grenade was the end of a fight, but you proved that nothing can prevent you from killing. Hmmm... is that a bad thing?
chinese: 这表现真够“震撼”的！……总之，你这次真让我很意外。我原以为吃了一发闪就是战斗结束，结果你证明了，没什么能拦住你杀人。嗯……这算不算坏事？

english: Kill three enemies while suffering contusion or stunned
chinese: 在脑震荡或眩晕状态下击杀3名敌人

english: I'm starting to think this thing is a sadist
chinese: 我开始觉得这家伙是个施虐狂了。

english: You have to be careful with a fresh wound. It can get infected, it can start bleeding again, it can swell, there's a whole lot of things that can go on. They heal over time, though. The human body has amazing regenerative capabilities. However, no one in Tarkov is going to wait a few days for you to 'get well'. It's only something to take advantage of here. Show them that you don't need to wait.
chinese: 新伤口得小心处理。它会感染，会重新出血，会肿起来，总之什么都可能发生。不过随着时间过去，它终究会愈合。人体的再生能力真是惊人。可在塔科夫，没人会等你养上几天再“康复”。在这里，能做的只有把这点当成优势用起来。让他们看看，你根本不用等。

english: Wounds heal
chinese: 伤口会愈合

english: I can read your thoughts, by the way. I'm not sadistic, this isn't a pleasure for me. I'm here to train you to survive in Tarkov for a greater purpose. I understand why you feel that way though, I hope you can forgive me. I have one more thing to ask of you, anyways. Oh, and good job surviving out there while wounded. Getting beat up does not make it any easier to fight back
chinese: 顺便一提，我能读到你的想法。我不是施虐狂，这对我来说一点都不享受。我训练你在塔科夫活下去，是为了更大的目的。我明白你为什么会这么想，希望你能原谅我。不过我还有最后一件事想拜托你。还有，带着伤还能在外头活下来并狠狠干回去，做得不错。挨打从来不会让还手变得更容易。

english: Kill 30 enemies while having a fresh wound
chinese: 在新伤口状态下击杀30名敌人

english: A different kind of stress...
chinese: 另一种形式的压力……

english: So far, I've been testing your ability to handle individual things. Pain, blindness, severe wounds. For your final test, we'll do something different, perhaps something more enjoyable. Let's see how you do against a horde of people coming after you!
chinese: 到目前为止，我一直在测试你应付单一状况的能力。疼痛、失明、重伤。最后一项测试，我们来点不一样的，也许还更好玩些。让我看看，当一大群人一起扑向你时，你会怎么样！

english: Current objective: KILL
chinese: 当前目标：杀戮

english: So much blood in such a short time... and you look like you had fun. Horrifying. Go on, then; I don't think anything will stress you out.
chinese: 这么短时间里流了这么多血……而你看上去还挺开心。真吓人。去吧，我看已经没什么能让你紧张了。

english: Complete either of the options in one raid and survive
chinese: 在单场战局内完成任一选项并成功撤离

english: I don't think I needed to be asked this...
chinese: 这种事应该不用你特地提醒吧……

english: You wanna hear something painfully obvious? Bleeding isn't good. Yet there sure as heck seems to be a lot of blood spilled in this region. I'm actually not great with blood myself... I don't get sick or anything, I just dislike seeing it except for very specific circumstances. Do me a favor, keep your blood inside your body. I think it'd appreciate it as well.
chinese: 想听句显而易见的废话吗？流血可不是什么好事。可这片地方偏偏到处都是血。我其实不太擅长面对血……倒不会恶心，就是除了极少数场合外，我都不喜欢看见它。帮我个忙，把你的血留在身体里。我觉得它自己也会感谢你的。

english: No time to bleed
chinese: 没空流血

english: Good! I'm glad to see that you know how to patch yourself up.
chinese: 很好！很高兴看到你知道该怎么把自己补好。

english: Stop 7 bleeds
chinese: 止住7次出血

english: What is this supposed to accomplish?
chinese: 这到底能证明什么？

english: You've proved to me that you know how to stop a bleeding. What if you're out of supplies, though? Can you survive that serious loss of blood pressure and energy? Try not to pass out in the process.
chinese: 你已经证明自己会止血了。可要是手头没物资呢？大量失血带来的低血压和虚弱，你扛得住吗？尽量别在过程中昏过去。

english: Bled dry
chinese: 失血殆尽

english: Why on earth did you listen to me? Goodness, you look pale as a sheet. Please tell me you have a bloodbag somewhere.
chinese: 天哪，你怎么还真照做了？老天，你脸白得跟纸一样。告诉我你身上至少带了袋血。

english: Survive a heavy bleed for five minutes
chinese: 在大出血状态下存活5分钟

english: Something a little more agreeable...
chinese: 这回总算顺眼点了……

english: I still can't believe you survived that. Just how on earth does your body regenerate from such wounds? Even losing so much blood, you kept going. I don't understand yet, but I don't need to. And I definitely don't need to see you bleed that much again. I don't think you'd want to either. Prove to me that you know how to fix yourself up, including your bones.
chinese: 我到现在都不敢相信你居然活下来了。你的身体到底是怎么从那种伤里长回来的？失了那么多血，你居然还没倒下。我现在还没弄明白，但也没必要现在就明白。更重要的是，我绝对不想再看你流那么多血了。我想你自己也不想。证明给我看，你知道怎么把自己修好，连骨头也一起。

english: Never again
chinese: 别再来一次

english: Not enough.
chinese: 还不够。

english: Use any bleed or fracture-fixing item 25 times (exlcuding medkits)
chinese: 使用任意止血或治疗骨折类道具25次（不含医疗包）

english: I didn't know I could piss off an angel...
chinese: 我还真不知道天使也会被我惹火……
finish_summary: CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem]

english: More, more! Not just blood, not just broken bones, I want everything!! Do you even know what its like watching you die so many times? Do you even know you're dying? How many times can you die so painfully, so slowly, and still go out there guns blazing? What is wrong with you? You have to know how to use EVERYTHING to keep yourself alive!
chinese: 更多，还要更多！不只是血，不只是骨折，我全都要！！你知道我看着你死了那么多次是什么滋味吗？你到底知不知道自己正在死？你还能那样痛、那样慢地死上多少次，然后转头又端着枪冲出去？你到底怎么回事？你必须学会用上一切手段让自己活着！
finish_summary: CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem]

english: To be free from death
chinese: 挣脱死亡
finish_summary: CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem]

english: Yes! Thank you. Keep yourself alive, for your own sake? I wasn't kidding when I said I don't like seeing you die. If I haven't told you already, I don't particularly care for blood and death and corpses, not least the blood and corpse of someone I'm suppose to be helping. Having to watch you die all the time is painful... so die less, alright?
chinese: 对，就是这样！谢谢你。为了你自己，也尽量活下来，好吗？我说我不喜欢看你死，可不是开玩笑。我本来就不喜欢血、死亡和尸体，更别提那还是一个我本该帮助的人流的血、变成的尸体。总看着你死，真的很难受……所以，少死几次，好吗？
finish_summary: CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem]

english: Use an AI-2 30 times
chinese: 使用AI-2急救组合30次

english: Use a CAR 30 times
chinese: 使用车载急救包30次

english: Use an IFAK 30 times
chinese: 使用IFAK单兵战术急救包30次

english: Use an AFAK 30 times
chinese: 使用AFAK单兵战术急救包30次

english: Use a Salewa 30 times
chinese: 使用Salewa急救包30次

english: Use a Grizzly 30 times
chinese: 使用Grizzly急救包30次

english: Use an Aseptic bandage 5 times
chinese: 使用无菌绷带5次

english: Use an Army bandage 5 times
chinese: 使用军用绷带5次

english: Use an Esmarch 5 times
chinese: 使用Esmarch止血带5次

english: Use a CAT 5 times
chinese: 使用CAT止血带5次

english: Use a CALOK 5 times
chinese: 使用CALOK-B止血剂5次

english: Use an Immobilizing splint 5 times
chinese: 使用固定夹板5次

english: Use an Aluminum  5 times
chinese: 使用铝固定夹板5次

english: Use a CMS kit twice
chinese: 使用CMS手术包2次

english: Use a SURV-12 kit twice
chinese: 使用Surv12野战手术包2次

english: Use any stimulant that provides health regen 8 times.
chinese: 使用任意可恢复生命值的兴奋剂8次。

english: Not like I had a sleep schedule to begin with
chinese: 反正我本来也没什么作息可言。

english: The art of moving silently is a lot less artistic when you're carrying the weight of dead men's souls on your back. Oh, also their guns and gear. Regardless, knowing how to move quietly will save your life more often than you think. Especially if those you are fighting are more... SAIN than usual, if you know what I mean. Learn how to kill your enemey without them knowing where it came from. Let's start easily, with the assistance of the night.
chinese: 背上扛着死人留下的一切时，悄无声息地移动可就没什么“艺术感”了。哦，还有他们的枪和装备。不管怎么说，学会安静行动，救你命的次数会比你想的更多。尤其是当你要对付的家伙比平时更……SAIN一点时，你懂我意思吧。学会在敌人还没反应过来攻击从哪来的时候就把他放倒。先从简单的开始，让夜色帮你一把。

english: Taking a night off
chinese: 借夜而行

english: Getting familiar with the evening times? Good, there's a lot more of it in your near future. Don't forget to sleep at some point.
chinese: 开始习惯夜里的时间了？很好，接下来你还会跟它打更多交道。别忘了找个时候睡觉。

english: Kill 10 enemies between 9PM-4AM
chinese: 在21:00至04:00间击杀10名敌人

english: What if I was already using a suppressor?
chinese: 要是我本来就在用抑制器呢？

english: The darkness is nice and all, but you know what I just thought of? The darkness doesn't conceal how loud your gun is. Or how loud you are. I mean, the whole point of *covert* movement is to be quiet, sneaky? Show me how it's done.
chinese: 黑暗当然不错，但我刚想到一件事。黑暗可遮不住你的枪声，也遮不住你自己发出的动静。我的意思是，*隐蔽*行动的重点不就是安静、鬼鬼祟祟吗？做给我看看。

english: Silent night
chinese: 寂静之夜

english: Wow, that was so quiet I was able to sleep through the night. Thanks
chinese: 哇，安静到我都能一觉睡到天亮。谢了。

english: Kill 15 enemies between 9PM-4AM while using a suppressor
chinese: 在21:00至04:00间使用抑制器击杀15名敌人

english: Oh, lovely.
chinese: 哦，真好。
quest_name: So many ways to move (and kill)

english: There's a lot of different ways you can manipulate your body to provide momentum. There's quite a lot of speeds you can do it at, as well. Not only are most of these ways helpful for movement, but sometimes it's advantages for killing, getting a good angle on your opponent. Let's see just how well you can take advantage of the terrain around you.
chinese: 你能用身体制造动能的方式可不少，速度也有很多种。这里面大多数不光有利于移动，有时也有利于杀人，比如给对手找个更刁钻的角度。让我看看你能把周围的地形利用到什么程度。
quest_name: So many ways to move (and kill)

english: So many ways to move (and kill)
chinese: 移动与杀戮的各种方式
quest_name: So many ways to move (and kill)

english: Hehe, look at you squirming all over the place. That's how you do it, though. Put aside how it looks, it helps you survive.
chinese: 嘿，看你满地乱窜的样子。就是得这么干。先别管好不好看，它能让你活下来。
quest_name: So many ways to move (and kill)

english: Move 400 units in covert movement
chinese: 以隐蔽行动移动400单位
quest_name: So many ways to move (and kill)

english: Anyone remember the Spectre from BO1? Just me? Alright...
chinese: 还有人记得BO1里的Spectre吗？只有我？行吧……

english: Alright, we've gotten plenty of practice, and I've shown you everything there is to be learned about stealth. Now, I have a fun challenge for you. Go to the customs or the mall, and kill three of those PMC guys. The catch? You can't get hurt whatsoever. If you get shot once, you gotta retry. If you break your leg, that's not quiet enough, and you're an idiot. I'd say 'Godspeed' to you, but that won't help this time.
chinese: 好了，练得已经够多了，关于潜行能教你的我也都教完了。现在我给你个有意思的挑战。去海关或者商场，干掉那帮PMC里的三个。条件？你一点伤都不能受。只要中一枪，就得重来。要是摔断了腿，那说明你还不够安静，而且你蠢。我本来想祝你“顺风”，但这次恐怕没用。

english: Spectre
chinese: 幽魂

english: Perfection. You are a terror in the night.
chinese: 完美。你就是夜里的噩梦。

english: Kill 3 PMCs in one night raid, on Customs or Interchange, with a suppressor, without taking damage
chinese: 在海关或立交桥的单场夜间战局内，使用抑制器并在不受伤的情况下击杀 3 名 PMC

english: Finally. Vitaman D
chinese: 终于。维生素D。

english: The night is now yours, you strike all and are seen by none. A myth, an urban legend. The spectre of Tarkov. Unfortunately for you, the night doesn't last forever. Sometimes, it isn't even an option. Can the spectre haunt during the day, or will the sun protect the inhabitants of Tarkov?
chinese: 夜晚现在属于你。你出手无声，无人见你。神话，都市传说，塔科夫的幽魂。可惜夜晚不会永远持续，有时甚至根本没得选。这个幽魂能不能在白天继续游荡，还是说太阳会庇护塔科夫的居民？

english: A shadow in the daylight
chinese: 白昼中的影子

english: And thus, a new Tarkov legend is born. Go on, Shadow of Tarkov.
chinese: 于是，塔科夫新的传说诞生了。去吧，塔科夫之影。

english: Kill 6 enemies in one raid on Customs, Reserve, or Interchange, with a suppressor, without taking damage
chinese: 在海关、储备站或立交桥的单场战局内，使用抑制器并在不受伤的情况下击杀 6 名敌人

english: Y'know, I don't know if I like you watching me in my hideout...
chinese: 说真的，我不确定我喜不喜欢你在我藏身处里盯着我……

english: Considering you have a hideout, you sure learn how to make good use of it. You've built some modules by now, correct? Let me show you how to use it efficiently. We'll start off with some essentials, like medical supplies. Go make a few things at that medstation of yours, stuff you might bring into raid.
chinese: 既然你有藏身处，那就得学会好好利用它。你现在应该已经建了几个模块，对吧？我来教你怎么高效使用。先从必需品开始，比如医疗物资。去你的医疗站做点东西，做些你可能会带进战局的玩意。

english: Basic Medication
chinese: 基础医疗

english: There you go! See if those help you out later today.
chinese: 这就对了！看看今天晚些时候这些东西能不能帮上你。

english: Complete 2 crafts at the Medstation
chinese: 在医疗站完成2次制作

english: You know what they say about idle hands...
chinese: 不是都说闲着的手最会惹事吗……

english: You know how to craft some basic medication, and that's good! But there's a lot more you can do in this place. You can make ammo, armor, even entire weapons! Not to mention other important things like food, water, and things you can sell for profit. Let's try using all your workstations, really get you familiar with what you're working with.
chinese: 你已经会做点基础医疗物资了，这很好！但这地方能做的远不止这些。你能做子弹、护甲，甚至整把枪！更别说食物、水，还有那些能拿去卖钱的东西。把你的各个工作站都用起来，让你真正熟悉手里这些设备。

english: A Proper Utilization of Resources
chinese: 合理利用资源

english: How about that? You got a whole factory going on in there, you can make just about anything you want. ...Hmm, y'know, 'factory' gives me an idea.
chinese: 怎么样？你那地方都快成工厂了，想做什么都行。……嗯，你知道吗，“工厂”这个词倒是给了我个点子。

english: Complete 30 total non-cyclic crafts
chinese: 累计完成30次非循环制作

english: Complete 3 crafts at the Workbench
chinese: 在工作台完成3次制作

english: New quest: Come back in five days. Sure, thanks Guiding Light.
chinese: 新任务：五天后回来。行吧，谢谢你啊，指引之光。
quest_name: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference

english: Why do all this work yourself when you can have machines do it for you over time? I mean, let's ignore the fact that crafting seems to already happen automatically here; don't worry about that. Let's try *actual* automation, letting the station truly do it for you. There's three available in your hideout; put each of them to work.
chinese: 既然机器能替你慢慢干活，你又何必事事亲力亲为？当然，我们先别管这里的制作本来就像自动完成的一样，别在意那个。来试试*真正*的自动化，让设备替你干活。你的藏身处里有三个这样的地方，把它们都运转起来。
quest_name: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference

english: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference
chinese: 这绝对不是《Factorio》梗
quest_name: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference

english: If only you could craft an ammo case, haha! You're not going to have any ammo shortages for a while now, that's for sure. I just hope the quality is good enough, I know some of that ammunition can be... slightly less effective against some of the beefier dudes out there. Also, don't forget that the PMM can only be fired out of the klin, not the kedr
chinese: 要是连弹药箱都能做就好了，哈哈！接下来一阵子你肯定不缺子弹了，这点没跑。我只希望品质够好，我知道有些弹药对那些更壮实的家伙来说……效果会差一点。还有，别忘了PMM只能用Klin打，Kedr不行。
quest_name: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference

english: Collect Bitcoin three times
chinese: 收取实体比特币3次
quest_name: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference

english: Collect Purified Water ten times
chinese: 收取纯净水10次
quest_name: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference

english: Work kills creativity, I suppose.
chinese: 看来工作确实会扼杀创造力。

english: Oh, there's a fourth one of these? I ran out of ideas for this branch. Shoot, uhm... ... ... Oh, screw it. Just go make a bunch of stuff, I don't really care. You know how hard it is to come up with unique ideas every time? If I could make you craft specific things, that'd be nice, but that's hell itself to do. Go make 100 AI-2s for all I care.
chinese: 哦，还有第四个？这条分支我是真没点子了。呃…………算了。随便去做一堆东西吧，我真不在乎。你知道每次都想出新花样有多难吗？要是我能让你去做指定物品当然最好，可做那个简直是地狱。你就算给我做100个AI-2我都认。

english: We Needed a 4th Crafting Quest
chinese: 我们需要第四个制作任务

english: ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ..Oh, you did it. Uhm, well done! You're a, uh, a master crafter now. Yeah.
Complete 100 non-cyclic crafts
chinese: 累计完成100次非循环制作

english: Heavy to wear, but heavy to knock down.
chinese: 穿着沉，放倒人也沉。

english: I'll be honest, I don't personally care for the heavy vests as much. They're just so, well... heavy. However, I cannot deny the sheer armour they provide, and that can be just as useful as mobility. Let's get you outfitted, shall we?
chinese: 说实话，我个人没那么喜欢重型护甲。它们就是……太重了。不过我也不能否认它们提供的厚实防护，而这有时和机动性一样有用。来吧，先把你配起来。

english: Protection is Paramount
chinese: 防护至上

english: Glad to see you're comfortable in these things. Onto the next one.
chinese: 看得出来你已经穿惯这类东西了。下一个。

english: Kill 10 enemies while wearing heavy armour vests / rigs
chinese: 穿着重型护甲背心/胸挂击杀10名敌人

english: Sure hope my spine holds up
chinese: 希望我的脊椎撑得住。

english: They ain't kiddin when they say 'heavy', let me tell you. Most of them are pretty darn heavy. You already see where I'm going with this, I assume?
chinese: 他们说它“重”可不是开玩笑的，我跟你讲。大多数都沉得要命。你应该已经知道我要说什么了吧？

english: Fully covered
chinese: 全副武装

english: See how important plates can be? Even a class 3 can provide a lot of protection compared to just soft armour.
chinese: 看见插板有多重要了吗？哪怕只是三级板，也比单纯软甲靠谱得多。

english: Kill 20 enemies while wearing a vest that can hold all 4 plates in (front, back, l side, r side)
chinese: 穿着可安装4块插板（前、后、左侧、右侧）的护甲击杀20名敌人

english: Now we get to have a bit of fun.
chinese: 现在总算能玩点有意思的了。

english: Knowing how to wear heavy armour vests is nice and all, but knowing how to take it down is good too. Armour is great for you, but not so great when an enemy is wearing it. I want you to not only wear down their armour, but show me you know how to get around it as well.
chinese: 会穿重甲当然不错，但会拆重甲也一样重要。护甲穿在你身上是好事，穿在敌人身上就没那么好了。我不光要你把他们的护甲打烂，还要让我看看你也懂得怎么绕过护甲。

english: Anti-material
chinese: 反器材

english: Look at all that metal and ceramic on the floor. Think I saw a guy's arm on the counter as well. Very well done.
chinese: 看看地上那一堆金属和陶瓷。我好像还在柜台上看见了一只胳膊。干得漂亮。

english: Deal a total of 1000 damage to enemy armour.
chinese: 对敌方护甲累计造成1000点伤害。

english: hv4 accept, I can't think of one rn
chinese: 重甲线这条接任务台词，我现在真想不出来。
finish_summary: HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem

english: Y'know... armour is really only as good as the plate you put into it. Those big vests you wore for me last time... what did you have in them? Were you able to find nice, tier 6 plates? Or did you have to settle for some tier 4? Well, either way, let's get you some tier 6 ones. There's quite a few, each with different properties. Can you find one of each? I don't expect them brand new, don't worry. Take 'em off someone you kill, or not. Heck, if you wanna cheat, get em from a vendor or the market. The goal is to supply you with good protection, so, whatever accomplishes that.
chinese: 你知道吗……护甲到底好不好，终究还得看你塞进去的插板。上次你替我穿的那些大背心……里面装的是什么？你搞到好用的六级板了吗？还是只能拿四级板凑合？不管怎样，这次给你搞几块六级的。种类不少，属性也各不相同。每种给我找一块，行吗？我不指望它们是全新的，别担心。你可以从自己杀的人身上扒，也可以不这么干。真要偷懒，去商人或者跳蚤搞来也行。目标是让你手上有靠谱的防护，所以只要能达成目的，怎么来都行。
finish_summary: HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem

english: Plate up!
chinese: 上板！
finish_summary: HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem

english: Notice how there's some differences between the top tiers? Different weights, durabilities... pick what you like.
chinese: 看出来顶级板之间也有差别了吗？重量、耐久都不一样……挑你喜欢的。

english: I've been reduced to an errand boy.
chinese: 我都快沦为跑腿的了。

english: Gotten some work done on your hideout, I see! But, I know you have more to go. Find some additional parts for the rest of your hideout.
chinese: 我看到你藏身处已经干了不少活！不过我知道你还没弄完。去给剩下的设施找点额外材料。

english: Finding materials
chinese: 搜集材料

english: You should be able to build a few things with those! It'll be a good start, don't you think?
chinese: 有了这些，你应该能盖出几样东西了！算是个不错的开始，不是吗？

english: 'Hand over' 5 bolts
chinese: '上交'5个螺栓

english: 'Hand over' 5 nuts
chinese: '上交'5个螺母

english: 'Hand over' 5 metal parts
chinese: '上交'5个金属零件

english: 'Hand over' 2 corrugated hoses
chinese: '上交'2个波纹软管

english: Where exactly does this stuff 'go' when I hand it it?
chinese: 这东西交出去以后到底“去”哪了？

english: You're starting to have a real operation going on here! You're making things, producing rations, really starting to thrive in the beautiful landscape of Tarkov. I want to make sure that you have enough resources to keep your little facility running. Looks like you needs filters and fuel.
chinese: 你这地方已经真有点规模了！能做东西，能产口粮，在塔科夫这片美丽土地上算是越活越滋润了。我得确保你有足够的资源让这座小设施继续运转。看起来你缺过滤器和燃料。

english: Keeping the lights on
chinese: 维持运转

english: Wonderful! Glad to see you've got plenty of backstock for your hideout
chinese: 不错！看来你的藏身处储备相当充足。

english: 'Hand over' two FIR air filters
chinese: '上交'2个战局中找到的FP-100过滤吸收器

english: 'Hand over' 10 FIR water filters
chinese: '上交'10个战局中找到的滤水器

english: 'Hand over' 5 FIR fuel cans (either one)
chinese: '上交'5个战局中找到的燃料桶（任意一种）

english: This might take a while
chinese: 这可能得花点时间。

english: You must have quite a nice place by now! Are ya winnin, son? Anyways, I heard there's a way to, erm, 'mine bitcoin'. I don't have any record of 'bitcoin' being a resource harvestable from the earth's crust, but apparently computers can do it? I don't understand what you humans come up with some times... don't get me wrong, I'm actually curious about it. Can you show me some of this 'bitcoin'?
chinese: 你现在的住处应该相当不错了吧！怎么样，儿子，最近混得不错吧？总之，我听说有种方法能，呃，“挖比特币”。我可没见过有什么叫“比特币”的资源能从地壳里挖出来，但据说电脑能干这个？你们人类有时候想出来的东西我是真不懂……别误会，我其实挺好奇的。能给我看看这种“比特币”吗？

english: Raking it in
chinese: 财源滚滚

english: It's a 'digital currency', you say? I don't even know, I shouldn't have asked... you can get away with anything nowadays. Hah, maybe you'll start selling pictures next. ...What's that look for?
chinese: 你说这是“数字货币”？我都不知道该说什么了，我就不该问……现在的人真是什么都能拿来赚钱。哈，也许你接下来就要开始卖照片了。……你那是什么表情？

english: 'Hand over' 10 FIR bitcoin
chinese: '上交'10个战局中找到的实体比特币

english: Alliteration is Amazing
chinese: 押头韵真棒。

english: Light vests are likely what I would wear, if I was stuck in your situation. I personally care more about mobility than sheer defense. I don't need to be able to tank shots if I'm not getting shot, right? Being able to maneruver quickly is so important, especially since you're stuck here by yourself. Let's get you comfortable with these lighter vests and rigs, eh?
chinese: 要是换成我被困在你这处境里，大概会穿轻甲。我个人更看重机动性，而不是纯防护。只要我不挨枪子，就用不着硬吃子弹，对吧？能快速机动太重要了，尤其这里只有你一个人。来吧，先让你适应这些轻一点的护甲和胸挂。

english: Mobility is Marvelous
chinese: 机动性万岁

english: Yeah, you're getting the hang of it! Let's get a little more specialized
chinese: 对，就是这样，你开始上手了！再来点更专门的。

english: Kill 10 enemies while wearing a light armour vest / rig
chinese: 穿着轻型护甲背心/胸挂击杀10名敌人

english: Stealth is a vital part of Metal Gear Solid Online for all players
chinese: 潜行对所有《合金装备Online》玩家来说都是重要的一环。

english: Isn't it funnt that some 'light armour' really isn't that light? I mean, sure, some plates are made of armor steel, I don't expect that to be as light as a feather. But some small, weak plates still end up weighing more than they are worth. Beyond that, some vests end up weighing a lot just from all the 'soft' armour they have. Why don't you go try wearing light stuff? You might enjoy the newfound speed.
chinese: 有些“轻甲”其实一点都不轻，这事是不是挺好笑的？我是说，有些插板是装甲钢做的，那当然不可能像羽毛一样轻。但有些又小又弱的板，最后反而重得不值当。除此之外，有些背心光靠那一堆“软甲”就能把重量堆上去。去试试真正轻的装备吧。你可能会喜欢上这股新速度。

english: Light as a feather
chinese: 轻如羽毛

english: Well, how about it? Can be nice when you're trying to offset big guns, ammo, and have more left over for all that loot you'll pick up in raid. It matters less as you work on your strength, though.
chinese: 怎么样？要抵消大枪、弹药的负重，还得给战局里捡到的战利品留空间时，这就很舒服了。当然，等你的力量练起来以后，这点差别就没那么明显了。

english: Kill 20 enemies while wearing only plates that weight <2KG, in a vest that *BY ITSELF* weighs <5KG.
chinese: 仅装备重量<2KG的插板，且护甲*本体*重量<5KG时击杀20名敌人。

english: Buy now, and you'll get a second class 2 armour for free!
chinese: 现在购买，再送你一件二级甲！

english: Class 2 armour is... pretty bad, I won't lie. However, it's usually the lightest armour you can get, while still protecting you from weak rounds that most scavs will be firing at you, as well as some early level PMCs. Knowing how to effectively use these weaker armour can really help out, especially for the rougher seasons when you're on a budget.
chinese: 二级护甲……说实话，挺烂的，我不骗你。不过它通常也是你能找到的最轻护甲，同时还能挡住大多数Scav会打来的弱弹，以及一些低等级PMC的子弹。学会怎么有效利用这类弱护甲，真的能帮上大忙，尤其是在你手头紧的艰难时节。

english: Pellets B gone
chinese: 霰弹退散

english: What'd you think? Super light, but keeps the shotguns and pistols away
chinese: 感觉如何？轻得要命，但挡霰弹枪和手枪还真够用。

english: Kill 25 enemies while wearing the 6B2, Module-3M, or PACA armour.
chinese: 穿着6B2、Module-3M或PACA护甲击杀25名敌人。

english: I suppose those would be important.
chinese: 看来这玩意确实挺重要。

english: As much as these armour vests are all about not getting shot in the first place, it's still bound to happen eventually. You should have a repair kit on standby for when you get ambushed by a group of scavs with shotguns. Find two, while you're at it. Having a backup is important!
chinese: 这些护甲背心再怎么说也都是为了让你别中枪，可终究还是难免会中。等你被一群拿霰弹枪的Scav伏击时，手边最好备着修理包。顺便找两个吧，有备份很重要！

english: Preparing repairs
chinese: 为维修做准备

english: Sweet! Just those should last you a long time. Don't forget to find another one BEFORE you run out of repairing, though.
chinese: 漂亮！光这两个就够你用很久了。不过别等彻底用完了才想起来再找新的。

english: Find 2 armour repair kits FIR
chinese: 找到2个护甲修理包（战局中找到）

english: Killa got nothing on me
chinese: Killa也不过如此。

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the PACA, the strongest armour in all the lands (Twitch variant allowed)
chinese: 穿着PACA击杀3名PMC，这可是天下第一神甲（允许Twitch版）

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the 6B2 armour, and then never touch it again
chinese: 穿着6B2护甲击杀3名PMC，然后以后别再碰它

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the Kora-Kulon armour, and ask why a light class 3 armour is 11.1 kg
chinese: 穿着Kora-Kulon护甲击杀3名PMC，然后想想为什么一件轻型三级甲能有11.1千克

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the UNTAR armour, you blueberry you
chinese: 穿着UNTAR护甲击杀3名PMC，你这蓝莓兵

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the Zhuk-3 armour, and embrace your role as a member of the press
chinese: 穿着Zhuk-3护甲击杀3名PMC，拥抱你身为记者的命运

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the *REDACTED* armour (not gonna force you to wear it, just kill 3 pmcs in general)
chinese: 穿着*已屏蔽*护甲击杀3名PMC（不逼你穿它，总之杀3个PMC就行）

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the Kirasa-N armour, and realize how overpriced it is
chinese: 穿着Kirasa-N护甲击杀3名PMC，然后意识到它有多离谱地贵

english: Kill 5 PMCs while wearing the Trooper armour, extra because everyone uses it
chinese: 穿着Trooper护甲击杀5名PMC，额外加量，因为大家都在用

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the THOR CRV armour, because concealable armour is very useful here
chinese: 穿着THOR CRV护甲击杀3名PMC，毕竟隐蔽护甲在这地方很有用

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the 6B13 armour, and watch your armour disintegrate in 3 hits
chinese: 穿着6B13护甲击杀3名PMC，然后看着你的护甲挨3枪就碎

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the 6B23-2 armour, and blend in with all the desert in Tarkov
chinese: 穿着6B23-2护甲击杀3名PMC，然后和塔科夫满地的沙色融为一体

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the OTV armour, and ponder why BSG keeps adding light, class 4 ceramic armour
chinese: 穿着OTV护甲击杀3名PMC，然后思考BSG为什么老往游戏里加轻型四级陶瓷甲

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the HPC armour, I have nothing funny to say it's actually not bad
chinese: 穿着HPC护甲击杀3名PMC，我这次真没什么好笑的能说，这玩意其实不差

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the Killa armour, and question how this is light armour
chinese: 穿着Killa护甲击杀3名PMC，然后质疑这东西凭什么算轻甲

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the GHZEL-K armour, and don't ask why scavs can have it
chinese: 穿着Gzhel-K护甲击杀3名PMC，别问为什么Scav也能穿这玩意

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the Hexgrid armour, and wonder why a class 6 is light
chinese: 穿着Hexgrid护甲击杀3名PMC，然后继续思考为什么六级甲也能算轻甲

english: Kill 3 PMCs while wearing the Zhuk-6a armour, and continue wondering why a class 6 is light
chinese: 穿着Zhuk-6a护甲击杀3名PMC，然后接着思考为什么六级甲也能算轻甲

english: Kill Killa once because I said so
chinese: 因为我说了，所以去杀Killa一次

english: ...uh, GL? You good?
chinese: ……呃，GL？你还好吗？

english: Death.
chinese: 死亡。

english: ...heh.
Kill.
chinese: 杀。

english: It has a point, I really should be taking care of them.
chinese: 有道理，我确实该多照顾下这些家伙。

english: Taking care of your weapons is by far one of the best things you can do to improve your chances of survival in Tarkov. They're what's keeping you alive, so you should keep them alive, too! To do this, though, you'll need the right tools. I'm sure there's some sort of repair kit out there, right? Normally I wouldn't fuss about whether it's brand new or 'found in raid' or whatever, but this is important enough that you should find, or craft, it yourself.
chinese: 在塔科夫，好好保养武器绝对是提高生存率最有效的事之一。它们在保你的命，所以你也得让它们活着！不过要做到这点，你得有合适的工具。外面肯定有某种修理包吧？一般我不会在意它是不是全新，或者是不是“战局中找到”之类，但这件事够重要，你最好自己找，或者自己做。

english: Kitting out
chinese: 整备起来

english: Yeah, that looks right! Before we use it, though, I think I should show you why it's so important.
chinese: 对，就是这个！不过在用它之前，我觉得还是该先让你明白它为什么这么重要。

english: 'Hand over' a FIR Weapon Repair Kit
chinese: '上交'1个战局中找到的武器修理包

english: Hand in an AR or SMG with <2 durability remaining
chinese: 上交1把剩余耐久<2的突击步枪或冲锋枪

english: This is going to be interesting
chinese: 这下有意思了。

english: Have you ever used a weapon for so long that it barely works anymore? It jams, it breaks down, it misfires, it just shouldn't be relied upon for combat. Sometimes, studying such a weapon can be of great value for understanding future weapon repairs, as well as being a grim reminder of what can happen if you don't take proper care of your firearm. Try wearing a weapon down to scrap. You might want to bring another weapon in while you do this...
chinese: 你有没有一把枪用到几乎报废过？卡壳、故障、哑火，已经完全不该拿去打仗。研究这种武器，有时候对理解以后该怎么修枪很有价值，同时它也能残酷地提醒你，不好好保养枪会是什么下场。试着把一把武器磨到废铁吧。做这事时你最好再带一把备用枪……

english: Ol' (un)reliable
chinese: 老伙计（不）靠谱

english: Wow, look at that thing. Do you even want it back? Well, I can't exactly take it... just go leave it by your workbench, I guess.
chinese: 哇，看看这东西。你还想要回去吗？反正我也没法真收下……干脆把它丢你工作台旁边吧。

english: I should deconstruct some weapons at the workbench for this.
chinese: 我该去工作台拆几把枪来做这个。

english: Have you ever seen a disassembled weapon before? I sure hope you have, given that you are a trained military guy and all that. Being able to identify various weapon parts is critical to being able to effectively repair your weapon. Try taking some weapons apart, or even better, try finding some new ones in raid. Buy a VPO-209 from Skier and deconstruct it at your workbench, see what you get.
chinese: 你见过被拆开的武器吧？我真希望你见过，毕竟你可是受过训练的军人之类的。能认出各种武器零件，对有效维修你的武器至关重要。试着拆几把枪，或者更好一点，去战局里找些新的。去Skier那买一把VPO-209，在工作台上拆开，看看能出什么。

english: Reduced to the base parts
chinese: 拆到只剩零件

english: Look at all that metal! I think you've seen enough scrap and oil to know exactly what to look out for when repairing your weapon, so let's go do it.
chinese: 看看这些金属！我觉得你已经见过足够多的废料和机油，应该知道修枪时该留意什么了。走吧，开始干正事。

english: 'Hand over' 15 FIR weapon parts
chinese: '上交'15个战局中找到的武器零件

english: Seems... easy? Is there a catch? Ehhh, some calibers aren't the easiest to get, I suppose.
chinese: 看着……挺简单？有陷阱吗？呃，有些口径确实不太好搞就是了。

english: You know what we haven't really done yet? Practied with all of the different weapons. 'But light, why don't we use weapon repair kits?' Because it doesn't work. So instead, you're gonna learn about the different calibers of weapons. I want you to grab some kills with every caliber you can find. I'll spare you the grenade launchers, at least.
chinese: 你知道我们还没怎么练过什么吗？把各种武器都轮着打一遍。“可光啊，我们为什么不用武器修理包？”因为它不好使。所以你接下来要学的是各种武器口径。我想让你用你能找到的每种口径都拿几个人头。至少我饶过你了，榴弹发射器不用。

english: Omnicaliber
chinese: 全口径

english: Got a feel for each one, have ya? Can you tell their strenghts and weaknesses? Ah well, the next one should be enjoyable.
chinese: 每种都试出手感了，嗯？能分得出它们的长短处了吗？算了，下一个你应该会喜欢。

english: Kill 5 enemies with 20/70 (TOZ is the only one)
chinese: 用20/70击杀5名敌人（只有TOZ用这个）

english: Kill 5 enemies with 12/70
chinese: 用12/70击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with 23x75mm (KS-23 is the only one)
chinese: 用23x75mm击杀5名敌人（只有KS-23用这个）

english: Kill 5 enemies with 7.62x25mm Tokarev
chinese: 用7.62x25mm Tokarev击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with 9x18mm Makarov
chinese: 用9x18mm Makarov击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with 9x19mm Parabellum
chinese: 用9x19mm Parabellum击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with 9x21mm Gyurza
chinese: 用9x21mm Gyurza击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with .357 Magnum
chinese: 用.357 Magnum击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with .45 ACP
chinese: 用.45 ACP击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with 4.6x30mm HK
chinese: 用4.6x30mm HK击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with 5.7x28mm FN
chinese: 用5.7x28mm FN击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with 5.45x39mm
chinese: 用5.45x39mm击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with 5.56x45mm NATO
chinese: 用5.56x45mm NATO击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with 6.8x51mm (MCX SPEAR is the only one)
chinese: 用6.8x51mm击杀5名敌人（只有MCX SPEAR用这个）

english: Kill 5 enemies with .300 Blackout (MCX is the only one)
chinese: 用.300 Blackout击杀5名敌人（只有MCX用这个）

english: Kill 5 enemies with 7.62x39mm
chinese: 用7.62x39mm击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with 7.62x51mm NATO
chinese: 用7.62x51mm NATO击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with 7.62x54mmR
chinese: 用7.62x54mmR击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with .338 Lapua Magnum
chinese: 用.338 Lapua Magnum击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with 9x39mm
chinese: 用9x39mm击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with .366 TKM
chinese: 用.366 TKM击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with 12.7x55mm STs-130
chinese: 用12.7x55mm STs-130击杀5名敌人

english: Kill 5 enemies with .50 Action Express
chinese: 用.50 Action Express击杀5名敌人

english: Sure hope 10 is enough
chinese: 只希望10发够用。

english: Say what you will about Tarkov, this is real life we're talking about. Your magazines don't magically combine like the video games you grew up on. Here, you gotta take care of them. That means you gotta get good at loading, unloading, and switching mags fast. We'll start off with the lil 10 rounders. Let's do one kill for each bullet you can hold.
chinese: 不管你怎么说塔科夫，我们谈的可是真实世界。你的弹匣不会像你小时候玩的电子游戏那样自动合并。在这儿，你得自己照料它们。这意味着你得练好装弹、退弹和快速换匣。先从小小的10发匣开始吧。就按容量来，一发算一条命。

english: Starting small
chinese: 从小开始

english: Less is more, they say. If you have a 10 round magazine, it's lighter, likely more ergonomic, and most importantly will cause you to think more carefully about your shots. In that way, a 10 round magazine can be way more effective than a larger one.
chinese: 他们都说少即是多。10发弹匣更轻，通常人机也更好，最重要的是它会逼你更谨慎地开枪。从这个角度看，10发弹匣有时反而比大弹匣更有效。

english: Kill 10 enemies while using 10 round mags
chinese: 使用10发弹匣击杀10名敌人

english: Upgrades.
chinese: 升级。

english: The 10 rounders were nice, but sometimes that's just not enough ammo to seal the deal. Let's double the amount of bullets we can use, how about that? Still low enough that you'll be a little more careful, but plenty incase you miss a few or if the enemy is heavily armoured.
chinese: 10发匣不错，但有时候那点弹药确实不够收尾。把可用子弹翻一倍，怎么样？数量依旧不算多，能让你保持谨慎，但也足够你打空几枪，或者对付重甲敌人。

english: Upgrades, people
chinese: 该升级了，伙计们

english: So, do you prefer the 10 or the 20 so far? Perhaps the 20 allows different guns that didn't have access to 10 rounds.
chinese: 所以，到现在为止你更喜欢10发还是20发？也许20发能让你用上一些没有10发匣的枪。

english: Kill 20 enemies while using 20 round mags
chinese: 使用20发弹匣击杀20名敌人

english: More killing, less complaining
chinese: 少抱怨，多杀人。

english: Alright, now let's get used to what you're most commonly be working with. Normally I'd stick with the whole 'one kill per capacity' thing, but 30 round magazines are standard issue, so I think it's the most important capacity to be familiar with. How about you double what you'd normally do?
chinese: 好了，现在来适应你最常会接触到的容量。照理说我该继续“一发容量对应一条命”这套，但30发弹匣是标准配发，所以我觉得这是你最该熟悉的容量。要不把原本的量翻倍？

english: Standard Issue
chinese: 标准配发

english: Was the extra work so bad? I told you, 30 round mags are everywhere. So many guns can use them.
chinese: 额外这点活真有那么难受？我说过了，30发匣到处都是。能用它的枪多得很。

english: Kill 60 enemies while using 30 round mags
chinese: 使用30发弹匣击杀60名敌人

english: P90 gang
chinese: P90帮。

english: How about something more fun? 50 rounders aren't as common, but you can still find plenty of weapons that use them. More bullets means you lose out on the 'bonuses' the smaller mags give you, but more bullets! Who's going to complain about more bullets?
chinese: 来点更有意思的吧？50发匣没那么常见，但能用它的武器还是不少。子弹越多，你就越享受不到小弹匣那些“好处”，但子弹更多啊！谁会嫌子弹多？

english: 50 dead men
chinese: 五十条命

english: You have killed 120 people for this training so far. You'd think this is a combat taskline, at this rate.
chinese: 到现在为止，你为了这套训练已经杀了120个人。照这速度下去，这都快成战斗任务线了。

english: Kill 50 enemies while using 50 round mags
chinese: 使用50发弹匣击杀50名敌人

english: To be fair, 60 is quite a lot
chinese: 说句公道话，60发确实挺多。

english: Hot take: If you need 60 round magazines, you either found yourself in a REALLY bad situation, or you need to work on your aim. Oh well, they exist, and sometimes you just really need to suppress a location. Don't waste all your ammo, though! That stuff can be expensive.
chinese: 冷知识：如果你得用60发弹匣，那不是你陷入了极其糟糕的处境，就是你的枪法该练练了。算了，这东西既然存在，有时你也确实需要狠狠干压一片区域。不过别把子弹全浪费了！那玩意可不便宜。

english: Overkill
chinese: 过量火力

english: Mag drills complete! You should have no issue transferring these skills to the more unusual magazine capacities, I believe in you.
chinese: 弹匣训练完成！我相信你已经能把这些本事转到那些更少见的弹匣容量上了。

english: Kill 60 enemies while using 60 round mags
chinese: 使用60发弹匣击杀60名敌人

english: Wait, how are we going to train this...?
chinese: 等等，我们到底要怎么训练这个……？

english: Tarkov, being real life, is a rather unique place. It turns out that getting shot has consequences. Who'dve thought, right? If you're going to get shot, it's going to mess you up, and you need to know how to get yourself back in working order. First, we need the right tools. Go get some surgical kits, a few of each.
chinese: 塔科夫既然是现实世界，那它就相当特别。原来中枪是会有后果的，谁想得到呢，对吧？要是你中枪了，身体会被搞得一团糟，你得知道怎么把自己修回来。首先，我们得有对的工具。去弄些手术包来，每种都备几份。

english: Preparing for the worst
chinese: 为最坏情况做准备

english: Some of the red, some of the black... We'll be using most of these, don't worry. That's not what you're worried about? Ah, you can't die, you'll be fine
chinese: 红的，黑的……大多数我们都会用上的，别担心。你担心的不是这个？啊，你又死不了，没事。

english: Acquire 5 CMS kits
chinese: 获得5个CMS手术包

english: Acquire 3 SURV-12 kits
chinese: 获得3个SURV-12手术包

english: I suppose it's useful, but I wish we could do this in a way that didn't involve me getting shot a lot?
chinese: 我承认这挺有用，但真希望我们能用一种不用老让我中枪的方式来练？

english: Now that you have the tools, let's get to work. I'm afraid there's only going to be one person you can practice on... erm... do what you must.
chinese: 工具有了，开始干活吧。恐怕这里只有一个人能让你拿来练手……呃……你自己看着办。

english: Field practice
chinese: 实地练习

english: Yeah, you're getting the hang of it! Let's keep working, there's plenty more to practice.
chinese: 对，就是这样，你开始上手了！继续吧，还有很多要练。

english: Use a CMS kit 5 times
chinese: 使用CMS手术包5次

english: Use a SURV-12 kit 5 times
chinese: 使用SURV-12手术包5次

english: Why are we writing quests where I have to take damage? What sadist is causing this?
chinese: 为什么我们要写这种必须让我受伤的任务？到底哪个施虐狂想的？

english: Sometimes, you just get shot a lot, yet your suffering doesn't end. I've seen people healing for minutes around here. Granted, you should be thankful that healing from multiple gunshot wounds is just a couple minutes, there's something not right about that, but whatever. Anyways, try doing surgery multiple times in one raid.
chinese: 有时候你会挨很多枪，但折磨还没完。我见过有人在这地方连着治疗好几分钟。话说回来，多处枪伤只要几分钟就能治好，这事本来就不太对劲，但算了。总之，试着把自己从鬼门关前拉回来，累计恢复 3000 点生命值。

english: Preemptive measures
chinese: 防患未然

english: Good! Knowing how to do surgery is good, but not needing to do surgery is even better. Try to keep it that way, eh?
chinese: 很好！会做手术当然重要，但更重要的是别用上手术。尽量保持这样，好吗？

english: Regain 3000 health
chinese: 恢复3000点生命值

english: That is... technically a slang definition of surgical, I guess. Oh well, beats jumping off the roof 50 times.
chinese: 这……严格说来，“外科”确实也有这个俚语意思。算了，总比跳50次楼强。

english: You know, so far these tasks have been sort of... out of your control, I guess? Like, you could just be jumping off buildings to do this, but I don't imagine you're doing that very often, that's no fun. So, how about a different kind of surgical? It's technically cheating, but hey, I really can only think of so many ways to make training surgery interesting. We'll get back to the grind next task, but let's have some fun for a bit, ok? I want 8 headshots, with bolt-actions, in the same raid. That's quite surgical, eh?
chinese: 你知道吗，到目前为止这些任务多多少少都有点……不太受你控制，对吧？比如你完全可以靠跳楼来刷，但我想你应该没那么常干，毕竟一点都不好玩。所以，来点另一种“外科手术”吧？严格说算是取巧，但唉，我能想到让手术训练变有趣的办法也就这么多了。下个任务我们还得回去继续苦干，不过先玩一会儿，好吗？我要你在同一场战局中，用栓动步枪打出 8 个爆头。这也挺“外科”的，对吧？

english: A different kind of 'surgical'
chinese: 另一种‘外科手术’

english: Good shooting, m8. Back to the less fun stuff, sadly.
chinese: 枪法不错，老兄。可惜，接下来又得回到没那么有意思的部分了。

english: Kill 8 enemies with headshots with bolt-action rifles in a single raid.
chinese: 在单场战局内，使用栓动步枪爆头击杀 8 名敌人。

english: That's a lot of roofs to jump off of, I guess. (This is not actually the intended way to complete this, please don't do that)
chinese: 看来得跳不少屋顶了。（这其实不是设计上的完成方式，请别真这么干）

english: I hope last task was a little more enjoyable, a nice break from what we're doing. Unfortunately, there's really only one way I can actually train you on your surgery... and that's to do surgery. So, being the final task, I really have no choice but to do it that way. I highly recommend letting this one happen naturally, it will over time. You're not missing out by not completing your training, if you think about it. If you don't need to be performing surgery, you don't need to be an expert in surgery. It's up to you if you even want to go for it, honestly.
chinese: 希望上个任务你做得开心点，算是我们这堆事里的小休息。可惜，真要训练你的手术能力，我实际上只有一种办法……那就是去做手术。所以既然这是最后一个任务，我也只能这样来。老实说，我强烈建议你顺其自然，时间久了总会完成。不把这项训练练满，你也没损失什么，换个角度想想也是。要是你根本用不着动手术，那你也没必要成为什么手术专家。说真的，要不要特意去做，全看你自己。

english: Back to the grind
chinese: 回到苦工

english: Well, that's done now. You can probably be a surgeon now, once you get out of here. Also, you moved you liver into the wrong place when repairing your stomach that one time. I wonder if that'll fix itself or not when you die again? We'll fine out.
chinese: 好，这下结束了。等你离开这儿以后，没准都能去当外科医生了。对了，有一次你修胃的时候把肝放错地方了。我很好奇等你下次再死一次，它会不会自己回去。到时就知道了。

english: Perform surgery a total of 60 times
chinese: 累计进行60次手术

english: At least 10 with the CMS
chinese: 其中至少10次使用CMS

english: At least 15 with the SURV-12
chinese: 其中至少15次使用SURV-12

english: QUESTS WITH *** HAVE MULTIPLE CHOICES. CHOOSE WISELY.
chinese: 带有 *** 的任务存在多项选择。请谨慎决定。

english: Kill 15 pmcs with either AA-12
chinese: 使用任意一种 AA-12 击杀 15 名 PMC

english: Kill 3 PMCs with the V40 Mini
chinese: 使用 V40 Mini 击杀 3 名 PMC

english: If only I could find a Ray Gun in one of these boxes...
chinese: 要是我能在这些箱子里翻出一把雷枪就好了……

english: Searching seems like a valuable skill to have here. You're still searching for an answer to some things right now, aren't you? Sorry, sorry. Well... Hmm. Let's start with the basics. Go open some containers and see what's inside. Make sure you move everything around a bunch and make a ton of noise like a trained military soldier would (BSG why is looting so loud~)
chinese: 搜索看起来是这里一项很有价值的技能。你现在不也还在为某些问题寻找答案吗？抱歉，抱歉。呃……嗯。先从基础开始。去开几个容器看看里面有什么。记得像受过专业训练的军人那样，把东西翻得乱七八糟，再制造一大堆噪音（BSG，为什么搜东西这么响~）

english: Mystery Box
chinese: 神秘盒子

english: Good, glad to see you know how to open a lid. Or a backpack. Or a drawer. Or a - whatever, you know what you're doing.
chinese: 很好，至少你知道怎么开盖子了。或者开背包。或者开抽屉。或者开——算了，反正你知道自己在干什么。

english: Pickup 40 items
chinese: 拾取40件物品

english: Search 20 containers
chinese: 搜索20个容器

english: ugh.
chinese: 呃。

english: If tasked with searching one specific area in painstaking detail, how would you fare? Could you find the needle in the haystack? Or will the lack of dopamine burn you out? Let's see.
chinese: 如果让你以近乎苛刻的细致程度去搜一个特定区域，你表现会如何？你能在草堆里找到针吗？还是会被缺失的多巴胺磨到心态爆炸？来试试。

english: Thorough Investigation
chinese: 彻底搜查

english: So you can dedicate your time to such a task, if needed. You will find this to be a valuable skill indeed.
chinese: 看来有必要时，你确实能把时间全投入到这种事上。这会是项很有价值的本事。

english: Search 60 containers in one raid
chinese: 在单场战局内搜索 60 个容器

english: Aren't there enough quests about running around the whole place? Yeesh.
chinese: 满地图乱跑的任务还不够多吗？真要命。

english: Something isn't right here...

english: After visiting Ground Zero on two separate occasions, you've noticed that both raids felt... similar. In fact, it was as if the first raid never happened; none of the fresh bodies were there, but previous deaths remained right where they were. The container you were sure you searched just hours ago somehow had items in it again. Either someone is running an extremely sick social experiment, or you're suffering from hallucinations.
chinese: 你先后两次进入中心区后，发现这两场战局的感觉……非常相似。准确地说，就像第一场战局根本没发生过一样；新添的尸体不见了，但更早之前死掉的人还躺在原地。你明明几个小时前刚搜过的容器，居然又冒出了物资。要么是有人在搞一场极度病态的社会实验，要么就是你已经出现了幻觉。

english: Suspicion
chinese: 疑心

english: Again, it was as if the previous raid never happened... Even the blood from those you shot last time wasn't there. Is this all a dream or something? What the hell is going on? ...You faintly hear a high-pitched voice in your head, but cannot understand what it's saying.
chinese: 又是这样，仿佛上一局从未发生过……就连你上次打死那些人留下的血迹都没了。这一切难道真是梦？到底发生了什么？……你隐约听见脑海里有个尖细的声音，但听不懂它在说什么。

english: The same thing. The place resets. You keep hearing that voice, as well... it's growing clearer the longer you remain here. You can make out a couple of words... 'Seek', 'Find', 'Know', 'Rest'. You notice that 'Seek' and 'Know' are said in a higher voice, whereas 'Find' and 'Rest' have a deeper tone. Are there two voices???
chinese: 还是一样。这个地方会重置。那个声音也还在，而且你待得越久，它就越清晰。你大概能分辨出几个词：'追寻'、'寻获'、'知晓'、'休息'。其中“追寻”和“知晓”像是偏高的嗓音说的，而“寻获”和“休息”则来自更低沉的声音。难道有两个声音？？？

english: This... voice in your head. What is it? Why do you hear it? What does it want with you? So many questions plague your mind, and you have no way of answering them... You recall the words you understood: 'Seek', 'Find', 'Know', 'Rest'... are they options, perhaps? And in two different tones...
chinese: 这……出现在你脑海里的声音，到底是什么？为什么你会听见它？它又想从你这里得到什么？无数问题折磨着你，而你根本无从作答……你回想起自己听懂的几个词：'追寻'、'寻获'、'知晓'、'休息'……它们也许是选项？而且还是两种不同的声线……

english: ***The Voice(s?)***

chinese: ***你已做出选择***
finish_summary: Quest[target=681d237c78c5bc12626aedcc; status=2] || CounterCreator[kills(target=Any,value=1,distance=5555,daytime=0-0)] || Quest[target=68452e786e6819eac4509eb9; status=4] || Quest[target=68452e7c1de1e249e2b87d70; status=4] || Quest[target=68452e7ea20d11c7628ff254; status=4] || Quest[target=68452e81ed96a8107bd8763a; status=4]

english: ***Which will you do?***
chinese: ***你要怎么做？***

english: Seek.
chinese: 追寻。

english: Rest.
chinese: 休息。

english: Know.
chinese: 知晓。

english: Find.
chinese: 寻获。

english: QUESTS WITH *** HAVE MULTIPLE CHOICES. CHOOSE WISELY.
chinese: 带有 *** 的任务存在多项选择。请谨慎决定。

english: There has to be something I can discover...
chinese: 一定有什么东西能让我发现……

english: 'Seek' was the first word you heard, so that must be what's most important, right? It makes sense, you reason. There must be something that needs to be found. A switch, a mastermind, an escape. Whatever it is, you can find it if you look hard enough.
chinese: 你最先听到的是“追寻”，那它一定最重要，对吧？你这样想着。一定有什么东西需要被找到。一个开关、一个幕后黑手、一个出口。不管那是什么，只要你足够努力地寻找，总能把它翻出来。

english: Seek
chinese: 追寻

english: You search, and search, and search some more for anything that could provide the broadest explanation. Nothing. There are items, sure. Things that will help you in the short term. Yet your search bears no fruit... until a familiar voice asks, 'Are you seeking me?'
chinese: 你搜了又搜，想找出一个能解释一切的关键，可结果什么都没有。物资当然有，短期内能帮你活下去的东西也不少，但你的追寻始终没有结果……直到那道熟悉的声音突然问你：'你是在寻找我吗？'

english: There has to be something I can locate...
chinese: 一定有什么东西能让我找到……

english: Finding is what you need to do, right? Seeking never ends, but finding provides an endpoint, a tangible result. Though, what are you trying to find...? You'll know when you find it, surely. You'll hear that voice again; maybe a director will say 'CUT!' and reveal it's all a big game. ...Maybe.
chinese: 你需要做的是“找到”，对吧？追寻可以永无止境，但找到就意味着终点，意味着切实的结果。可你到底要找什么……？等你真的找到时，自己肯定会知道。你会再听见那个声音；说不定还会有人喊一声“CUT！”，然后告诉你这一切只是场游戏。……也说不定。

english: Find
chinese: 寻获

english: Nothing you find seems to be important to this madness. Things that might aid you in this purgatory, sure, but as far as the broader picture goes, you're no better off. You can't seem to find the right answer... That is, until a familiar voice playfully says, 'Found you.'
chinese: 你找到的东西里，没有一件真正能解释这场疯狂。它们也许能帮你在这片炼狱里多活一会儿，但对更大的真相毫无帮助。你始终找不到那个正确答案……直到一道熟悉的声音带着戏谑说出一句：'找到你了。'

english: There has to be something I can think of...
chinese: 一定有什么东西能让我想明白……

english: You've been searching for quite a while, and haven't found anything useful... Yet, how are you supposed to 'know' if you can't understand what's going on? You need to increase your awareness of things...
chinese: 你已经找了很久，却什么有用的都没发现……可如果你连正在发生什么都不明白，又该如何“知道”呢？你需要提高自己对周遭一切的感知力……

english: Know
chinese: 知晓

english: With some practice, you are able to increase your mental capacities a bit... While you still can't find anything useful within Tarkov, you notice a sense within you... a feeling that, maybe, what's going on here is beyond some mere 'thing'. As soon as you think that, you hear the voice again: 'Now you're getting somewhere.'
chinese: 经过一番磨练，你的精神能力确实提高了一些……你依旧没能在塔科夫里找到什么关键线索，但心里却生出一种感觉……仿佛这里发生的一切，也许并不只是某件“东西”造成的。就在你想到这里时，那个声音再次响起：'你终于开始接近答案了。'

english: Maybe I just need a break...
chinese: 也许……我真的该歇一会儿了。

english: You're too stressed out. Whatever's going on is far too much, and maybe the first step in solving this is to understand that. You decide it might be best to take a bit of a break, clear your head. You pace about your hideout, unable to fully cease the thinking but able to clear your head somewhat. You're not crazy, you're not hallucinating... right? You need something to take the edge off.
chinese: 你现在压力太大了。无论这里发生了什么，都已经超出了承受范围；也许解决问题的第一步，就是先承认这一点。你决定先休息一下，清清脑子。你在藏身处里来回踱步，虽然无法彻底停下思绪，但多少能让自己冷静一些。你没有疯，也没有出现幻觉……对吧？你需要一点东西来缓和神经。

english: Rest
chinese: 休息

english: 'Are you beginning to lose yourself?' A calm voice asks. Though, the sudden address from an invisible source does nothing to actually calm you down. 'Woah, didn't mean to scare ya. Though, I suppose its hard not to, when some voice just starts talking to you. Sorry about that.' The voice pauses.
chinese: '你开始迷失自己了吗？' 一道平静的声音问道。不过，来自看不见之处的突然搭话并没有让你真的冷静下来。'哇，抱歉，我不是故意吓你的。只是突然有个声音跟你说话，想不吓到人也难。对不起。' 那声音停顿了一下。

english: Take a smoke break. (Hand over any cigarettes or lighter)
chinese: 抽根烟缓一缓。（上交任意香烟或打火机）

english: Loot 50 items
chinese: 搜刮 50 件物品

english: Search 30 containers
chinese: 搜索 30 个容器

english: This is not what I was expecting, to say the least.
chinese: 这跟我预想的可差得太远了。

english: 'You spent so long searching, but couldn't see what was right there? Yet you haven't died, so you must be fairly perceptive... or lucky. Either way, you needn't seek any longer, for I am who you sought. Allow me to introduce myself properly: I am an angel of Heaven, most often called Guiding Light. My work takes place in an unseen realm, though its effects are experienced by all, whether they realize it or not. I never speak directly to people, though for you, an exception needs to be made... well, let me not get ahead of myself. I should explain as much as I can to you.’ The voice fades. It seems to be waiting for you to get ready for something, perhaps whatever story it is about to tell.'
chinese: '你找了这么久，却没看见一直摆在眼前的东西？不过你一直没死，说明你要么足够敏锐，要么运气极好。无论如何，你已经无需再继续追寻，因为你所追寻的，正是我。让我正式自我介绍：我是一位来自天堂的天使，人们通常称我为指引之光。我的工作发生在你看不见的领域，但它的影响会落在所有人身上，无论他们是否意识到。我通常不会直接向人说话，但对你，我得破例……嗯，别急，我应该尽量向你解释清楚。' 声音渐渐淡去，像是在等你为接下来的故事做好准备。

english: Sought After
chinese: 所寻之物

english: 'You lit a fire just for me?' The voice sounds genuinely flattered. 'Well, that’s… awfully nice of you. I’ll start right away'
chinese: '你专门为我生了火？' 那道声音听起来是真心被取悦了。'那……那也太贴心了。我这就开始。'

english: This is not what I was expecting, to say the least.
chinese: 这跟我预想的可差得太远了。

english: 'I was wondering when you'd begin to notice, or if you would ever notice. I'm proud of you. Allow me to explain some things. I am a celestial being, named Guiding Light. I perform my work on a realm you can't sense with your mind, though there are some that use something else to see it. Everyone has what they need already with them, so you were wise to look inward... hmm. I wonder, can you find it now?’ The voice fades. It seems to be waiting for you to do something.'
chinese: '我一直在想，你究竟什么时候才能察觉到，或者说，你是否永远都不会察觉。我为你感到骄傲。让我给你解释一些事吧。我是一位天界存在，名为指引之光。我的工作发生在一个你无法凭理智直接感知的领域，不过也有些人会用别的方式看见它。每个人需要的东西，其实早就带在自己身上了，所以你选择向内探寻，确实很明智……嗯。我在想，你现在能找到了吗？' 声音渐渐淡去，似乎在等你做点什么。

english: Known
chinese: 明悟

english: 'Hah! He does often appear in fire, doesn’t he?' While the voice has previously come from within your mind, this time it seems to speak from within the fire you lit. 'You might know yet. We’ll see over time. For now, I have a lot to share with you.'
chinese: '哈！他确实经常借火显现，不是吗？' 以往那道声音都是从你脑海中响起，而这一次，它仿佛是从你点燃的火焰里传出来的。'你也许终有一天会真正明白。我们慢慢看吧。现在，我还有很多事想告诉你。'

english: Reach level 2 on either of the following skills:
chinese: 将以下任意一项技能提升到 2 级：

chinese: 专注

chinese: 感知

english: What choice do I really have?
chinese: 说到底，我还有别的选吗？

english: You decide to return to this voice, whatever that even means. You can't really *return* to something you don't know... but seconds after you make your decision, you hear it again. 'Welcome back'. It speaks not in a sarcastic tone, but a genuine, inviting one, as if a child has returned home to its parent.
chinese: 你决定重新回到这道声音身边，虽然这话本身也说不太通。你其实没法“回到”一个自己根本不认识的存在那里去……可就在你做出决定后的几秒钟，它又响起了。'欢迎回来。' 它的语气里没有讥讽，只有真诚与邀请，像是一个孩子回到了父母身边。

english: Return
chinese: 回头

english: (See next quest)
chinese: （见下一任务）

english: Continue
chinese: 继续

english: If I choose what I do, but someone already knows what I choose... How does that work??
chinese: 如果我的选择由我自己做出，但又早已有人知道我会怎么选……这到底该怎么算？

english: 'Where do I begin... well, you know the tale of Tarkov better than most, since your company sent you here. You know about TerraGroup, you know the conflict, you probably know the result to some extent... but I doubt you know much about the cultists here. You see, the combination of TerraGroup's misdeeds and the activity of the cult have... done something. We know that the Father knows; He knows everything. And all things are accounted for in His plan, so whatever is happening is allowed to be happening. ...That being said, we don't take lightly to someone creating whatever this has become. Disrupting the natural flow of life and death... Ah, yes, I should probably mention that. There is no death here anymore. What you kill comes back, and when someone eventually kills you, you'll come back too. Fun, right? Now, someone like me having such blatant and sustained contact with one of His children is abnormal... but, Tarkov is quite abnormal at the moment. I was instructed to do this, anyways. To provide you with some guidance. What you choose to do from here, whether it's aligned with my assistance or not, is up to you. It always has been, and always will be your choice. For whatever you choose is foreknown by Him and Him alone, and we trust that He has accounted for it, for He has. So while I hope you choose to listen to me, just know that really, it is up to you. You benefit, after all. ...Alright, I've talked your ears out by now. Enjoy a bit of a rest; that's how all of man's labor should start. I will contact you again soon. Farewell, friend.'
chinese: '该从哪里说起呢……你比大多数人都更清楚塔科夫的故事，毕竟是你的公司把你送来了这里。你知道 TerraGroup，知道这场冲突，也大概知道它造成了什么后果……但我怀疑你并不了解这里的邪教徒。TerraGroup 的恶行和邪教的活动叠加在一起，造成了某些……变化。我们知道，天父知晓一切；凡事都在祂的计划之中，所以眼前发生的一切，都是被允许发生的。……但即便如此，我们也不会轻视那些把这里变成如今这副模样的人。生与死的自然秩序被打乱了……对，这点你已经亲身经历过了。这里已经没有真正的死亡。你杀掉的会回来，当别人最终杀了你，你也会回来。很有趣，对吧？像我这样的存在，持续而明显地与祂的一位子民保持联系，本来是非常异常的……但现在的塔科夫，本身就异常得离谱。无论如何，我是奉命而来，为你提供一些引导。接下来你要怎么做，是否要接受我的帮助，始终都由你自己决定。一直如此，也永远如此。因为你所做的一切选择，唯有祂早已知晓；而我们相信，祂已经将一切都算在了计划里，因为祂确实如此。所以，尽管我希望你愿意听我说，但你要知道，真正做决定的人始终是你。获益的人也终究是你。……好了，我已经说得够久了。先好好休息一下吧，人类的一切劳作，都该从休息开始。我会很快再联系你。再会，朋友。'

english: A Story by the Fire
chinese: 火边的故事

chinese: 你感觉那道存在渐渐远去。某种直觉告诉你，它还会再回来。

english: You call out to the voice, however that even works. Can you call out to something you aren't sure of? Apparently, yes, because you get a response. 'Hello, dear traveler. You seem lost. What brings you to a place like this?' You question whether to answer it, but it continues after a few seconds. 'Well, whatever the reason, you are here now. You can't seem to leave either; even death couldn't free you. Yes, I watched you die. I've seen all that you've experienced here; but do not be afraid, for I am an angel of Heaven. Please, call me Guiding Light. I want to help you. May I?' The voice ceases after the question.
chinese: 你朝那道声音喊了回去，虽然你自己也不知道这到底是怎么做到的。你真的能向某个自己都无法确定的存在喊话吗？显然可以，因为你得到了回应。'你好，亲爱的旅人。你看起来迷路了。是什么把你带到了这种地方？' 你还在犹豫要不要回答，它却在几秒后继续说道。'不过，不管原因是什么，你现在已经在这里了。而且你似乎也离不开；就连死亡都没能让你解脱。没错，我看见了你的死亡。我见证了你在这里经历的一切；但不要害怕，因为我是来自天堂的天使。请称我为指引之光。我想帮助你。可以吗？' 问完这句话后，声音停了下来。

english: I had a fun idea, as a test of your current intelligence. Are you able to identify differneces between what seems to be identical things? If I were to give you the same quest 7 times, but only one was the 'true' one, would you be able to figure it out? There's no penalty for failure, but you will be rewarded if you succeed. You only get one try, though, so take your time!

english: Remember that special challenge I had for you a while ago? Here's a harder version of that. You have as many tries of you need. Aim high, aim well, and good luck!
