english: Lemme grab a tent while I'm at it.
chinese: 顺便再带顶帐篷得了。

english: Does it get tiring holding that gun up all the time? Espeically if you're waiting for the other person to come to you, you could run out of stamina at the wrong time... you should try bracing your weapon against something. A wall, a box, a bipod, a ledge, there's a lot of places you can set up. Helps with the recoil too! Go give that a try.
chinese: 一直端着枪很累吧？尤其是等别人来找你的时候，体力说不定会在最糟的时候见底……你该试试把武器支在什么东西上。墙边、箱子、两脚架、矮沿，能架枪的地方可不少。后坐力也会好控制些。去试试看吧。

english: BONUS QUEST: Mounting a defense
chinese: 奖励任务：架起防线

english: Did that provide a bit of a rest for your arms? Mounting has its drawbacks, but it does have real advantages as well. Know when it's best to be mobile and when it's best to hunker down!
chinese: 手臂是不是轻松点了？架枪有缺点，但优势也确实存在。该机动的时候机动，该固守的时候固守。

english: Did you enjoy all of those custom challenges I had for you? I spent quite a while coming up with them (and coding them, 4th wall break). In fact, they were *so* fun, what if we did them all again? ...You know there's a catch. You get five lives to do it. On the fifth death, the quest fails, and you restart. I'll track for you, don't worry. ...And yes, the number are reduced. You're welcome.
chinese: 我给你准备的那些自定义挑战，玩得还开心吗？我可是花了不少时间才想出来的（还顺手把它们写进去了，第四面墙先破一下）。既然它们*这么*好玩，那不如我们再全来一遍？……当然，有条件。你只有五条命。死到第五次，任务就会失败，然后你得重来。我会替你记着，别担心。……对了，数字我已经帮你下调过了。不用谢。

english: I'm... alive?
chinese: 我……还活着？

english: During your attempt to discern an answer, you met an unfortunate end... ...or, didn't you? Then why are you still here? You wonder. This can't have been just a nightmare, right? Though it would explain the voice you heard... No, everything looks just the same; it can't have been a dream... You conclude, in your confusion, that your only option is to carry on... though you swear you can hear the voice again, this time with no understandable words. Despite that, you get the sense that you need to venture out again.
chinese: 在你试图分辨答案时，你迎来了一个不怎么走运的结局……还是说，其实没有？那你为什么还在这里？你不禁发问。这总不可能只是场噩梦吧？虽然那样倒是能解释你听见的声音……不，一切看起来都和原来一样；这不可能只是梦……你在混乱中得出结论，自己唯一能做的就是继续下去……只是你发誓又听见了那道声音，这一次却听不懂任何词。即便如此，你仍有种感觉：你得再出去一趟。

english: Cut Short
chinese: 戛然而止

english: The voice grows louder each raid, growing from almost nothing to a whisper, to a murmur, to a soft voice. It suddenly speaks to you with clear, but duplicated words: 'You've run around quite enough. You are tired, confused, lost... Rest, and come to me.' With that, the voice fades out.
chinese: 那道声音在每场战局里都变得更响，从几乎听不见，到耳语，到低声呢喃，再到柔和的说话声。它突然用清晰却重叠的词句对你说道：'你已经兜够圈子了。你很疲惫、很困惑、也迷失了……休息一下，到我这里来。' 说完，声音便淡去了。

english: Complete 3 raids
chinese: 成功撤离 3 次

english: I'm going crazy...
chinese: 我要疯了……
finish_summary: Quest[target=683c03613064d9810dfbe0fe; status=2] || CounterCreator[kills(target=Any,value=1,distance=5555,daytime=0-0)] || Quest[target=68452e81ed96a8107bd8763a; status=4] || Quest[target=68452e81ed96a8107bd8763a; status=4] || Quest[target=68452e81ed96a8107bd8763a; status=4]

english: You recall what the voice said... 'Rest, and come to me.' You don't really know how you can 'go' to a voice you can't identify, but perhaps you can call out to it...? You can hear it, so maybe it will hear you. It sounded like two voices merged together though... is it one entity or two? You can't tell... You get the sense that you can't put this decision off any longer. Even if they're just hallucinations, would listening to them even hurt anymore?
chinese: 你回想起那道声音说过的话……'休息一下，到我这里来。' 你根本不知道该怎么“去”找一个连来源都辨认不出的声音，但也许你可以朝它喊话……？你能听见它，所以它说不定也能听见你。只是那声音听起来像是两道声线混在了一起……到底是一个存在，还是两个？你分不清……你隐约觉得，这个决定已经不能再拖了。就算这只是幻觉，听它们一次又还能坏到哪去？
finish_summary: Quest[target=683c03613064d9810dfbe0fe; status=2] || CounterCreator[kills(target=Any,value=1,distance=5555,daytime=0-0)] || Quest[target=68452e81ed96a8107bd8763a; status=4] || Quest[target=68452e81ed96a8107bd8763a; status=4] || Quest[target=68452e81ed96a8107bd8763a; status=4]

chinese: ***那些声音……又来了***

english: I seem to be left without a choice
chinese: 看来我已经别无选择了

english: You die again... yet find yourself back at your hideout once more. If the first death wasn't confirmation, this has to be; death has no operation in Tarkov, or at least, you seem to fall out of its clutches. You haven't found a way out of this place yet, either... ...the voice have only grown louder, almost becoming understandable. It sounds echoed. Perhaps it's time to confront it, if that's even possible.
chinese: 你又死了一次……却再次在藏身处醒来。如果第一次死亡还不足以证明什么，那这次已经够了：死亡在塔科夫似乎已经失去了作用，至少它抓不住你。你也依然没找到离开这里的办法……那道声音则只会越来越响，几乎快能听清了。听起来还带着回音。也许，是时候正面回应它了，前提是这真的做得到。

english: Death is No Escape
chinese: 死亡也不是出路

english: It suddenly speaks to you with clear, but duplicated words: 'You've run around quite enough. You are tired, confused, lost... Rest, and come to me.' With that, the voice fades out.
chinese: 它突然用清晰却重叠的词句对你说道：'你已经兜够圈子了。你很疲惫、很困惑、也迷失了……休息一下，到我这里来。' 说完，声音便淡去了。

english: Casually chatting with an otherwordly being
chinese: 与异界存在闲聊。

english: 'Like I've said, you're doing pretty well for yourself, all things considered. You've spent a considerable amount of time here, yet have only died once. ...Ah, yes, I should probably touch on that matter. For starters, let me introduce myself. I am an angel of Heaven, named 'Guiding Light'. I've been watching over Tarkov since before you were sent here, and have seen quite a lot of what has happened. It... well, hah, this will be a long story. How about you light a little fire to sit by while I rant a bit?'
chinese: '正如我之前说的，综合来看，你目前表现得已经相当不错了。你在这里待了不短的时间，却只死过一次。……啊，对，我大概也该提提这件事。先让我自我介绍一下。我是来自天堂的天使，名为“指引之光”。从你被送来这里之前，我就一直注视着塔科夫，也见证了这里发生的许多事。这……嗯，哈，说来话长。不如你先生堆小火，我们边坐边聊，我慢慢和你说？'

english: Conversation with an Otherwordly Being(1)
chinese: 与异界存在的交谈（1）

english: 'Perfect''. (See next quest)
chinese: '很好。'（见下一任务）

english: Call out to the voices
chinese: 向那些声音喊话

english: Hand over any flammable material
chinese: 上交任意可燃材料

english: If I choose what I do, but someone already knows what I choose... How does that work??
chinese: 如果我的选择由我自己做出，但又早已有人知道我会怎么选……这到底该怎么算？

english: 'Where do I begin... well, you know the tale of Tarkov better than most, since your company sent you here. You know about TerraGroup, you know the conflict, you probably know the result to some extent... but I doubt you know much about the cultists here. You see, the combination of TerraGroup's misdeeds and the activity of the cult have... done something. We know that the Father knows; He knows everything. And all things are accounted for in His plan, so whatever is happening is allowed to be happening. ...That being said, we don't take lightly to someone creating whatever this has become. Disrupting the natural flow of life and death... Well, you've experienced this already. There is no death here anymore. What you kill comes back, and when you die again, you'll come back too. Fun, right? Now, someone like me having such blatant and sustained contact with one of His children is abnormal... but, Tarkov is quite abnormal at the moment. I was instructed to do this, anyway. To provide you with some guidance. What you choose to do from here, whether it's aligned with my assistance or not, is up to you. It always has been, and always will be your choice. For whatever you choose is foreknown by Him and Him alone, and we trust that He has accounted for it, for He has. So while I hope you choose to listen to me, just know that really, it is up to you. You benefit, after all. ...Alright, I've talked your ears off by now. Enjoy a bit of a rest; that's how all of man's labor should start. I will contact you again soon. Farewell, friend.'
chinese: '该从哪里说起呢……你比大多数人都更清楚塔科夫的故事，毕竟是你的公司把你送来了这里。你知道 TerraGroup，知道这场冲突，也大概知道它造成了什么后果……但我怀疑你并不了解这里的邪教徒。TerraGroup 的恶行和邪教的活动叠加在一起，造成了某些……变化。我们知道，天父知晓一切；凡事都在祂的计划之中，所以眼前发生的一切，都是被允许发生的。……但即便如此，我们也不会轻视那些把这里变成如今这副模样的人。生与死的自然秩序被打乱了……嗯，这点你已经亲身经历过了。这里已经没有真正的死亡。你杀掉的会回来，而等你再次死去时，你也会回来。很有趣，对吧？像我这样的存在，持续而明显地与祂的一位子民保持联系，本来是非常异常的……但现在的塔科夫，本身就异常得离谱。无论如何，我是奉命而来，为你提供一些引导。接下来你要怎么做，是否要接受我的帮助，始终都由你自己决定。一直如此，也永远如此。因为你所做的一切选择，唯有祂早已知晓；而我们相信，祂已经将一切都算在了计划里，因为祂确实如此。所以，尽管我希望你愿意听我说，但你要知道，真正做决定的人始终是你。获益的人也终究是你。……好了，我已经说得够久了。先好好休息一下吧，人类的一切劳作，都该从休息开始。我会很快再联系你。再会，朋友。'

english: A Story by the Fire
chinese: 火边的故事

quest_name: BONUS QUEST: A real Loyalty Buyout

english: You know how Skier has some tasks where you just hand him a bunch of money? Yeah, kinda dumb. So I thought, 'Hey, what if you did something like that for the other traders, but it actually benefitted you in some way?' Like, you're not just handing over money because they said so, but you're actually purchasing stuff from them? So, how about you do just that. Spend the equivalent of 2 million roubles with the 7 core traders. ...actually, skip Skier. He doesn't deserve it.
chinese: 你知道 Skier 有些任务就是让你直接交一大笔钱吧？对，挺蠢的。所以我就在想：“要是你也给其他商人做类似的事，但这次至少能给你点实际好处，会怎样？”也就是说，你不是单纯把钱白送出去，而是真的去他们那儿买东西。那就这么干吧。和 6 个核心商人的消费额各做到 200 万卢布。……哦，Skier 就算了，他不配。

chinese: 它们怎么知道我是在喊哪一个……咦，还真管用。

english: You call out to the higher-pitched voice. You aren't sure how to make it clear which one you're calling out to, you just sort of... intend it towards that one. 'Hello', the voice says calmly, warmly. 'I was wondering when you would respond to me. You seem to be doing alright for yourself, in spite of the death you suffered earlier. ...Yes, I'm afraid to say that you *did*, in fact, perish. Yet, you are still here. ...I think we have a lot to talk about.'
chinese: 你朝那道更尖细的声音喊了回去。你也不太确定该怎么让对方明白你是在叫哪一个，你只是……把这个念头投向了它。'你好。' 那声音平静而温和地说道。'我一直在想，你什么时候才会回应我。看起来你状态还算不错，尽管你之前已经死过一次。……是的，很遗憾地告诉你，你确实已经死了。可你依然还在这里。……我想，我们有很多话要说。'

english: The Higher-pitched Voice
chinese: 那道更尖细的声音

english: (See next quest)
chinese: （见下一任务）

english: What... what just happened.
chinese: 这……刚才到底发生了什么。

english: You can't decide. Or, perhaps, you want to choose both. Or neither. Either way, the voices suddenly grow deafeningly loud, like yelling. The temperature in the hideout spikes, the hairs on your body standing straight up. You feel as if a war is being waged right in front of you, though nothing is visibly happening. You feel a need to run, but you can't move either. Eternity passes, but no time has elapsed at all. Silence floods the hideout as quickly as it was broken. The voices dissapear.
chinese: 你拿不定主意。又或者，你想两边都选。再或者，干脆谁都不选。不管怎样，那两道声音突然变得震耳欲聋，像是在彼此怒吼。藏身处里的温度骤然升高，你全身汗毛都竖了起来。你感觉仿佛有一场战争正在自己眼前爆发，可实际上什么都看不见。你本能地想逃，却连动都动不了。仿佛过了永恒之久，可实际上时间一秒都没过去。寂静像来时一样迅速重新淹没了藏身处。那两道声音消失了。

english: Both Voices...?
chinese: 两道声音……？

english: ***Be careful what quest you complete next.***
chinese: ***接下来完成哪个任务，务必小心。***

english: Continue
chinese: 继续

english: Continue
chinese: 继续

english: Which one...
chinese: 到底该选哪一个……

english: 'Hello???' You hear the higher pitched voice calling out to you, separated from the other and clear as the night sky. 'Hello, can you hear me? Do you understand me?' The voice seems almost desperate for you to answer them. It fades in and out, traded with the other voice. You get the sense that they are separated for good now, and that calling out to both won't work this time.
chinese: '喂？喂？' 你听见那道偏高的声音在呼唤你。它已从另一道声音中分离出来，清澈得像夜空。'喂，你听得到我吗？你能明白我说的话吗？' 那声音似乎几乎是在恳求你回应。它时隐时现，与另一道声音交替浮现。你隐约感觉，它们这次是真的彻底分开了，而同时呼唤两边这一招已经行不通了。

english: Connection
chinese: 建立联系

english: 'Oh, thank goodness!' The voice seems rather relieved that you picked them. Or, do they even know about the choice you had? You'll have to ask another time, as the voice continues to rush on. 'Thank goodness. I was getting worried about... well, about many things. But...' You can hear the voice take a deep breath. It must be a living being of some sort, then. It continues. '...now, all is well. I apologize for being so flustered, I just... well, I have a lot to talk with you about.'
chinese: '哦，谢天谢地！' 那声音似乎明显因为你选了它而松了口气。或者说，它到底知不知道你刚才有得选？这问题只能以后再问，因为它已经急匆匆地继续说了下去。'谢天谢地。我刚才真的开始担心了……嗯，很多事。但……' 你听见它深吸了一口气。那说明它大概是某种活物。它继续说道。'……现在没事了。抱歉我刚才那么慌乱，我只是……嗯，我有很多话想和你说。'

english: It seems you can only pick one...
chinese: 看来你只能选一个……

english: Casually chatting with an otherwordly being
chinese: 与异界存在闲聊。

english: 'I haven't even introduced myself... What a mess this has all been. Anyways. I am angel sent from Heaven. I am most often referred to as 'Guiding Light', though that's a story for another time. I've been here for a while now, in search of someone... that one might be you.' The voice pauses for a moment, as if waiting for you to confirm or deny the claim. '...well, the fact that you can communicate with me is enough proof for now. In that case...' The voice pauses again, though it seems to be busy with something. 'In that case, yes, I have a lot to tell you. Like, a LOT. Do you have the time for it?'
chinese: '我甚至还没自我介绍……这整件事真是一团乱。总之，我是从天堂被派来的天使。别人通常称我为“指引之光”，不过那又是另一个故事了。我已经在这里待了一阵子，一直在寻找某个人……而那个人，或许就是你。' 那声音停顿了片刻，像是在等你确认或否认这句话。'……不过，就凭你能和我交流，这一点暂时就足够证明了。既然如此……' 那声音又停了一下，像是正在忙什么。'既然如此，是的，我有很多事要告诉你。很多很多。你有时间听吗？'

english: Conversation with an Otherwordly Being(2)
chinese: 与异界存在的交谈（2）

english: 'A fire...? Ohhh, I see!' You feel the voice preparing for quite the speech.
chinese: '生火……？哦哦，我明白了！' 你感觉那道声音已经准备好要长篇大论了。

english: ***Your character makes an exhasperated sigh***
chinese: ***你的角色发出一声疲惫的长叹***

english: 'I can see you're rather reserved about this.' It's spoken like a statement, but you know it's asking you as well. 'I understand it, I do. Nothing makes sense right now. You're hearing voices, you've died and come back to life, nothing seems to change.' The voice speaks slowly, carefully, clearly trying to win you over. 'I can explain some of these things. Not everything, because there are some things I don't know either. But what I do know, I can tell you. ...if you're willing?'
chinese: '我看得出来，你对这件事很是保留。' 这句话听起来像陈述，但你知道它其实也是在问你。'我理解，真的。现在没有任何事说得通。你在听见声音，你死了又活回来，而且什么都没有改变。' 那声音说得很慢，很谨慎，显然是在努力说服你。'这些事里，有些我可以解释。不是全部，因为也有些事连我都不知道。但我知道的，我都可以告诉你。……前提是，你愿意。'

english: Reluctant Cooperation
chinese: 勉强合作

english: Why not, right? Why not listen to some voice explain what's going on? You decide to start a small fire outside your hideout, moreso to watch the flame than anything else. As it burns, however, you feel a presence join you. (See next quest)
chinese: 反正都这样了，不是吗？为什么不听听某个声音解释一下到底发生了什么？你决定在藏身处外点一小堆火，更多只是为了看着火焰发呆。然而当火焰燃起时，你感觉到有某种存在坐到了你身边。（见下一任务）

chinese: 上交任意可燃材料

chinese: 奖励任务没有接取文案。

english: I've noticed you have a spot for... other people to deliver you items? That's strange, are they maybe sent by the traders? Hmm... well, I guess we'll see what happens. Tell you what, I'll keep watch for you while you're out and about. I'll let you know what happens.
chinese: 我注意到你好像有个……能让别人给你送东西的位置？真奇怪，是商人派来的？嗯……好吧，那就看看会发生什么。这样吧，你在外面跑的时候，我替你盯着点。有情况我会告诉你。

english: BONUS QUEST: Questionable Visitors
chinese: 奖励任务：可疑的访客

english: ...just so you know, the cultists don't come and collect your offerings. It gets burnt up in a fire and replaced with something else. It's like something out of Exodus, it concerns me. The scavs are quite nice at least, they drop off random stuff, sometimes valuable too. They show up drunk sometimes, though... what's up with that?
chinese: ……先跟你说一声，来拿走供品的其实不是邪教徒。那些东西会在火里烧掉，然后换成别的东西。这感觉跟《Exodus》里似的，让我有点不安。至少 Scav 们还挺友善的，他们会送来些乱七八糟的东西，有时还挺值钱。就是他们有时候醉醺醺地过来……这又是什么情况？

english: Collect from the Scav case 15 times
chinese: 从 Scav 宝箱中收取 15 次

english: Collect from the Cultists 15 times
chinese: 收取邪教徒供品 15 次

english: I can do this, I know I can
chinese: 我能行，我知道我能行

english: You don't need some disembodied voice to help you. You're a PMC, dangit! You'll figure out this mess one way or another, like you always have. You're still here, you've made it this far... ...though, you did die earlier. But who cares, you're still here. You don't want to be here, but you're here, and you'll find a way out. You know you will.
chinese: 你不需要什么无形无体的声音来帮你。你可是 PMC，见鬼！你总会像以前一样，想办法把这摊烂事弄明白。你还在这里，你已经走到这一步了……虽说你之前的确死过。但那又怎样，你还是在这里。你不想留在这里，可你偏偏就在这里，而你一定能找到出去的办法。你知道自己能做到。

english: Continue Your Search
chinese: 继续寻找

english: No matter where you look, no matter what exit you take, you can't find a single thing that might help you. It doesn't seem like there's any way out of here, at least, any quick way. As you sit down to accept this fact, you hear a familiar voice.
chinese: 不管你往哪找，不管你走哪个撤离点，你都找不到任何可能帮上忙的东西。看起来这里根本没有离开的办法，至少没有什么快速的办法。当你坐下来，准备接受这个事实时，你又听见了那道熟悉的声音。

chinese: 完成 5 场战局

english: Stocks are an invaluable tool when it comes to assisting in recoil control. Instead of leaving it all to your hands, your shoulder and really your entire body can help absorb it. Let's take that away, shall we? You have to use an assault rifle, by the way. No cheating by using something that already has no stock!
chinese: 枪托在后坐力控制上价值极大。不是全靠双手硬吃后坐力，你的肩膀，甚至整个身体，都能帮你分担。那我们就把它拿掉，怎么样？顺便说一句，你得用突击步枪，别耍赖去拿本来就没枪托的东西。

english: Taking stock (literally)
chinese: 没了枪托

english: Was that harder than you expected? I told you, stocks are really important.
chinese: 是不是比你想的还难？我早说了，枪托真的很重要。

chinese: 使用未安装枪托的突击步枪击杀 25 名敌人

english: Wait... what's the last task going to be, if this is the fourth?
chinese: 等等……如果这是第四项，那最后一项会是什么？

english: Remember how we talked about the two main ways to increase recoil control? You can't use either of them now. Still have to use an assault rifle, by the way,
chinese: 还记得我们说过的那两种主要控后坐力手段吗？现在这两样你都不能用。顺带一提，还是得用突击步枪。

english: Out of control
chinese: 彻底失控

english: Hahahahaha... oh, you are so not ready for the next task. You shouldn't have completed this one, now you're in for it.
chinese: 哈哈哈哈哈……哦，你还完全没准备好面对下一项。你就不该把这项做完，现在有你好受的。

chinese: 使用未安装枪托和前握把的突击步枪击杀 35 名敌人

english: This... is hell...
chinese: 这……简直是地狱……

english: Stocks. Foregrips. Both important, right? You poor soul. Use every single one. You have to kill a PMC as well, no picking on the scavs. Enjoy the suffering!
chinese: 枪托。前握把。都很重要，对吧？你可真倒霉。把每一种都给我用一遍。而且这次必须杀 PMC，别去拿 Scav 充数。好好享受这份痛苦吧！

english: Suffer.
chinese: 受苦吧。

english: I can't believe you actually did this. Are you insane? What the heck. You must really, really care about recoil control. Well, good job. ...you want something for it? What, I'm an angel. Uhm... here, there's a little something in the corner of your shelter you never noticed. Go grab that.
chinese: 我真不敢相信你居然真做到了。你疯了吗？搞什么鬼。你对后坐力控制还真是执着。干得不错。……还想要点奖励？怎么，我可是天使。嗯……这样吧，你藏身处角落里有个你一直没注意到的小东西，去拿走吧。

english: Weren't there two tasks in the beginning? I guess only one looked like this, though...

english: How to train your memory... hmmm.... I'll have to think about that. While I do that, why don't you remember the first thing you did when you came to Tarkov? It'll be a fun experience, reliving the first day on the job.
chinese: 记忆力该怎么练呢……嗯……我得想想。趁我想的时候，不如你先回忆一下自己刚来塔科夫时做的第一件事？重新体验一下第一天上岗，应该挺有意思的。

english: Reliving your first day
chinese: 重温第一天

english: Tell me... did you enjoy your first day here in Tarkov? For all that's happened, I still like to think Tarkov is enjoyable, if nothing else.
chinese: 告诉我……你在塔科夫的第一天过得开心吗？不管后来发生了多少事，我还是愿意相信，这地方至少还有点乐趣。

english: Do you remember?
chinese: 你还记得吗？

english: Do you remember?
chinese: 你还记得吗？

english: Bold of you to assume I like this guy
chinese: 你倒是挺敢想，居然默认我喜欢这家伙。

english: What would be important to remember... hmmm... Oh! When you first meet a new friend! That's a memory worth cherishing. There's one trader here you met in a unique way, right?
chinese: 该记住什么才重要呢……嗯……啊，对了！第一次见到新朋友的时候！那可是值得珍藏的回忆。这里有个商人，你和他第一次见面的方式挺特别，对吧？

english: When you first met
chinese: 初次相识

english: Friends are quite important to have. He seems friendly, doesn't he? Just a calm, solid guy.
chinese: 朋友还是很重要的。他看起来挺友善，不是吗？稳稳当当的一个人。

english: Do you remember?
chinese: 你还记得吗？

english: It's one way to keep the peace, eh?
chinese: 这也算是在“维护和平”吧？

english: Hmm... that last two were pretty easy, don't you think? I mean, I certainly picked ones you would definitely remember. Let's do a harder one. Hmmm... Ooooh, I know. Do you remember the first elimination task the Peacekeeper gave you? You only have to get one kill for me instead of the normal amount this time, but any other rules apply. Makes it quicker, but makes the remembering harder. Seriously, no cheating!
chinese: 嗯……前两个很简单，对吧？毕竟我挑的本来就是你肯定记得住的。那这次来个难点的。嗯……哦，我知道了。你还记得 Peacekeeper 交给你的第一个清剿任务吗？这回你只需要替我杀一个，不用按原来的数量来，但其他条件照旧。这样会快些，不过也更考验你的记忆。说真的，不准作弊！

english: Doing their dirty work
chinese: 替他们干脏活

english: Good job! Only one more to go.
chinese: 干得不错！还剩最后一个。

english: Do you remember?
chinese: 你还记得吗？

english: Up to me?
chinese: 由我决定？

english: Occasionally, you have to make a choice in Tarkov. Usually, it's combat choices, but every once in a while, the choice is related to your tasks, and you have to pick which person to please, and which to upset. Do you remember the first task that gave you such a choice?
chinese: 在塔科夫，你偶尔总得做些选择。大多数时候是战斗里的临场判断，但有时候任务本身也会逼你站队，让你决定该讨好谁、又该得罪谁。你还记得第一个逼你做这种选择的任务吗？

english: Up to you
chinese: 由你决定

english: Who did you pick in the end?
chinese: 所以，你最后选了谁？

english: Do you remember?
chinese: 你还记得吗？

english: Well that's just fantatsic.
chinese: 这可真是太棒了。

english: The final search quest... ...hmm. Alright, let's go non-canon for a bit. Consider the 4th wall broken, player, cause I'm gonna tell you exactly how this works. I have hidden a wooden cross somewhere in Tarkov. Dynamic Maps can't find it, and the location moves on each update, unless no one has found it yet. I'll provide you the map it's on and a single hint. Good luck. (CURRENT MAP: Customs. CURRENT HINT: 'In a building where many have been deceived')
chinese: 最后一个搜索任务……嗯。好吧，咱们这次稍微跳出设定。玩家，就当第四面墙已经破了，因为我要直接告诉你这任务怎么运作。我把一枚木十字架藏在了塔科夫某处。Dynamic Maps找不到它，而且每次更新它的位置都会变，除非还没人找到。我要告诉你它在哪张地图上，再给你一个提示。祝你好运。（当前地图：海关。当前提示：‘在一栋让许多人上当的建筑里’）

english: A Game of Hide and Seek
chinese: 捉迷藏

english: Oho! Well done. Very, very well done.
chinese: 哦吼！干得好。非常，非常好。

english: Find the cross and turn it in.
chinese: 找到十字架并上交。

english: Uhm... no. That's not fun.
chinese: 呃……不，这一点都不好玩。

english: You wanna do something fun? Well, 'fun' might be a... subjective term, here. Since we've been doing all this work on taking care of weapons, I got to thinking... aren't attatchments important as well? I mean, a flashlight won't shoot a bullet, but that doesn't make it useless. So, let's get a good sample of every kind of weapon attachment. Should be fun, right? Don't worry, I'll make it even better: All found in raid! Enjoy taking apart your enemy's guns and giving the parts to me. Whatever 'giving' to me looks like. I'll think of a way to compensate you, don't worry. Oh... I'm not updating this list, by the way. Any new parts that get added, those won't count. Gotta find the OG stuff.
chinese: 想玩点有意思的？嗯，这里的“有意思”可能……比较主观。既然我们一直在忙着保养武器，我就在想……配件不也很重要吗？我的意思是，手电虽然打不出子弹，但不代表它没用。所以，去给我弄一套尽可能齐全的武器配件样本吧。应该很好玩，对吧？别担心，我还能让它更刺激点：全部都得是战局中找到的！好好享受拆敌人枪、再把零件交给我的过程吧。至于“交给我”具体是什么样……我再想办法。放心，我会补偿你的。哦……顺便说一句，这份清单我不会更新。以后新增的配件不算数。你得找最老那批原版件。

english: Complete knowledge of firearms
chinese: 枪械通晓

english: Very well done! That was quite a lot of parts. I was able to fuse them together into some extra repair kits... don't ask how.
chinese: 干得很漂亮！这零件可真不少。我把它们熔在一起，又弄出了几套额外的修理包……别问怎么做到的。

chinese: 在战局中找到2个两脚架

english: Turns out we only adjusted a couple Charisma quests. Nice!
chinese: 结果我们只改了几个魅力任务。挺好！

english: Actually, we redid some of Attention to work better, as well as AD3. Oh well!
chinese: 其实我们还重做了一部分专注任务，还有 AD3。算了吧！

english: This isn't a good sign.
chinese: 这可不是什么好兆头。

english: Ah, so you want to work on your recoil control? The recoil is good enough now, I thought. Oh well, why not reduce it even further. Get used to how guns feel without a foregrip, first
chinese: 啊，所以你想练后坐力控制？我还以为现在已经够好压了。算了，那就再往下压一点。先适应一下没装前握把时枪是什么手感。

english: Losing your grip
chinese: 没了握把

english: Harder to control, right? Next one should be easier.
chinese: 更难控了吧？下一项应该会轻松点。

english: Kill 10 enemies without a foregrip
chinese: 在未安装前握把的情况下击杀 10 名敌人

english: This will be the only fun one, won't it...
chinese: 这应该会是唯一有意思的一项了吧……

english: One of the best ways to increase your recoil control is with a foregrip. It gives you a much better way to hold your gun than simply grabbing the handguard from the underside. Put one on and see if it makes a difference!
chinese: 提升后坐力控制最好的办法之一就是装前握把。比起单纯从下方抓住护木，它能让你握枪稳得多。装一个上去，看看差别吧！

english: Getting a grip
chinese: 握得住了

english: Much easier to control? Good. Now let's have some REAL fun,
chinese: 好控多了吧？很好。现在该来点真正的乐子了。

english: Kill 20 enemies with a foregrip
chinese: 在安装前握把的情况下击杀 20 名敌人

english: We need to re-write most of the quests in this section. How fun!
chinese: 这部分的大多数任务都得重写。真有意思啊！

english: This is not what I was expecting, to say the least.
chinese: 这跟我预想的可差得太远了。

english: 'I must say, you've got quite an eye for things. You've found no shortage of things in this place, and most importantly, you've found yourself here to begin with. Where is here, you ask? Well, that depends on who you ask. To some, it's hell. To some, it's paradise. For me, well, I simply find myself here like you. Though I suppose I'm here in a different way than you. You see, I am actaully an angel. Yes, a heavenly angel, sent by God to this place. Better yet, I've been sent to find you.' The voice pauses, and you ask it what it means when it says it was sent to find you. 'Well... why don't you get a fire going and get comfortable. I have a lot to explain to you.'
chinese: '我得说，你的观察力很强。在这地方你已经找到了不少东西，最重要的是，你一开始就发现自己身在此处。你问这里是哪儿？这得看问的人是谁。对有的人来说，这里是地狱。对有的人来说，这里是天堂。对我来说，我和你一样。只是我来的方式不同。你看，我其实是一位天使。没错，来自天堂的天使，由上帝派来这里。准确地说，是被派来找你的。' 它停顿了，你问它“被派来找你”是什么意思。'呃……好吧，先弄个火，先坐舒服点。我有很多话要跟你解释。'

english: Found
chinese: 发现

english: (See next quest)
chinese: （见下一任务）

english: This is anything *but* a break, frnakly.
chinese: 这根本算不上休息，坦率地说。

english: 'Would you believe me if I said we find ourselves in similar situations?' You feel something sizing you up. 'Both of us here without being sure why, both of us suddenly in contact with an otherworldly entity, both... ...what? You don't know? My friend, you are *definitely* a special being. As a matter of fact, a lot of things are special about this place. It's... well, it's a long story. Before I get too far, let me introduce myself, though. I am an angel, sent from heaven. Yep, straight from God. This place has gotten in quite a situation, I'm here on His behalf to make sure things work out. Well, sort of. I can't do it myself, I need you.' You ask why it might need you. 'Well, that's a long story. Why don't you get comfortable?'
chinese: '你信吗？我们俩好像都身处类似的局面。' 你感觉到有什么在打量你。'我们都在这里，却不确定为何而来；我们都忽然和某个异界存在建立了联系；我们都……怎么，你还不知道？朋友，你肯定是个特殊存在。事实上，这地方有很多异常。这……说来话长。我先做自我介绍吧，我是天堂派来的天使。是的，直接来自上帝。这里已经乱成一团，我是奉祂之命来把这里的局面尽量理顺的。算是吧。反正这事不是我一个人能完成，我需要你。'你问它为什么需要你。'嗯，那又是个说来话长的故事。你还是先坐舒服点吧？'

english: Awoken
chinese: 觉醒

english: (See next quest)
chinese: （见下一任务）

chinese: 上交任意可燃材料

chinese: 上交任意可燃材料

english: Well, maybe that staircase WILL lead me out, how do you know? ...Oh right, you're an angel. Supposedly.
chinese: 这楼梯也许真能把我带出去，你怎么知道？……哦对，你是天使。至少你自己是这么说的。

english: 'You've been running around quite a bit, haven't you?' The voice seems content to let you think about that for a bit, before continuing. 'I have too, beleive it or not. Perhaps not with physical legs, running around a physical space. But I have been around this place for a while. I know it well. In fact, I have a lot to share with you, if you're willing to listen to it.
chinese: '你已经在这跑了不少了，对吧？' 声音似乎很乐意让你多想一会儿。'信不信由你，我也到处跑过。只不过不是用实体的双腿在实体空间里跑来跑去。但我确实已经在这地方待了很久，对这里很熟。事实上，如果你愿意听，我有很多东西可以告诉你。'

english: Another voice
chinese: 另一道声音

english: (See next quest)
chinese: （见下一任务）

english: Continue the story
chinese: 继续听下去

english: That 'event' a few weeks ago, I heard about something like that... some blue light?
chinese: 几周前那场“事件”，我听过点传闻……像是有一道蓝光？

english: 'Where do I begin... well, you know the tale of Tarkov better than most, since your company sent you here. You know about TerraGroup, you know the conflict, you probably know the result to some extent... but, you might not know much about the aftermath of these events. You see, ever since a, uh... 'special event' happened a few weeks ago, everything's been all messed up. Those who die come back to life. Those who could leave, don't. Tarkov still takes in new people, but doesn't seem to export any. I don't know what the outside world thinks is happening here, but there doesn't seem to be much intervention. Perhaps a space-time distortion of sorts? Who knows anymore... one the dead are raised, nothing's off the table. Anyways, I've been here watching ever since that 'event' transpired. I've been trying to understand what's going on, much like yourself. I haven't made much progress, unfortunatenly; there's only so much I can do by watching, and no one seems to hear me. Well, nobody but you. That works out great for me, I can conduct much better investigations with your help. Of course, that's if you're willing to help me. You can think about it, I'm in no rush. I'll be sure to make it worth your while. On that note, I have been talking for a while, haven't I. My apologies. Take the rest of the day off, you've had a wild introduction to this place. I'll be here if you need something.'
chinese: '从哪里开始呢……你比大多数人更懂塔科夫的事，因为你是公司派来的。你知道 TerraGroup，知道那场冲突，也许你对结果也多少了解……但你可能不太清楚这些事之后又发生了什么。事情是这样的：几周前发生了那个……“特殊事件”后，局面全部乱了。死去的人会活过来，本来能离开的人，却都没有离开。塔科夫还在不断接纳新人，但似乎并没有让谁出去。我不知道外界以为这里到底发生了什么，但外界似乎也没有多少干预。也许是某种时空扭曲？谁还知道……既然死人都能活过来，那就没什么是不可能的了。总之，我自那次“事件”发生后就一直在观察。像你一样，我也在试图理解正在发生什么。可我进展不大；我只能看着，没法做太多，而且似乎没人能听见我。算了，除你之外没人听见。对我来说这还挺好，有你帮忙调查会更顺。前提是你愿意帮我。你可以慢慢想，我不着急。我会让这件事对你来说值得。说起来，我已经说了很久了，是吧。抱歉。今天剩下的时间就先歇着吧，你初来这里就已经够折腾的了。要是需要东西，我都在这。'

english: A story by the fire
chinese: 篝火边的故事

english: You feel the presence fade. Something tells you it should return eventually.
chinese: 你感觉那道存在渐渐远去。某种直觉告诉你，它还会再回来。

english: Thank you for listening'
chinese: 谢谢你听我说完。

english: How are they gonna know which one I'm- well that worked.
chinese: 它们怎么知道我是在喊哪一个……咦，还真管用。

english: You call out to the lower-pitched voice. You aren't sure how to make it clear which one you're calling out to, you just sort of... intend it towards that one. 'Hello', the voice says peacefully, comfortably. 'I was wondering when you would respond to me. You seem to be doing alright for yourself, despite of the fact you died earlier. You- ...oh, you didn't know? That wasn't a hallucination, friend. You died, 100%. Pretty gnarly, too. Yet, you're still here. ...yeah, I should probably discuss some things with you.'
chinese: 你向那道低沉的声音喊了过去。你不确定该怎么让它明白你是在叫它，只是模模糊糊地把意念朝那一边递了过去。'你好，' 那道声音平静而从容地回应。'我一直在等你回应我。尽管你前面已经死过一次，你看起来似乎还挺好。你……哦，你还不知道？那不是幻觉，朋友。你死了，100%。很惨烈。可你还在。……对了，我应该和你先聊几件事。'

english: The lower-pitched voice.
chinese: 那道更低沉的声音

english: (See next quest)
chinese: （见下一任务）

english: Continue the story
chinese: 继续听下去

english: Which one...
chinese: 到底该选哪一个……

english: 'Hello.' You hear the lower pitched voice calling out to you, separated from the other and clear as a sunny day. 'Hello, dear friend. Can you hear me alright?' The voice seems rather calm, though clearly seeking an answer. It fades in and out, traded with the other voice. You get the sense that they are separated for good now, and that calling out to both won't work this time.
chinese: '你好。' 你听见那道低沉的声音再次呼唤你，和另一道声音清清楚楚地分了开来。'你好，亲爱的朋友。你能听清我说话吗？' 这声音倒是平静的，看起来在等你回答。那道声音忽隐忽现，和另一个声音交替响起。你有种感觉，它们这次算是彻底分开了，再同时回应两边已经行不通了。

english: Association
chinese: 联结

english: 'Oh, good. I wasn't sure if I was able to speak with you or not.' The voice remains rather calm, almost as if they were sure you would pick them. Did they even know there was a choice? 'Sit down, make yourself comfortable. You have questions, and I have answers.'
chinese: '哦，太好了。我不确定我是否能和你沟通。' 声音依旧平静，几乎像它早知道你会选它。它怎么会知道还有得选？'坐下，放松点。你有问题，我有答案。'

english: It seems you can only pick one...
chinese: 看来你只能选一个……

english: Hand over any flammable material
chinese: 上交任意可燃材料

english: Casually chatting with an otherwordly being
chinese: 与异界存在闲聊。

english: 'I should probably take a minute to actually explain who I am, shouldn't I? Well, I am actually an angel sent from Heaven. Yes, the big place in the sky, straight from God Himself. Do not be afraid, I have not come to judge you. I've actually come to work with you. Yes, *you*. One could say you're the `main character` of this place. As to why that is... well, that's a whole other story. You might as well get comfortable if I'm gonna keep rambling.'
chinese: '我也该花点时间，真的把自己是谁说明白了，对吧？我其实是从天上来的天使。没错，就是天上的那个大地方，我是上帝亲自派来的。别害怕，我不是来审判你的。其实我来是要跟你合作的。是的，*你*。可以说你是这地方的“主角”。至于为啥……那就是另一段长故事。既然我会一直絮叨，你还是先坐舒服点吧。'

english: Conversation with an otherwordly being(3)
chinese: 与异界存在的交谈（3）

english: 'Glad to see you sticking around. Hope you don't mind more of my ranting.'
chinese: '很高兴你留下来了。希望你不介意我再多唠叨几句。'

english: Seriously? I HAVE to put up with one of you? Fuck me, I guess. At least it's not both of you.
chinese: 你认真的吗？我竟然得忍受你们中的一个？操，行吧。至少不是两个都得忍。

english: Almost as soon as you decide to go without that weird voice, you hear it speak again. 'Perhaps you'd prefer to work with me?' It's... not the same voice, you don't think. This one is a bit deeper, its way of speaking a bit different. You hear it speak again. 'I, uh... I'm afraid you must choose one of us. Call it the curse of this place, if you will. It won't leave you alone unless you let it control you, and the only other option is to let me protect you from it. Which, yes, will mean I'm in contact with you instead. I'll be far less annoying, I promise.' As much as you'd rather listen to neither of these voices, you conclude there truly is no other option. You're running around enough for the traders, why not throw disembodied voices into the mix? Maybe they can reward you in some way. If nothing else, maybe working with them will shut them up some.
chinese: 你几乎刚决定不再理会那道怪声，它就又开口了。“也许你更愿意和我合作？”这……应该不是同一道声音，至少你觉得不是。这道更低沉一些，说话方式也不太一样。它又说道：“我，呃……恐怕你得在我们两个之间选一个。你要愿意的话，就把这当成这地方的诅咒吧。除非你让它控制你，否则它不会放过你；而另一个办法，就是让我替你挡着它。没错，那也意味着换成我来跟你保持联系。不过我保证，我绝对没它那么烦。”尽管这两个声音你一个都不想听，但你也看出来了，恐怕真的没有别的路。反正你已经给商人们跑断腿了，再多应付两道没有实体的声音，好像也不算什么。说不定它们还能给你点回报。最起码，替它们干点事，也许能让它们少烦你几句。

chinese: ***从未真正孤身一人***

chinese: ***你要和哪道声音合作？***

chinese: 与异界存在闲聊。

english: 'I do believe this is the correct choice, my friend. I know I'm biased in that, but, I promise to be more useful to you, and less demanding. How can I promise that? Because I am an angel of Heaven. I have been sent to investigate this place. This aligns somewhat with your own goals, does it not? You've been trying to understand this place, or at least, find a way out. I think I can help you with that, as a matter of fact. To do that, though, we need to get to the bottom of this. I can get you primed on what I know so far, why don't you take get comfortable while I explain some things?'
chinese: '我确实觉得这是正确的选择，朋友。我知道这么说难免有失偏颇，但我保证，我会对你更有用，也不会对你提那么多要求。为什么我敢这么说？因为我是来自天堂的天使，受命来调查这个地方。这和你的目标有些重合，不是吗？你也在试着理解这里，至少是想找到出路。我想我确实能帮上你。要做到这一点，我们得先把这件事查个水落石出。我可以先把我目前掌握的情况给你讲个大概，你坐好点，我慢慢说。'

english: Conversation with an otherwordly being(4)
chinese: 与异界存在的交谈（4）

english: 'Glad to see you sticking around. Hope you don't mind more of my ranting.'
chinese: '很高兴你留下来了。希望你不介意我再多唠叨几句。'
